            },
            {
              "file": "includes/menu.h",
              "patch": "Index: includes/menu.h\n===================================================================\n--- includes/menu.h\t\n+++ includes/menu.h\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@\n+#ifndef MENU_H\n+#define MENU_H\n+\n+#include <string>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+void showMainMenu();\n+void showCustomerMenu(const string& userID);\n+void showAdminMenu();\n+\n+void customerLihatIPhone(const string& userID);\n+void customerCariIPhone(const string& userID);\n+void customerSewa(const string& userID);\n+void customerReservasi(const string& userID);\n+void customerRiwayat(const string& userID);\n+void customerStatusReservasi(const string& userID);\n+\n+void adminManageIPhones();\n+void adminManageUsers();\n+void adminManageRentals();\n+void adminManageReservations();\n+void adminViewReports();\n+\n+#endif\n",
              "additions": 24,

            {
              "file": "includes/rental.h",
              "patch": "Index: includes/rental.h\n===================================================================\n--- includes/rental.h\t\n+++ includes/rental.h\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@\n+#ifndef RENTAL_H\n+#define RENTAL_H\n+\n+#include <string>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+#define MAX_RENTALS 200\n+\n+struct Rental {\n+    string rentalID;\n+    string userID;\n+    string iphoneID;\n+    string startDate;\n+    int duration;\n+    float totalPrice;\n+    string status;\n+};\n+\n+extern Rental daftarRental[MAX_RENTALS];\n+extern int jumlahRental;\n+\n+void sewaIPhone(const string& userID);\n+void returnIPhone();\n+void displayAllRentals();\n+void displayUserRentals(const string& userID);\n+void generateReport();\n+void loadRentals();\n+void saveRentals();\n+\n+#endif\n",
              "additions": 30,

              "patch": "Index: includes/reservation.h\n===================================================================\n--- includes/reservation.h\t\n+++ includes/reservation.h\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@\n+#ifndef RESERVATION_H\n+#define RESERVATION_H\n+\n+#include <string>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+#define MAX_RESERVATIONS 100\n+\n+struct Reservation {\n+    string reservationID;\n+    string userID;\n+    string iphoneID;\n+    string reservationDate;\n+    string priority;\n+    string status;\n+};\n+\n+extern Reservation daftarReservasi[MAX_RESERVATIONS];\n+extern int jumlahReservasi;\n+\n+void buatReservasi(const string& userID);\n+void processReservations(const string& iphoneID);\n+void displayAllReservations();\n+void displayUserReservations(const string& userID);\n+void sortReservationsByPriority();\n+int findReservasiByID(const string& id);\n+void loadReservations();\n+void saveReservations();\n+\n+#endif\n",

            {
              "file": "includes/user.h",
              "patch": "Index: includes/user.h\n===================================================================\n--- includes/user.h\t\n+++ includes/user.h\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@\n+#ifndef USER_H\n+#define USER_H\n+\n+#include <string>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+#define MAX_USERS 100\n+\n+struct User {\n+    string id;\n+    string name;\n+    string phone;\n+    string username;\n+    string password;\n+    string role;\n+    bool isVIP;\n+};\n+\n+extern User daftarUser[MAX_USERS];\n+extern int jumlahUser;\n+\n+void login();\n+void registerUser();\n+void loadUsers();\n+void saveUsers();\n+int findUserByUsername(const string& username);\n+int findUserIndexByID(const string& id);\n+void displayAllUsers();\n+void deleteUser();\n+void setVIPStatus();\n+\n+#endif\n",

              "patch": "Index: includes/validator.h\n===================================================================\n--- includes/validator.h\t\n+++ includes/validator.h\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@\n+#ifndef VALIDATOR_H\n+#define VALIDATOR_H\n+\n+#include <string>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+bool isValidPhoneNumber(const string& phone);\n+bool isValidDate(const string& date);\n+int getValidInt(const string& prompt);\n+float getValidFloat(const string& prompt);\n+string getValidString(const string& prompt);\n+int getMenuChoice(int min, int max);\n+\n+#endif\n",
              "additions": 14,

            {
              "file": "main.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: main.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- main.cpp\t\n+++ main.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@\n+#include \"user.h\"\n+#include \"iphone.h\"\n+#include \"rental.h\"\n+#include \"reservation.h\"\n+#include \"menu.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+int main() {\n+    loadIPhones();\n+    loadUsers();\n+    loadRentals();\n+    loadReservations();\n+\n+    showMainMenu();\n+\n+    return 0;\n+}\n",
              "additions": 18,

            {
              "file": "modules/iphone.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: modules/iphone.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- modules/iphone.cpp\t\n+++ modules/iphone.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,248 @@\n+#include \"iphone.h\"\n+#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <fstream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+iPhone daftarIPhone[MAX_IPHONES];\n+int jumlahIPhone = 0;\n+\n+void loadIPhones() {\n+    ifstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string line;\n+    getline(file, line);\n+\n+    jumlahIPhone = 0;\n+    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahIPhone < MAX_IPHONES) {\n+        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n+        if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n+\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = fields[0];\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = fields[1];\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = fields[2];\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = stringToFloat(fields[3]);\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = fields[4];\n+        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = stringToInt(fields[5]);\n+        jumlahIPhone++;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void saveIPhones() {\n+    ofstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file iphones.csv!\" << endl;\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    file << \"id,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        file << daftarIPhone[i].id << \",\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].name << \",\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \",\"\n+             << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \",\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].status << \",\"\n+             << intToString(daftarIPhone[i].totalRented) << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+int findiPhoneByID(const string& id) {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        if (daftarIPhone[i].id == id) {\n+            return i;\n+        }\n+    }\n+    return -1;\n+}\n+\n+void tambahIPhone() {\n+    if (jumlahIPhone >= MAX_IPHONES) {\n+        cout << \"Kapasitas iPhone penuh!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string name, storage;\n+    float price;\n+\n+    cout << \"Nama iPhone: \";\n+    getline(cin, name);\n+    cout << \"Storage: \";\n+    getline(cin, storage);\n+    price = getValidFloat(\"Harga sewa per hari: \");\n+\n+    int newID = jumlahIPhone + 1;\n+    string id = formatID(\"IP\", newID);\n+\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = id;\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = name;\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = storage;\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = price;\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = \"available\";\n+    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = 0;\n+    jumlahIPhone++;\n+\n+    saveIPhones();\n+    cout << \"iPhone \" << name << \" berhasil ditambahkan dengan ID \" << id << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void editIPhone() {\n+    string id;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang akan diedit: \";\n+    getline(cin, id);\n+\n+    int idx = findiPhoneByID(id);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Edit iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << endl;\n+    cout << \"Nama baru (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n+    string name;\n+    getline(cin, name);\n+    if (name != \"\") {\n+        daftarIPhone[idx].name = name;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Storage baru (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n+    string storage;\n+    getline(cin, storage);\n+    if (storage != \"\") {\n+        daftarIPhone[idx].storage = storage;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Harga sewa baru (0 jika tidak diubah): \";\n+    string priceStr;\n+    getline(cin, priceStr);\n+    if (priceStr != \"0\" && priceStr != \"\") {\n+        daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice = stringToFloat(priceStr);\n+    }\n+\n+    saveIPhones();\n+    cout << \"iPhone berhasil diedit!\" << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void hapusIPhone() {\n+    string id;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang akan dihapus: \";\n+    getline(cin, id);\n+\n+    int idx = findiPhoneByID(id);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \"? (y/n): \";\n+    string confirm;\n+    getline(cin, confirm);\n+    if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n+        cout << \"Penghapusan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    for (int i = idx; i < jumlahIPhone - 1; i++) {\n+        daftarIPhone[i] = daftarIPhone[i + 1];\n+    }\n+    jumlahIPhone--;\n+\n+    saveIPhones();\n+    cout << \"iPhone berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayAllIPhones() {\n+    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA iPhone        \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"ID\\tNama\\t\\tStorage\\tHarga\\tStatus\\tDisewa\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].name << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \"\\t\"\n+             << intToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"\\t\"\n+             << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarIPhone[i].totalRented << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void searchIPhone() {\n+    cout << \"Masukkan nama iPhone yang dicari: \";\n+    string keyword;\n+    getline(cin, keyword);\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"       HASIL PENCARIAN           \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    bool found = false;\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        string lowerName = \"\";\n+        string lowerKeyword = \"\";\n+        for (char c : daftarIPhone[i].name) lowerName += tolower(c);\n+        for (char c : keyword) lowerKeyword += tolower(c);\n+\n+        if (lowerName.find(lowerKeyword) != string::npos) {\n+            cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \" - \"\n+                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n+                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n+                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari - \"\n+                 << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << endl;\n+            found = true;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!found) {\n+        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang cocok dengan \\\"\" << keyword << \"\\\"\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayAvailableIPhones() {\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"    iPhone TERSEDIA              \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    bool found = false;\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n+            cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \" - \"\n+                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n+                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n+                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari\" << endl;\n+            found = true;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!found) {\n+        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n",
              "additions": 248,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "modules/menu.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: modules/menu.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- modules/menu.cpp\t\n+++ modules/menu.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,287 @@\n+#include \"menu.h\"\n+#include \"user.h\"\n+#include \"iphone.h\"\n+#include \"rental.h\"\n+#include \"reservation.h\"\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+void showMainMenu() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"   SISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE       \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Login\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Register Customer\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Keluar\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 3);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                login();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                registerUser();\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                cout << \"Terima kasih telah menggunakan sistem.\" << endl;\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 3);\n+}\n+\n+void showCustomerMenu(const string& userID) {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"        MENU CUSTOMER            \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Lihat Daftar iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Cari iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Sewa iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"4. Reservasi iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"5. Status Reservasi Saya\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"6. Riwayat Penyewaan Saya\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"7. Logout\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 7);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                customerLihatIPhone(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                customerCariIPhone(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                customerSewa(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 4:\n+                customerReservasi(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 5:\n+                customerStatusReservasi(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 6:\n+                customerRiwayat(userID);\n+                break;\n+            case 7:\n+                cout << \"Logout berhasil.\" << endl;\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 7);\n+}\n+\n+void showAdminMenu() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"         MENU ADMIN              \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Manajemen iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Manajemen User\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Manajemen Penyewaan\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"4. Manajemen Reservasi\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"5. Laporan\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"6. Logout\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 6);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                adminManageIPhones();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                adminManageUsers();\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                adminManageRentals();\n+                break;\n+            case 4:\n+                adminManageReservations();\n+                break;\n+            case 5:\n+                adminViewReports();\n+                break;\n+            case 6:\n+                cout << \"Logout berhasil.\" << endl;\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 6);\n+}\n+\n+void customerLihatIPhone(const string&) {\n+    displayAllIPhones();\n+}\n+\n+void customerCariIPhone(const string&) {\n+    searchIPhone();\n+}\n+\n+void customerSewa(const string& userID) {\n+    sewaIPhone(userID);\n+}\n+\n+void customerReservasi(const string& userID) {\n+    buatReservasi(userID);\n+}\n+\n+void customerRiwayat(const string& userID) {\n+    displayUserRentals(userID);\n+}\n+\n+void customerStatusReservasi(const string& userID) {\n+    displayUserReservations(userID);\n+}\n+\n+void adminManageIPhones() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"     MANAJEMEN IPHONE            \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Tambah iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Edit iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Hapus iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"4. Lihat Semua iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"5. Cari iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"6. Kembali\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 6);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                tambahIPhone();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                editIPhone();\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                hapusIPhone();\n+                break;\n+            case 4:\n+                displayAllIPhones();\n+                break;\n+            case 5:\n+                searchIPhone();\n+                break;\n+            case 6:\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 6);\n+}\n+\n+void adminManageUsers() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"     MANAJEMEN USER              \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua User\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Hapus User\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Atur Status VIP\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"4. Kembali\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 4);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                displayAllUsers();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                deleteUser();\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                setVIPStatus();\n+                break;\n+            case 4:\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 4);\n+}\n+\n+void adminManageRentals() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"   MANAJEMEN PENYEWAAN           \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua Penyewaan\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Pengembalian iPhone\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"3. Kembali\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 3);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                displayAllRentals();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                returnIPhone();\n+                break;\n+            case 3:\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 3);\n+}\n+\n+void adminManageReservations() {\n+    int pilihan;\n+\n+    do {\n+        clearScreen();\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"   MANAJEMEN RESERVASI           \" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua Reservasi\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"2. Kembali\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 2);\n+\n+        switch (pilihan) {\n+            case 1:\n+                displayAllReservations();\n+                break;\n+            case 2:\n+                break;\n+        }\n+    } while (pilihan != 2);\n+}\n+\n+void adminViewReports() {\n+    clearScreen();\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"         LAPORAN                 \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    generateReport();\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"   DAFTAR RESERVASI (Laporan)    \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    displayAllReservations();\n+}\n",
              "additions": 287,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "modules/rental.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: modules/rental.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- modules/rental.cpp\t\n+++ modules/rental.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,276 @@\n+#include \"rental.h\"\n+#include \"iphone.h\"\n+#include \"user.h\"\n+#include \"reservation.h\"\n+#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <fstream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+Rental daftarRental[MAX_RENTALS];\n+int jumlahRental = 0;\n+\n+void loadRentals() {\n+    ifstream file(\"data/rentals.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string line;\n+    getline(file, line);\n+\n+    jumlahRental = 0;\n+    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahRental < MAX_RENTALS) {\n+        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n+        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n+\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = fields[0];\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = fields[1];\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = fields[2];\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = fields[3];\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = stringToInt(fields[4]);\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = stringToFloat(fields[5]);\n+        daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = fields[6];\n+        jumlahRental++;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void saveRentals() {\n+    ofstream file(\"data/rentals.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file rentals.csv!\" << endl;\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    file << \"rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n+        file << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \",\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].userID << \",\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].startDate << \",\"\n+             << intToString(daftarRental[i].duration) << \",\"\n+             << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \",\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].status << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void sewaIPhone(const string& userID) {\n+    displayAvailableIPhones();\n+\n+    string iphoneID;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin disewa: \";\n+    getline(cin, iphoneID);\n+\n+    int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (daftarIPhone[idx].status != \"available\") {\n+        cout << \"Maaf, iPhone \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" sedang tidak tersedia.\" << endl;\n+        cout << \"Anda bisa melakukan reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string startDate;\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Tanggal mulai sewa (YYYY-MM-DD): \";\n+        getline(cin, startDate);\n+        if (isValidDate(startDate)) break;\n+        cout << \"Format tanggal salah! Gunakan YYYY-MM-DD\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    int duration = getValidInt(\"Durasi sewa (hari): \");\n+    if (duration < 1) {\n+        cout << \"Durasi minimal 1 hari!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    float totalPrice = daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice * duration;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"RINCIAN SEWA:\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" (\" << daftarIPhone[idx].storage << \")\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"Durasi: \" << duration << \" hari\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"Harga/hari: Rp\" << floatToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice) << endl;\n+    cout << \"Total: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPrice) << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"Konfirmasi sewa? (y/n): \";\n+    string confirm;\n+    getline(cin, confirm);\n+    if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n+        cout << \"Penyewaan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    int newID = jumlahRental + 1;\n+    string rentalID = formatID(\"RNT\", newID);\n+\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = rentalID;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = userID;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = startDate;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = duration;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = totalPrice;\n+    daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = \"active\";\n+    jumlahRental++;\n+\n+    daftarIPhone[idx].status = \"rented\";\n+    daftarIPhone[idx].totalRented++;\n+\n+    saveRentals();\n+    saveIPhones();\n+\n+    cout << \"Penyewaan berhasil! ID Rental: \" << rentalID << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void returnIPhone() {\n+    string rentalID;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID Rental yang akan dikembalikan: \";\n+    getline(cin, rentalID);\n+\n+    int idx = -1;\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n+        if (daftarRental[i].rentalID == rentalID && daftarRental[i].status == \"active\") {\n+            idx = i;\n+            break;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"Rental tidak ditemukan atau sudah dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    daftarRental[idx].status = \"completed\";\n+\n+    int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n+    if (phoneIdx != -1) {\n+        daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].status = \"available\";\n+    }\n+\n+    saveRentals();\n+    saveIPhones();\n+\n+    cout << \"iPhone berhasil dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n+\n+    processReservations(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayAllRentals() {\n+    if (jumlahRental == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada transaksi penyewaan.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"     SEMUA TRANSAKSI SEWA        \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"ID\\tUser\\tiPhone\\tTgl\\tDurasi\\tTotal\\tStatus\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n+        cout << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].userID << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].iphoneID << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].startDate << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarRental[i].duration << \"\\t\"\n+             << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \"\\t\"\n+             << (daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\") << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayUserRentals(const string& userID) {\n+    bool found = false;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"     RIWAYAT SEWA ANDA           \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n+        if (daftarRental[i].userID == userID) {\n+            int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[i].iphoneID);\n+            string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n+\n+            cout << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \" - \"\n+                 << phoneName << \" - \"\n+                 << daftarRental[i].startDate << \" (\"\n+                 << daftarRental[i].duration << \" hari) - Rp\"\n+                 << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \" - \"\n+                 << (daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\") << endl;\n+            found = true;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!found) {\n+        cout << \"Anda belum memiliki riwayat penyewaan.\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void generateReport() {\n+    float totalPendapatan = 0;\n+    int totalAktif = 0;\n+    int totalSelesai = 0;\n+    int maxRented = -1;\n+    int maxRentedIdx = -1;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"         LAPORAN SEWA            \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n+        if (daftarRental[i].status == \"completed\") {\n+            totalPendapatan += daftarRental[i].totalPrice;\n+            totalSelesai++;\n+        } else {\n+            totalAktif++;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n+        if (daftarIPhone[i].totalRented > maxRented) {\n+            maxRented = daftarIPhone[i].totalRented;\n+            maxRentedIdx = i;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Total Pendapatan: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPendapatan) << endl;\n+    cout << \"Total Transaksi: \" << jumlahRental << endl;\n+    cout << \"  - Aktif: \" << totalAktif << endl;\n+    cout << \"  - Selesai: \" << totalSelesai << endl;\n+    cout << \"Total iPhone: \" << jumlahIPhone << endl;\n+\n+    if (maxRentedIdx != -1 && maxRented > 0) {\n+        cout << \"iPhone Terpopuler: \" << daftarIPhone[maxRentedIdx].name\n+             << \" (\" << maxRented << \" kali disewa)\" << endl;\n+    } else {\n+        cout << \"iPhone Terpopuler: Belum ada data\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    float rataRata = jumlahRental > 0 ? totalPendapatan / jumlahRental : 0;\n+    cout << \"Rata-rata per transaksi: Rp\" << floatToString(rataRata) << endl;\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n",
              "additions": 276,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "modules/reservation.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: modules/reservation.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- modules/reservation.cpp\t\n+++ modules/reservation.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,215 @@\n+#include \"reservation.h\"\n+#include \"iphone.h\"\n+#include \"user.h\"\n+#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <fstream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+Reservation daftarReservasi[MAX_RESERVATIONS];\n+int jumlahReservasi = 0;\n+\n+void loadReservations() {\n+    ifstream file(\"data/reservations.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string line;\n+    getline(file, line);\n+\n+    jumlahReservasi = 0;\n+    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahReservasi < MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n+        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n+        if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n+\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = fields[0];\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = fields[1];\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = fields[2];\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = fields[3];\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = fields[4];\n+        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = fields[5];\n+        jumlahReservasi++;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void saveReservations() {\n+    ofstream file(\"data/reservations.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file reservations.csv!\" << endl;\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    file << \"reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n+        file << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \",\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \",\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \",\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \",\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].status << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void sortReservationsByPriority() {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n+        for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n+            int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n+            int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n+\n+            if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n+                Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n+                daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n+                daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n+            }\n+        }\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+int findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n+        if (daftarReservasi[i].reservationID == id) {\n+            return i;\n+        }\n+    }\n+    return -1;\n+}\n+\n+void buatReservasi(const string& userID) {\n+    if (jumlahReservasi >= MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n+        cout << \"Maaf, antrean reservasi penuh!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    displayAllIPhones();\n+\n+    string iphoneID;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin direservasi: \";\n+    getline(cin, iphoneID);\n+\n+    int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(userID);\n+    string priority = \"Regular\";\n+    if (userIdx != -1 && daftarUser[userIdx].isVIP) {\n+        priority = \"VIP\";\n+    }\n+\n+    int newID = jumlahReservasi + 1;\n+    string resID = formatID(\"RSV\", newID);\n+\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = resID;\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = userID;\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = getCurrentDate();\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = priority;\n+    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = \"waiting\";\n+    jumlahReservasi++;\n+\n+    sortReservationsByPriority();\n+    saveReservations();\n+\n+    cout << \"Reservasi berhasil! ID Reservasi: \" << resID << endl;\n+    cout << \"Prioritas: \" << priority << endl;\n+    cout << \"Anda akan mendapat notifikasi ketika iPhone tersedia.\" << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n+    cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n+\n+    bool found = false;\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n+        if (daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID == iphoneID &&\n+            daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") {\n+            int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n+            string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n+\n+            cout << \"Reservasi ditemukan:\" << endl;\n+            cout << \"ID: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << endl;\n+            cout << \"User: \" << userName << endl;\n+            cout << \"Prioritas: \" << daftarReservasi[i].priority << endl;\n+            cout << \"Tanggal: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << endl;\n+            found = true;\n+            break;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!found) {\n+        cout << \"Tidak ada antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+void displayAllReservations() {\n+    if (jumlahReservasi == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada reservasi.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    sortReservationsByPriority();\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"       DAFTAR RESERVASI          \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"ID\\tUser\\tiPhone\\tTgl\\tPrioritas\\tStatus\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n+        int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n+        string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n+        string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n+\n+        cout << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \"\\t\"\n+             << phoneName << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \"\\t\\t\"\n+             << statusText << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayUserReservations(const string& userID) {\n+    bool found = false;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"     STATUS RESERVASI ANDA       \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n+        if (daftarReservasi[i].userID == userID) {\n+            int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n+            string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n+            string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n+\n+            cout << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \" - \"\n+                 << phoneName << \" - \"\n+                 << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \" - \"\n+                 << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \" - \"\n+                 << statusText << endl;\n+            found = true;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!found) {\n+        cout << \"Anda belum memiliki reservasi.\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n",
              "additions": 215,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "modules/user.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: modules/user.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- modules/user.cpp\t\n+++ modules/user.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,240 @@\n+#include \"user.h\"\n+#include \"menu.h\"\n+#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <fstream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+User daftarUser[MAX_USERS];\n+int jumlahUser = 0;\n+\n+void loadUsers() {\n+    ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string line;\n+    getline(file, line);\n+\n+    jumlahUser = 0;\n+    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n+        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n+        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n+\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n+        daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n+        jumlahUser++;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+void saveUsers() {\n+    ofstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n+    if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file users.csv!\" << endl;\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    file << \"id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        file << daftarUser[i].id << \",\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].name << \",\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].phone << \",\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].username << \",\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].password << \",\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].role << \",\"\n+             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"true\" : \"false\") << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    file.close();\n+}\n+\n+int findUserByUsername(const string& username) {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        if (daftarUser[i].username == username) {\n+            return i;\n+        }\n+    }\n+    return -1;\n+}\n+\n+int findUserIndexByID(const string& id) {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        if (daftarUser[i].id == id) {\n+            return i;\n+        }\n+    }\n+    return -1;\n+}\n+\n+void login() {\n+    string username, password;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"           LOGIN                 \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan username: \";\n+    getline(cin, username);\n+    cout << \"Masukkan password: \";\n+    getline(cin, password);\n+\n+    int idx = findUserByUsername(username);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"Username tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (daftarUser[idx].password != password) {\n+        cout << \"Password salah!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Selamat datang, \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"!\" << endl;\n+\n+    if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n+        showAdminMenu();\n+    } else {\n+        showCustomerMenu(daftarUser[idx].id);\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+void registerUser() {\n+    if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n+        cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string name, phone, username, password;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"        REGISTER CUSTOMER        \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    cout << \"Nama: \";\n+    getline(cin, name);\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n+        getline(cin, phone);\n+        if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n+        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Username: \";\n+        getline(cin, username);\n+        if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n+        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Password: \";\n+    getline(cin, password);\n+\n+    int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n+    string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n+\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = \"customer\";\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n+    jumlahUser++;\n+\n+    saveUsers();\n+    cout << \"Registrasi berhasil! ID Anda: \" << id << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void displayAllUsers() {\n+    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA USER         \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"ID\\tNama\\t\\tHP\\t\\tRole\\tVIP\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        cout << daftarUser[i].id << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].name << \"\\t\\t\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].phone << \"\\t\"\n+             << daftarUser[i].role << \"\\t\"\n+             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"Ya\" : \"Tidak\") << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void deleteUser() {\n+    string id;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID user yang akan dihapus: \";\n+    getline(cin, id);\n+\n+    int idx = findUserIndexByID(id);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"User dengan ID \" << id << \" tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n+        cout << \"Tidak bisa menghapus admin!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    for (int i = idx; i < jumlahUser - 1; i++) {\n+        daftarUser[i] = daftarUser[i + 1];\n+    }\n+    jumlahUser--;\n+\n+    saveUsers();\n+    cout << \"User berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void setVIPStatus() {\n+    string id;\n+    cout << \"Masukkan ID user: \";\n+    getline(cin, id);\n+\n+    int idx = findUserIndexByID(id);\n+    if (idx == -1) {\n+        cout << \"User tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (daftarUser[idx].role != \"customer\") {\n+        cout << \"Hanya customer yang bisa diubah status VIP!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    daftarUser[idx].isVIP = !daftarUser[idx].isVIP;\n+    saveUsers();\n+\n+    cout << \"Status VIP user \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n+         << \" sekarang: \" << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \"VIP\" : \"Reguler\") << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n",
              "additions": 240,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "utils/csv_helper.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: utils/csv_helper.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- utils/csv_helper.cpp\t\n+++ utils/csv_helper.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@\n+#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n+#include <sstream>\n+\n+vector<string> splitCSVRow(const string& row) {\n+    vector<string> fields;\n+    stringstream ss(row);\n+    string field;\n+\n+    while (getline(ss, field, ',')) {\n+        fields.push_back(trimString(field));\n+    }\n+\n+    return fields;\n+}\n+\n+string trimString(const string& str) {\n+    int start = 0;\n+    int end = str.length() - 1;\n+\n+    while (start <= end && (str[start] == ' ' || str[start] == '\\r')) {\n+        start++;\n+    }\n+\n+    while (end >= start && (str[end] == ' ' || str[end] == '\\r')) {\n+        end--;\n+    }\n+\n+    return str.substr(start, end - start + 1);\n+}\n+\n+bool parseBoolean(const string& str) {\n+    string lower = \"\";\n+    for (char c : str) {\n+        lower += tolower(c);\n+    }\n+    return lower == \"true\";\n+}\n",
              "additions": 37,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "utils/utils.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: utils/utils.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- utils/utils.cpp\t\n+++ utils/utils.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+#include <iomanip>\n+#include <limits>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+void clearScreen() {\n+    for (int i = 0; i < 40; i++) {\n+        cout << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+void pressEnter() {\n+    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\" << endl;\n+    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n+}\n+\n+string getCurrentDate() {\n+    time_t t = time(nullptr);\n+    struct tm* now = localtime(&t);\n+    stringstream ss;\n+    ss << (now->tm_year + 1900) << \"-\"\n+       << setw(2) << setfill('0') << (now->tm_mon + 1) << \"-\"\n+       << setw(2) << setfill('0') << now->tm_mday;\n+    return ss.str();\n+}\n+\n+int stringToInt(const string& str) {\n+    stringstream ss(str);\n+    int val = 0;\n+    ss >> val;\n+    return val;\n+}\n+\n+float stringToFloat(const string& str) {\n+    stringstream ss(str);\n+    float val = 0;\n+    ss >> val;\n+    return val;\n+}\n+\n+string intToString(int val) {\n+    stringstream ss;\n+    ss << val;\n+    return ss.str();\n+}\n+\n+string floatToString(float val) {\n+    stringstream ss;\n+    ss << fixed << setprecision(0) << val;\n+    return ss.str();\n+}\n+\n+string formatID(const string& prefix, int num) {\n+    stringstream ss;\n+    ss << prefix;\n+    ss << setw(3) << setfill('0') << num;\n+    return ss.str();\n+}\n",
              "additions": 60,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "utils/validator.cpp",
              "patch": "Index: utils/validator.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- utils/validator.cpp\t\n+++ utils/validator.cpp\t\n@@ -0,0 +1,102 @@\n+#include \"validator.h\"\n+#include \"utils.h\"\n+#include <iostream>\n+#include <sstream>\n+using namespace std;\n+\n+bool isValidPhoneNumber(const string& phone) {\n+    if (phone.length() < 10 || phone.length() > 14) {\n+        return false;\n+    }\n+\n+    for (char c : phone) {\n+        if (c < '0' || c > '9') {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    return true;\n+}\n+\n+bool isValidDate(const string& date) {\n+    if (date.length() != 10) {\n+        return false;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (date[4] != '-' || date[7] != '-') {\n+        return false;\n+    }\n+\n+    for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n+        if (i == 4 || i == 7) continue;\n+        if (date[i] < '0' || date[i] > '9') {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    int month = stringToInt(date.substr(5, 2));\n+    int day = stringToInt(date.substr(8, 2));\n+\n+    if (month < 1 || month > 12) return false;\n+    if (day < 1 || day > 31) return false;\n+\n+    return true;\n+}\n+\n+int getValidInt(const string& prompt) {\n+    int val;\n+    string input;\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << prompt;\n+        getline(cin, input);\n+\n+        stringstream ss(input);\n+        if (ss >> val && ss.eof()) {\n+            return val;\n+        }\n+\n+        cout << \"Input harus berupa angka!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+float getValidFloat(const string& prompt) {\n+    float val;\n+    string input;\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << prompt;\n+        getline(cin, input);\n+\n+        stringstream ss(input);\n+        if (ss >> val && ss.eof()) {\n+            return val;\n+        }\n+\n+        cout << \"Input harus berupa angka!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n+\n+string getValidString(const string& prompt) {\n+    string input;\n+    cout << prompt;\n+    getline(cin, input);\n+    return input;\n+}\n+\n+int getMenuChoice(int min, int max) {\n+    int choice;\n+    string input;\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Pilih: \";\n+        getline(cin, input);\n+\n+        stringstream ss(input);\n+        if (ss >> choice && ss.eof() && choice >= min && choice <= max) {\n+            return choice;\n+        }\n+\n+        cout << \"Pilihan tidak valid! Masukkan \" << min << \"-\" << max << endl;\n+    }\n+}\n",
              "additions": 102,
              "deletions": 0,
              "status": "added"
            },
            {
              "file": "xmake.lua",
              "patch": "Index: xmake.lua\n===================================================================\n--- xmake.lua\t\n+++ xmake.lua\t\n@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@\n set_project(\"Sistem-Penyewaan-iPhone\")\n set_version(\"1.0.0\")\n set_languages(\"c++17\")\n-add_cxxflags(\"-Wall\", \"-Wextra\")\n \n if is_mode(\"debug\") then\n     add_defines(\"DEBUG\")\n     set_symbols(\"debug\")\n end\n \n target(\"app\")\n     set_kind(\"binary\")\n     add_includedirs(\"includes\")\n     add_files(\"main.cpp\", \"modules/*.cpp\", \"utils/*.cpp\")\n     set_targetdir(\"bin\")\n+    set_rundir(\".\")\n",
              "additions": 1,
              "deletions": 1,
              "status": "modified"
            }
          ]
        },
        "id": "msg_e3e4ad8a3001jKLrGjWo4rpgKF",
        "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR"
      },
      "parts": [
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "==================================================\nPENYIMPANAN DATA WAJIB MENGGUNAKAN CSV\n==================================================\n\nSEMUA data program HARUS disimpan menggunakan file CSV.\n\nJANGAN menggunakan:\n- database\n- JSON\n- XML\n- binary file\n- txt biasa tanpa format\n- framework eksternal\n\nGunakan file CSV sederhana agar sesuai materi pembelajaran dan mudah dipahami mahasiswa.\n\n==================================================\nSTRUKTUR FOLDER DATA\n==================================================\n\nGunakan folder:\n\ndata/\n\nDan simpan file berikut:\n\ndata/\n├── iphones.csv\n├── customers.csv\n├── rentals.csv\n├── reservations.csv\n└── admins.csv\n\n==================================================\nFORMAT CSV\n==================================================\n\n## iphones.csv\nFormat:\nid,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\n\nContoh:\nIP001,iPhone 13,128GB,150000,available,5\nIP002,iPhone 14 Pro,256GB,250000,rented,8\n\n==================================================\n\n## customers.csv\nFormat:\nid,name,phone,is_vip\n\nContoh:\nCUS001,Budi,08123456789,true\nCUS002,Siti,08987654321,false\n\n==================================================\n\n## rentals.csv\nFormat:\nrental_id,customer_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\n\nContoh:\nR001,CUS001,IP001,2026-05-19,3,450000,active\n\n==================================================\n\n## reservations.csv\nFormat:\nreservation_id,customer_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\n\nContoh:\nRS001,CUS002,IP001,2026-05-19,VIP,waiting\n\n==================================================\n\n## admins.csv\nFormat:\nusername,password\n\nContoh:\nadmin,admin123\n\n==================================================\nIMPLEMENTASI FILE HANDLING\n==================================================\n\nWAJIB:\n- Membaca data CSV saat program dimulai\n- Menyimpan perubahan otomatis\n- Menambahkan data baru ke CSV\n- Mengupdate data CSV\n- Menghapus data dari CSV dengan rewrite file\n\nGunakan:\n- fstream\n- getline()\n- stringstream\n\nJika sesuai materi modul.\n\n==================================================\nUTILS CSV\n==================================================\n\nBuat utility/helper khusus CSV di folder:\n\nutils/\n\nContoh:\nutils/\n├── csv_helper.cpp\n├── csv_helper.h\n├── validator.cpp\n└── utils.cpp\n\nFunction yang disarankan:\n- loadCSV()\n- saveCSV()\n- splitCSVRow()\n- parseBoolean()\n- trimString()\n\n==================================================\nVALIDASI CSV\n==================================================\n\nProgram HARUS:\n- Tidak crash jika file kosong\n- Membuat file otomatis jika belum ada\n- Validasi jumlah kolom CSV\n- Menangani newline dengan benar\n- Tidak merusak format CSV\n\n==================================================\nKETENTUAN IMPLEMENTASI\n==================================================\n\nJANGAN:\n- Hardcode data langsung di program\n- Menyimpan semua hanya di memori\n- Menggunakan library CSV eksternal\n\nFokus:\n- Implementasi manual sederhana\n- Mudah dipahami mahasiswa\n- Stabil\n- Rapi\n- Sesuai materi file handling\n\n==================================================\nPENJELASAN WAJIB\n==================================================\n\nSaat memberikan hasil akhir:\n- Jelaskan cara kerja CSV\n- Jelaskan proses read/write CSV\n- Jelaskan alasan memilih CSV\n- Jelaskan hubungan antar file CSV\n\nContoh:\n- customer_id pada rentals.csv terhubung ke customers.csv\n- iphone_id pada reservations.csv terhubung ke iphones.csv ==================================================\nSISTEM USER / ROLE\n==================================================\n\nKarena program memiliki 2 role:\n- Customer\n- Admin\n\nMaka gunakan SATU file user gabungan:\n\ndata/users.csv\n\nJANGAN memisahkan:\n- admins.csv\n- customers.csv\n\nSemua akun disimpan dalam users.csv dan dibedakan menggunakan role.\n\n==================================================\nFORMAT users.csv\n==================================================\n\nFormat:\nid,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\n\nContoh:\nUSR001,Budi,08123456789,budi,budi123,customer,false\nUSR002,Siti,08987654321,siti,siti123,customer,true\nUSR003,Administrator,08000000000,admin,admin123,admin,false\n\n==================================================\nPENJELASAN ROLE\n==================================================\n\nrole dapat berisi:\n- admin\n- customer\n\n==================================================\nLOGIN SYSTEM\n==================================================\n\nSaat login:\n- User input username\n- User input password\n- Program membaca users.csv\n- Program menentukan role berdasarkan data CSV\n\nJika role == admin:\n→ masuk menu admin\n\nJika role == customer:\n→ masuk menu customer\n\n==================================================\nFITUR REGISTER CUSTOMER\n==================================================\n\nTambahkan fitur:\n- Register customer baru\n\nCustomer baru:\n- otomatis role = customer\n- otomatis is_vip = false\n\nAdmin dapat:\n- mengubah customer menjadi VIP\n- melihat seluruh user\n- menghapus user tertentu\n\n==================================================\nVALIDASI LOGIN\n==================================================\n\nProgram HARUS:\n- Mengecek username unik saat register\n- Validasi login\n- Menolak login salah\n- Tidak crash jika CSV kosong\n- Tidak hardcode akun admin di source code\n\n==================================================\nRELASI DATA\n==================================================\n\nSemua transaksi menggunakan:\nuser_id\n\nContoh:\n\n## rentals.csv\nrental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\n\n==================================================\n\n## reservations.csv\nreservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\n\n==================================================\nKEUNTUNGAN STRUKTUR INI\n==================================================\n\nStruktur users.csv lebih baik karena:\n- Lebih realistis\n- Mendukung multi-role\n- Tidak duplikasi data\n- Relasi lebih sederhana\n- Lebih mudah dikembangkan\n- Sesuai konsep sistem autentikasi dasar\n\n==================================================\nIMPLEMENTASI YANG DIHARAPKAN\n==================================================\n\nGunakan:\n- Struct/Class User\n- Function login()\n- Function registerUser()\n- Function loadUsers()\n- Function saveUsers()\n\nPisahkan logic user ke:\n\nincludes/user.h\nmodules/user.cpp\n\n==================================================\nKETENTUAN TAMBAHAN\n==================================================\n\nMenu utama program:\n\n1. Login\n2. Register Customer\n3. Keluar\n\nSetelah login:\n- Admin → menu admin\n- Customer → menu customer\n\n==================================================\nLARANGAN\n==================================================\n\nJANGAN:\n- Hardcode akun di source code\n- Membuat admin terpisah dari user\n- Menyimpan password di variabel global\n- Membuat role system berantakan\n\nFokus:\n- Sistem login sederhana\n- Struktur data rapi\n- Mudah dipahami mahasiswa\n- Sesuai materi file handling dan struct/class ",

          "text": "The user wants me to revise the entire plan to use CSV files instead of TXT, and use a unified users.csv file. Let me restructure the entire project accordingly.\n\nKey changes:\n1. All data files should be CSV format\n2. Unified users.csv for all users (customers + admin)\n3. Login/Register system instead of separate menus\n4. All relationships use IDs\n\nLet me re-plan and start writing all files. I need to:\n\n1. Update data files to CSV format\n2. Add csv_helper.h/cpp in utils folder\n3. Add user.h and user.cpp for user management\n4. Update all other files to use CSV format\n\nLet me also re-read the requirements carefully:\n\n- users.csv: id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\n- iphones.csv: id,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\n- rentals.csv: rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\n- reservations.csv: reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\n\nMain menu:\n1. Login\n2. Register Customer\n3. Keluar\n\nAfter login, based on role:\n- Admin → menu admin\n- Customer → menu customer\n\nI also need to add:\n- csv_helper.h and csv_helper.cpp in utils\n- user.h in includes, user.cpp in modules\n\nLet me now write all the files. This is going to be a lot of code.\n\nLet me organize the writing:\n\n1. xmake.lua (update to include new files)\n2. data/*.csv files\n3. includes/*.h files (iphone.h, customer.h - actually user.h now, rental.h, reservation.h, menu.h, utils.h)\n4. utils/*.cpp files (csv_helper.cpp, validator.cpp, utils.cpp)\n5. modules/*.cpp files (iphone.cpp, user.cpp, rental.cpp, reservation.cpp, menu.cpp)\n6. main.cpp\n\nWait, since we're using users.csv, do I still need customer.h? The user said \"Tambahkan fitur Register customer baru\" - so customer is just a user with role \"customer\". So I don't need a separate customer.h, I need user.h instead.\n\nActually, looking more carefully at the requirements:\n- They said: includes/customer.h → but now with users.csv, this should be user.h\n- They said: modules/customer.cpp → this should be user.cpp\n\nBut they still want the structure. Let me re-read... \"Pisahkan logic user ke: includes/user.h, modules/user.cpp\"\n\nSo the new structure is:\n- includes/user.h (replaces customer.h)\n- modules/user.cpp (replaces customer.cpp)\n\nOr I could keep customer.h/cpp for customer-specific operations and add user.h/cpp for login stuff. But the requirement says clearly to use user.h and user.cpp for login logic.\n\nActually, let me keep it simpler. I'll have:\n- includes/user.h - User struct, declarations for login, register, user management\n- modules/user.cpp - implementation\n\nBut I also need customer-specific functionality in the customer menu (view rental history, etc). The user can be both admin and customer. Let me structure it so:\n\n- user.h/cpp handles: login, register, user CRUD\n- rental.h/cpp handles: rental operations for both customer and admin\n\nI don't need a separate customer.h/cpp since customer is just a user role. The customer-specific menu functionality will be in menu.cpp.\n\nLet me finalize the file list:\n\n**includes/**\n- utils.h\n- csv_helper.h\n- user.h\n- iphone.h\n- rental.h\n- reservation.h\n- menu.h\n\n**utils/**\n- utils.cpp\n- csv_helper.cpp\n- validator.cpp\n\n**modules/**\n- user.cpp\n- iphone.cpp\n- rental.cpp\n- reservation.cpp\n- menu.cpp\n\n**data/**\n- users.csv\n- iphones.csv\n- rentals.csv\n- reservations.csv\n\nLet me now write all the code. I'll batch the writes.\n\nLet me plan each header file:\n\n### csv_helper.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef CSV_HELPER_H\n#define CSV_HELPER_H\n\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvector<string> splitCSVRow(const string& row);\nstring trimString(const string& str);\nbool parseBoolean(const string& str);\n\n#endif\n```\n\n### utils.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef UTILS_H\n#define UTILS_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid clearScreen();\nvoid pressEnter();\nstring getCurrentDate();\nint stringToInt(const string& str);\nfloat stringToFloat(const string& str);\nstring intToString(int val);\nstring floatToString(float val);\n\n#endif\n```\n\n### user.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef USER_H\n#define USER_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\n#define MAX_USERS 100\n\nstruct User {\n    string id;\n    string name;\n    string phone;\n    string username;\n    string password;\n    string role; // \"admin\" or \"customer\"\n    bool isVIP;\n};\n\nextern User daftarUser[MAX_USERS];\nextern int jumlahUser;\nextern User* currentUser;\n\nint login();\nvoid registerUser();\nvoid loadUsers();\nvoid saveUsers();\nint findUserByID(const string& id);\nint findUserByUsername(const string& username);\nvoid displayAllUsers();\nvoid deleteUser();\nvoid setVIPStatus();\n\n#endif\n```\n\nWait, I should keep `currentUser` as a pointer or index. Let me use an index (int) since that's simpler with arrays.\n\nActually, using a pointer is a good demonstration of pointer concepts from Modul 4. Let me use:\n```cpp\nextern User* currentUser;\n```\n\n### iphone.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef IPHONE_H\n#define IPHONE_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\n#define MAX_IPHONES 100\n\nstruct iPhone {\n    string id;\n    string name;\n    string storage;\n    float rentPrice;\n    string status; // \"available\" or \"rented\"\n    int totalRented;\n};\n\nextern iPhone daftarIPhone[MAX_IPHONES];\nextern int jumlahIPhone;\n\nvoid tambahIPhone();\nvoid editIPhone();\nvoid hapusIPhone();\nvoid displayAllIPhones();\nvoid searchIPhone();\nvoid displayAvailableIPhones();\nint findiPhoneByID(const string& id);\nvoid loadIPhones();\nvoid saveIPhones();\n\n#endif\n```\n\n### rental.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef RENTAL_H\n#define RENTAL_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\n#define MAX_RENTALS 200\n\nstruct Rental {\n    string rentalID;\n    string userID;\n    string iphoneID;\n    string startDate;\n    int duration;\n    float totalPrice;\n    string status; // \"active\" or \"completed\"\n};\n\nextern Rental daftarRental[MAX_RENTALS];\nextern int jumlahRental;\n\nvoid sewaIPhone(const string& userID);\nvoid returnIPhone();\nvoid displayAllRentals();\nvoid displayUserRentals(const string& userID);\nvoid loadRentals();\nvoid saveRentals();\n\n#endif\n```\n\n### reservation.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef RESERVATION_H\n#define RESERVATION_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\n#define MAX_RESERVATIONS 100\n\nstruct Reservation {\n    string reservationID;\n    string userID;\n    string iphoneID;\n    string reservationDate;\n    string priority; // \"VIP\" or \"Regular\"\n    string status; // \"waiting\" or \"processed\"\n};\n\nextern Reservation daftarReservasi[MAX_RESERVATIONS];\nextern int jumlahReservasi;\n\nvoid buatReservasi(const string& userID);\nvoid processReservations(const string& iphoneID);\nvoid displayAllReservations();\nvoid displayUserReservations(const string& userID);\nvoid sortReservationsByPriority();\nvoid loadReservations();\nvoid saveReservations();\n\n#endif\n```\n\n### menu.h\n```cpp\n#ifndef MENU_H\n#define MENU_H\n\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid showMainMenu();\nvoid showCustomerMenu(const string& userID);\nvoid showAdminMenu();\n\nvoid customerMenuLihatIPhone(const string& userID);\nvoid customerMenuCariIPhone(const string& userID);\nvoid customerMenuSewa(const string& userID);\nvoid customerMenuReservasi(const string& userID);\nvoid customerMenuRiwayat(const string& userID);\nvoid customerMenuStatusReservasi(const string& userID);\n\nvoid adminManageIPhones();\nvoid adminManageUsers();\nvoid adminManageRentals();\nvoid adminManageReservations();\nvoid adminViewReports();\n\n#endif\n```\n\nWait, the menus for customer need the user's ID to filter their own data. Let me pass userID as parameter.\n\nNow let me think about the reports:\n1. Total pendapatan (from completed rentals)\n2. iPhone paling sering disewa\n3. Statistik penyewaan (total active, completed)\n4. Daftar reservasi\n5. Riwayat transaksi\n\nLet me write all the code now. I'll batch the file writes.\n\nActually, I realize I also need to handle the data relationship:\n- When returning an iPhone, check if there's a reservation queue for that iPhone\n- If there is, process the next reservation\n\nLet me now write all the code systematically. I'll create files in batches.\n\nLet me reconsider the CSV parsing. The format uses comma-separated values. I need to handle:\n- split by comma\n- trim whitespace from values\n- convert string to int/float/bool\n\nOne important note - when a value could contain commas (like names), I won't use quotes for simplicity, since the module doesn't teach advanced CSV parsing. Names in the context probably won't have commas.\n\nLet me now write everything. I'll start with the simpler utility files, then headers, then implementations, then main.\n\nActually, I should write all files that don't depend on others first, then proceed.\n\nLet me batch writes:\n\nBatch 1: xmake.lua, data files, csv_helper.h, utils.h\nBatch 2: user.h, iphone.h, rental.h, reservation.h, menu.h\nBatch 3: utils.cpp, csv_helper.cpp, validator.cpp\nBatch 4: user.cpp, iphone.cpp\nBatch 5: rental.cpp, reservation.cpp\nBatch 6: menu.cpp\nBatch 7: main.cpp\n\nLet me write the code now. I'll be careful to make it compile correctly.\n\nLet me also think about the admin login flow:\n1. Main menu → Login\n2. Enter username + password\n3. Read users.csv, find matching username/password\n4. Check role\n5. If admin → showAdminMenu()\n6. If customer → showCustomerMenu(userID)\n\nFor register:\n1. Main menu → Register\n2. Enter name, phone, username, password\n3. Check username uniqueness\n4. Create new user with id = USRxxx, role = customer, isVIP = false\n5. Save to CSV\n\nLet me think about ID generation:\n- Users: USR001, USR002, ...\n- iPhones: IP001, IP002, ...\n- Rentals: RNT001, RNT002, ...\n- Reservations: RSV001, RSV002, ...\n\nThe ID should be generated based on the current count + 1, formatted with leading zeros.\n\nOK, let me start writing code now. For real this time.\n\nActually, before I start writing all these files, let me think about a potential issue: the `loadUsers`, `loadIPhones`, etc. need to be called at program startup from `main()`. All the modules are in separate files. So `main.cpp` needs to call these load functions from each module.\n\nLet me also think about `using namespace std;` - the modules use this, so I'll use it in all files.\n\nOne more consideration: the menu.cpp will include all the headers. Since menu functions call into iphone, rental, reservation, user functions, it needs all their headers.\n\nLet me write the code now, starting with all files.\n\nSince this is a massive amount of code, let me write it carefully and make sure it compiles. Let me think about each function in detail.\n\nFor csv_helper.cpp:\n- splitCSVRow: splits a string by comma, returns vector of strings\n- trimString: removes leading/trailing whitespace\n- parseBoolean: converts \"true\"/\"false\" string to bool\n\nFor utils.cpp:\n- getCurrentDate: uses <ctime> to get current date in YYYY-MM-DD format\n- stringToInt, stringToFloat: using stringstream\n- intToString, floatToString: using stringstream\n- clearScreen: multiple newlines (portable)\n- pressEnter: cout + cin.get()\n\nFor validator.cpp:\n- validate input functions\n\nOK let me just start writing. I'll create all the files now.\n\nLet me think about how the reservation queue works with priority:\n\nWhen a reservation is made for an iPhone that's currently rented:\n1. Check if the iPhone exists and is rented\n2. Create a reservation record\n3. If the user is VIP, set priority to \"VIP\", else \"Regular\"\n4. When displaying reservations, sort by priority (VIP first) then by reservation date\n\nWhen an iPhone is returned:\n1. Check if there are any \"waiting\" reservations for that iPhone\n2. If yes, display the next reservation to admin\n3. The admin can choose to process it or not\n\nFor the \"queue\" behavior:\n- The reservations array maintains insertion order\n- VIP customers have higher priority\n- Among same priority, FIFO order is maintained\n\nI'll implement sorting using bubble sort (from Modul 5) on the reservations array.\n\nLet me now write ALL the code. I'll think through each function.\n\nActually, I realize I should keep the file writing to a minimum number of operations. Let me write each file completely in one go.\n\nLet me start with all the header files and utility files first.\n\nFor the CSV loading, I need to be careful:\n- File might not exist → create it\n- File might be empty → no data loaded\n- Each line is a CSV row\n- First line might be a header (or not, depending on how I implement)\n- I'll NOT use headers in the CSV files since the format is fixed\n\nActually, the format examples show headers, but for simplicity I'll skip headers and just store raw data. This makes the parsing simpler and is more in line with what the module teaches.\n\nWait, actually the examples show headers. Let me include headers for readability. When loading, I'll skip the first line.\n\nHmm, but then when saving I need to write the header too. Let me think...\n\nFor simplicity, let me NOT use CSV headers. The format is fixed and documented. This is simpler for the students to understand.\n\nActually wait, let me include headers since the requirement explicitly shows them. And they make the files more readable.\n\nOK, I'll include headers. When loading: skip first line (read and discard). When saving: write header first.\n\nLet me finalize and write all code now.\n\nOne more thing - for the rental flow:\n1. Customer selects an iPhone\n2. System checks if it's available\n3. Customer enters start date and duration\n4. System calculates total price\n5. System creates rental record with status \"active\"\n6. System updates iPhone status to \"rented\"\n\nFor return flow:\n1. Admin selects a rental\n2. System marks it as \"completed\"\n3. System updates iPhone status to \"available\"\n4. System checks if there are reservations for this iPhone\n\nFor reservation flow:\n1. Customer selects an iPhone they want (even if rented)\n2. Customer enters reservation details\n3. System creates reservation with priority based on customer's VIP status\n\nLet me now write all the code. I'll be comprehensive and make sure everything works.\n\nI'll write the files in this order:\n1. xmake.lua (update)\n2. data/*.csv (empty with headers)\n3. includes/csv_helper.h\n4. includes/utils.h\n5. includes/user.h\n6. includes/iphone.h\n7. includes/rental.h\n8. includes/reservation.h\n9. includes/menu.h\n10. utils/csv_helper.cpp\n11. utils/utils.cpp\n12. utils/validator.cpp\n13. modules/user.cpp\n14. modules/iphone.cpp\n15. modules/rental.cpp\n16. modules/reservation.cpp\n17. modules/menu.cpp\n18. main.cpp\n\nThat's 18 files. Let me write them all.\n\nLet me be very careful with the code to avoid compilation errors.\n\nFor xmake.lua, I need to include the new files:\n```lua\nadd_files(\"main.cpp\", \"modules/*.cpp\", \"utils/*.cpp\")\n```\n\nThis will automatically include all .cpp files in modules/ and utils/.\n\nLet me write everything now.",

              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/utils/csv_helper.cpp",
              "content": "#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n#include <sstream>\n\nvector<string> splitCSVRow(const string& row) {\n    vector<string> fields;\n    stringstream ss(row);\n    string field;\n\n    while (getline(ss, field, ',')) {\n        fields.push_back(trimString(field));\n    }\n\n    return fields;\n}\n\nstring trimString(const string& str) {\n    int start = 0;\n    int end = str.length() - 1;\n\n    while (start <= end && (str[start] == ' ' || str[start] == '\\r')) {\n        start++;\n    }\n\n    while (end >= start && (str[end] == ' ' || str[end] == '\\r')) {\n        end--;\n    }\n\n    return str.substr(start, end - start + 1);\n}\n\nbool parseBoolean(const string& str) {\n    string lower = \"\";\n    for (char c : str) {\n        lower += tolower(c);\n    }\n    return lower == \"true\";\n}\n"
            },
            "output": "Wrote file successfully.",

              "content": "#include \"utils.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <iomanip>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid clearScreen() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < 40; i++) {\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.ignore();\n    cin.get();\n}\n\nstring getCurrentDate() {\n    time_t t = time(nullptr);\n    struct tm* now = localtime(&t);\n    stringstream ss;\n    ss << (now->tm_year + 1900) << \"-\"\n       << setw(2) << setfill('0') << (now->tm_mon + 1) << \"-\"\n       << setw(2) << setfill('0') << now->tm_mday;\n    return ss.str();\n}\n\nint stringToInt(const string& str) {\n    stringstream ss(str);\n    int val = 0;\n    ss >> val;\n    return val;\n}\n\nfloat stringToFloat(const string& str) {\n    stringstream ss(str);\n    float val = 0;\n    ss >> val;\n    return val;\n}\n\nstring intToString(int val) {\n    stringstream ss;\n    ss << val;\n    return ss.str();\n}\n\nstring floatToString(float val) {\n    stringstream ss;\n    ss << fixed << setprecision(0) << val;\n    return ss.str();\n}\n\nstring formatID(const string& prefix, int num) {\n    stringstream ss;\n    ss << prefix;\n    ss << setw(3) << setfill('0') << num;\n    return ss.str();\n}\n"
            },
            "output": "Wrote file successfully.",
            "metadata": {
              "diagnostics": {},
              "filepath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/utils/utils.cpp",

        {
          "type": "tool",
          "tool": "write",
          "callID": "call_02_XuEGFeimth5l4n6FwId13173",

            "status": "completed",
