              "content": "#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool isValidPhoneNumber(const string& phone) {\n    if (phone.length() < 10 || phone.length() > 14) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (char c : phone) {\n        if (c < '0' || c > '9') {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    return true;\n}\n\nbool isValidDate(const string& date) {\n    if (date.length() != 10) {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    if (date[4] != '-' || date[7] != '-') {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\n        if (i == 4 || i == 7) continue;\n        if (date[i] < '0' || date[i] > '9') {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    int year = stringToInt(date.substr(0, 4));\n    int month = stringToInt(date.substr(5, 2));\n    int day = stringToInt(date.substr(8, 2));\n\n    if (month < 1 || month > 12) return false;\n    if (day < 1 || day > 31) return false;\n\n    return true;\n}\n\nint getValidInt(const string& prompt) {\n    int val;\n    string input;\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << prompt;\n        getline(cin, input);\n\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> val && ss.eof()) {\n            return val;\n        }\n\n        cout << \"Input harus berupa angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nfloat getValidFloat(const string& prompt) {\n    float val;\n    string input;\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << prompt;\n        getline(cin, input);\n\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> val && ss.eof()) {\n            return val;\n        }\n\n        cout << \"Input harus berupa angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nstring getValidString(const string& prompt) {\n    string input;\n    cout << prompt;\n    getline(cin, input);\n    return input;\n}\n\nint getMenuChoice(int min, int max) {\n    int choice;\n    string input;\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Pilih: \";\n        getline(cin, input);\n\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> choice && ss.eof() && choice >= min && choice <= max) {\n            return choice;\n        }\n\n        cout << \"Pilihan tidak valid! Masukkan \" << min << \"-\" << max << endl;\n    }\n}\n"
            },

              "content": "#include \"user.h\"\n#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n#include \"utils.h\"\n#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nUser daftarUser[MAX_USERS];\nint jumlahUser = 0;\n\nvoid loadUsers() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahUser = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n        jumlahUser++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid saveUsers() {\n    ofstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file users.csv!\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n\n    file << \"id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        file << daftarUser[i].id << \",\"\n             << daftarUser[i].name << \",\"\n             << daftarUser[i].phone << \",\"\n             << daftarUser[i].username << \",\"\n             << daftarUser[i].password << \",\"\n             << daftarUser[i].role << \",\"\n             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"true\" : \"false\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nint findUserByUsername(const string& username) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        if (daftarUser[i].username == username) {\n            return i;\n        }\n    }\n    return -1;\n}\n\nint findUserIndexByID(const string& id) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        if (daftarUser[i].id == id) {\n            return i;\n        }\n    }\n    return -1;\n}\n\nvoid login() {\n    string username, password;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"           LOGIN                 \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Masukkan username: \";\n    getline(cin, username);\n    cout << \"Masukkan password: \";\n    getline(cin, password);\n\n    int idx = findUserByUsername(username);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"Username tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    if (daftarUser[idx].password != password) {\n        cout << \"Password salah!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Selamat datang, \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"!\" << endl;\n\n    if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n        showAdminMenu();\n    } else {\n        showCustomerMenu(daftarUser[idx].id);\n    }\n}\n\nvoid registerUser() {\n    if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n        cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string name, phone, username, password;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"        REGISTER CUSTOMER        \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    cout << \"Nama: \";\n    getline(cin, name);\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n        getline(cin, phone);\n        if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Username: \";\n        getline(cin, username);\n        if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Password: \";\n    getline(cin, password);\n\n    int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n    string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = \"customer\";\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n    jumlahUser++;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"Registrasi berhasil! ID Anda: \" << id << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAllUsers() {\n    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA USER         \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"ID\\tNama\\t\\tHP\\t\\tRole\\tVIP\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        cout << daftarUser[i].id << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].name << \"\\t\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].phone << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].role << \"\\t\"\n             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"Ya\" : \"Tidak\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid deleteUser() {\n    string id;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID user yang akan dihapus: \";\n    getline(cin, id);\n\n    int idx = findUserIndexByID(id);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"User dengan ID \" << id << \" tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n        cout << \"Tidak bisa menghapus admin!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    for (int i = idx; i < jumlahUser - 1; i++) {\n        daftarUser[i] = daftarUser[i + 1];\n    }\n    jumlahUser--;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"User berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid setVIPStatus() {\n    string id;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID user: \";\n    getline(cin, id);\n\n    int idx = findUserIndexByID(id);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"User tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    if (daftarUser[idx].role != \"customer\") {\n        cout << \"Hanya customer yang bisa diubah status VIP!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    daftarUser[idx].isVIP = !daftarUser[idx].isVIP;\n    saveUsers();\n\n    cout << \"Status VIP user \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n         << \" sekarang: \" << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \"VIP\" : \"Reguler\") << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n"

              "content": "#include \"iphone.h\"\n#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n#include \"utils.h\"\n#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\niPhone daftarIPhone[MAX_IPHONES];\nint jumlahIPhone = 0;\n\nvoid loadIPhones() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahIPhone = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahIPhone < MAX_IPHONES) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = fields[0];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = fields[1];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = fields[2];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = stringToFloat(fields[3]);\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = fields[4];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = stringToInt(fields[5]);\n        jumlahIPhone++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid saveIPhones() {\n    ofstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file iphones.csv!\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n\n    file << \"id,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        file << daftarIPhone[i].id << \",\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].name << \",\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \",\"\n             << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \",\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].status << \",\"\n             << intToString(daftarIPhone[i].totalRented) << endl;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nint findiPhoneByID(const string& id) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].id == id) {\n            return i;\n        }\n    }\n    return -1;\n}\n\nvoid tambahIPhone() {\n    if (jumlahIPhone >= MAX_IPHONES) {\n        cout << \"Kapasitas iPhone penuh!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string name, storage;\n    float price;\n\n    cout << \"Nama iPhone: \";\n    getline(cin, name);\n    cout << \"Storage: \";\n    getline(cin, storage);\n    price = getValidFloat(\"Harga sewa per hari: \");\n\n    int newID = jumlahIPhone + 1;\n    string id = formatID(\"IP\", newID);\n\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = id;\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = name;\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = storage;\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = price;\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = \"available\";\n    daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = 0;\n    jumlahIPhone++;\n\n    saveIPhones();\n    cout << \"iPhone \" << name << \" berhasil ditambahkan dengan ID \" << id << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid editIPhone() {\n    string id;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang akan diedit: \";\n    getline(cin, id);\n\n    int idx = findiPhoneByID(id);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Edit iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << endl;\n    cout << \"Nama baru (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n    string name;\n    getline(cin, name);\n    if (name != \"\") {\n        daftarIPhone[idx].name = name;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Storage baru (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n    string storage;\n    getline(cin, storage);\n    if (storage != \"\") {\n        daftarIPhone[idx].storage = storage;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Harga sewa baru (0 jika tidak diubah): \";\n    string priceStr;\n    getline(cin, priceStr);\n    if (priceStr != \"0\" && priceStr != \"\") {\n        daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice = stringToFloat(priceStr);\n    }\n\n    saveIPhones();\n    cout << \"iPhone berhasil diedit!\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid hapusIPhone() {\n    string id;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang akan dihapus: \";\n    getline(cin, id);\n\n    int idx = findiPhoneByID(id);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \"? (y/n): \";\n    string confirm;\n    getline(cin, confirm);\n    if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n        cout << \"Penghapusan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    for (int i = idx; i < jumlahIPhone - 1; i++) {\n        daftarIPhone[i] = daftarIPhone[i + 1];\n    }\n    jumlahIPhone--;\n\n    saveIPhones();\n    cout << \"iPhone berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAllIPhones() {\n    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA iPhone        \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"ID\\tNama\\t\\tStorage\\tHarga\\tStatus\\tDisewa\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].name << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \"\\t\"\n             << intToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"\\t\"\n             << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].totalRented << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid searchIPhone() {\n    cout << \"Masukkan nama iPhone yang dicari: \";\n    string keyword;\n    getline(cin, keyword);\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       HASIL PENCARIAN           \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    bool found = false;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        string lowerName = \"\";\n        string lowerKeyword = \"\";\n        for (char c : daftarIPhone[i].name) lowerName += tolower(c);\n        for (char c : keyword) lowerKeyword += tolower(c);\n\n        if (lowerName.find(lowerKeyword) != string::npos) {\n            cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \" - \"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari - \"\n                 << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang cocok dengan \\\"\" << keyword << \"\\\"\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAvailableIPhones() {\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"    iPhone TERSEDIA              \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    bool found = false;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n            cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \" - \"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari\" << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n"

              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/rental.cpp",
              "content": "#include \"rental.h\"\n#include \"iphone.h\"\n#include \"user.h\"\n#include \"reservation.h\"\n#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n#include \"utils.h\"\n#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nRental daftarRental[MAX_RENTALS];\nint jumlahRental = 0;\n\nvoid loadRentals() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/rentals.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahRental = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahRental < MAX_RENTALS) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = fields[0];\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = fields[1];\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = fields[2];\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = fields[3];\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = stringToInt(fields[4]);\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = stringToFloat(fields[5]);\n        daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = fields[6];\n        jumlahRental++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid saveRentals() {\n    ofstream file(\"data/rentals.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file rentals.csv!\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n\n    file << \"rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        file << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \",\"\n             << daftarRental[i].userID << \",\"\n             << daftarRental[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n             << daftarRental[i].startDate << \",\"\n             << intToString(daftarRental[i].duration) << \",\"\n             << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \",\"\n             << daftarRental[i].status << endl;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid sewaIPhone(const string& userID) {\n    displayAvailableIPhones();\n\n    string iphoneID;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin disewa: \";\n    getline(cin, iphoneID);\n\n    int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    if (daftarIPhone[idx].status != \"available\") {\n        cout << \"Maaf, iPhone \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" sedang tidak tersedia.\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Anda bisa melakukan reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string startDate;\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Tanggal mulai sewa (YYYY-MM-DD): \";\n        getline(cin, startDate);\n        if (isValidDate(startDate)) break;\n        cout << \"Format tanggal salah! Gunakan YYYY-MM-DD\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int duration = getValidInt(\"Durasi sewa (hari): \");\n    if (duration < 1) {\n        cout << \"Durasi minimal 1 hari!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    float totalPrice = daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice * duration;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"RINCIAN SEWA:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" (\" << daftarIPhone[idx].storage << \")\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Durasi: \" << duration << \" hari\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Harga/hari: Rp\" << floatToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice) << endl;\n    cout << \"Total: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPrice) << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Konfirmasi sewa? (y/n): \";\n    string confirm;\n    getline(cin, confirm);\n    if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n        cout << \"Penyewaan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    int newID = jumlahRental + 1;\n    string rentalID = formatID(\"RNT\", newID);\n\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = rentalID;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = userID;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = startDate;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = duration;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = totalPrice;\n    daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = \"active\";\n    jumlahRental++;\n\n    daftarIPhone[idx].status = \"rented\";\n    daftarIPhone[idx].totalRented++;\n\n    saveRentals();\n    saveIPhones();\n\n    cout << \"Penyewaan berhasil! ID Rental: \" << rentalID << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid returnIPhone() {\n    string rentalID;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID Rental yang akan dikembalikan: \";\n    getline(cin, rentalID);\n\n    int idx = -1;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        if (daftarRental[i].rentalID == rentalID && daftarRental[i].status == \"active\") {\n            idx = i;\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"Rental tidak ditemukan atau sudah dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    daftarRental[idx].status = \"completed\";\n\n    int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n    if (phoneIdx != -1) {\n        daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].status = \"available\";\n    }\n\n    saveRentals();\n    saveIPhones();\n\n    cout << \"iPhone berhasil dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n\n    processReservations(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAllRentals() {\n    if (jumlahRental == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada transaksi penyewaan.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"     SEMUA TRANSAKSI SEWA        \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"ID\\tUser\\tiPhone\\tTgl\\tDurasi\\tTotal\\tStatus\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        cout << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarRental[i].userID << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarRental[i].iphoneID << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarRental[i].startDate << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarRental[i].duration << \"\\t\"\n             << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \"\\t\"\n             << (daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayUserRentals(const string& userID) {\n    bool found = false;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"     RIWAYAT SEWA ANDA           \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        if (daftarRental[i].userID == userID) {\n            int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[i].iphoneID);\n            string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n\n            cout << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \" - \"\n                 << phoneName << \" - \"\n                 << daftarRental[i].startDate << \" (\"\n                 << daftarRental[i].duration << \" hari) - Rp\"\n                 << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \" - \"\n                 << (daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\") << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Anda belum memiliki riwayat penyewaan.\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid generateReport() {\n    float totalPendapatan = 0;\n    int totalAktif = 0;\n    int totalSelesai = 0;\n    int maxRented = -1;\n    int maxRentedIdx = -1;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"         LAPORAN SEWA            \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        if (daftarRental[i].status == \"completed\") {\n            totalPendapatan += daftarRental[i].totalPrice;\n            totalSelesai++;\n        } else {\n            totalAktif++;\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].totalRented > maxRented) {\n            maxRented = daftarIPhone[i].totalRented;\n            maxRentedIdx = i;\n        }\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Total Pendapatan: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPendapatan) << endl;\n    cout << \"Total Transaksi: \" << jumlahRental << endl;\n    cout << \"  - Aktif: \" << totalAktif << endl;\n    cout << \"  - Selesai: \" << totalSelesai << endl;\n    cout << \"Total iPhone: \" << jumlahIPhone << endl;\n\n    if (maxRentedIdx != -1 && maxRented > 0) {\n        cout << \"iPhone Terpopuler: \" << daftarIPhone[maxRentedIdx].name\n             << \" (\" << maxRented << \" kali disewa)\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"iPhone Terpopuler: Belum ada data\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    float rataRata = jumlahRental > 0 ? totalPendapatan / jumlahRental : 0;\n    cout << \"Rata-rata per transaksi: Rp\" << floatToString(rataRata) << endl;\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n"
            },

              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/reservation.cpp",
              "content": "#include \"reservation.h\"\n#include \"iphone.h\"\n#include \"user.h\"\n#include \"csv_helper.h\"\n#include \"utils.h\"\n#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nReservation daftarReservasi[MAX_RESERVATIONS];\nint jumlahReservasi = 0;\n\nvoid loadReservations() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/reservations.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahReservasi = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahReservasi < MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = fields[0];\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = fields[1];\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = fields[2];\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = fields[3];\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = fields[4];\n        daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = fields[5];\n        jumlahReservasi++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid saveReservations() {\n    ofstream file(\"data/reservations.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file reservations.csv!\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n\n    file << \"reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n        file << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \",\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \",\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \",\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \",\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].status << endl;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}\n\nvoid sortReservationsByPriority() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n        for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n            int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n            int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n\n            if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n                Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n                daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n                daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nint findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n        if (daftarReservasi[i].reservationID == id) {\n            return i;\n        }\n    }\n    return -1;\n}\n\nvoid buatReservasi(const string& userID) {\n    if (jumlahReservasi >= MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n        cout << \"Maaf, antrean reservasi penuh!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    displayAllIPhones();\n\n    string iphoneID;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin direservasi: \";\n    getline(cin, iphoneID);\n\n    int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(userID);\n    string priority = \"Regular\";\n    if (userIdx != -1 && daftarUser[userIdx].isVIP) {\n        priority = \"VIP\";\n    }\n\n    int newID = jumlahReservasi + 1;\n    string resID = formatID(\"RSV\", newID);\n\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = resID;\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = userID;\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = getCurrentDate();\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = priority;\n    daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = \"waiting\";\n    jumlahReservasi++;\n\n    sortReservationsByPriority();\n    saveReservations();\n\n    cout << \"Reservasi berhasil! ID Reservasi: \" << resID << endl;\n    cout << \"Prioritas: \" << priority << endl;\n    cout << \"Anda akan mendapat notifikasi ketika iPhone tersedia.\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n    cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n\n    bool found = false;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n        if (daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID == iphoneID &&\n            daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") {\n            int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n            string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n\n            cout << \"Reservasi ditemukan:\" << endl;\n            cout << \"ID: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << endl;\n            cout << \"User: \" << userName << endl;\n            cout << \"Prioritas: \" << daftarReservasi[i].priority << endl;\n            cout << \"Tanggal: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << endl;\n            found = true;\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nvoid displayAllReservations() {\n    if (jumlahReservasi == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada reservasi.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    sortReservationsByPriority();\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       DAFTAR RESERVASI          \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"ID\\tUser\\tiPhone\\tTgl\\tPrioritas\\tStatus\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n        int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n        string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n        string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n\n        cout << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \"\\t\"\n             << phoneName << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \"\\t\\t\"\n             << statusText << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayUserReservations(const string& userID) {\n    bool found = false;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"     STATUS RESERVASI ANDA       \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n        if (daftarReservasi[i].userID == userID) {\n            int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n            string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n            string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n\n            cout << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \" - \"\n                 << phoneName << \" - \"\n                 << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \" - \"\n                 << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \" - \"\n                 << statusText << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Anda belum memiliki reservasi.\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}\n"
            },

          },

        },
        {
          "type": "tool",
          "tool": "write",
          "callID": "call_00_hkxpDJZwuxZg1FYNrALb4173",
          "state": {
            "status": "completed",
            "input": {
              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/menu.cpp",
              "content": "#include \"menu.h\"\n#include \"user.h\"\n#include \"iphone.h\"\n#include \"rental.h\"\n#include \"reservation.h\"\n#include \"validator.h\"\n#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid showMainMenu() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"   SISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE       \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Login\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Register Customer\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Keluar\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 3);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                login();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                registerUser();\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                cout << \"Terima kasih telah menggunakan sistem.\" << endl;\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 3);\n}\n\nvoid showCustomerMenu(const string& userID) {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"        MENU CUSTOMER            \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Lihat Daftar iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Cari iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Sewa iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4. Reservasi iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"5. Status Reservasi Saya\" << endl;\n        cout << \"6. Riwayat Penyewaan Saya\" << endl;\n        cout << \"7. Logout\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 7);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                customerLihatIPhone(userID);\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                customerCariIPhone(userID);\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                customerSewa(userID);\n                break;\n            case 4:\n                customerReservasi(userID);\n                break;\n            case 5:\n                customerStatusReservasi(userID);\n                break;\n            case 6:\n                customerRiwayat(userID);\n                break;\n            case 7:\n                cout << \"Logout berhasil.\" << endl;\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 7);\n}\n\nvoid showAdminMenu() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"         MENU ADMIN              \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Manajemen iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Manajemen User\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Manajemen Penyewaan\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4. Manajemen Reservasi\" << endl;\n        cout << \"5. Laporan\" << endl;\n        cout << \"6. Logout\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 6);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                adminManageIPhones();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                adminManageUsers();\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                adminManageRentals();\n                break;\n            case 4:\n                adminManageReservations();\n                break;\n            case 5:\n                adminViewReports();\n                break;\n            case 6:\n                cout << \"Logout berhasil.\" << endl;\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 6);\n}\n\nvoid customerLihatIPhone(const string& userID) {\n    displayAllIPhones();\n}\n\nvoid customerCariIPhone(const string& userID) {\n    searchIPhone();\n}\n\nvoid customerSewa(const string& userID) {\n    sewaIPhone(userID);\n}\n\nvoid customerReservasi(const string& userID) {\n    buatReservasi(userID);\n}\n\nvoid customerRiwayat(const string& userID) {\n    displayUserRentals(userID);\n}\n\nvoid customerStatusReservasi(const string& userID) {\n    displayUserReservations(userID);\n}\n\nvoid adminManageIPhones() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"     MANAJEMEN IPHONE            \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Tambah iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Edit iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Hapus iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4. Lihat Semua iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"5. Cari iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"6. Kembali\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 6);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                tambahIPhone();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                editIPhone();\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                hapusIPhone();\n                break;\n            case 4:\n                displayAllIPhones();\n                break;\n            case 5:\n                searchIPhone();\n                break;\n            case 6:\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 6);\n}\n\nvoid adminManageUsers() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"     MANAJEMEN USER              \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua User\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Hapus User\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Atur Status VIP\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4. Kembali\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 4);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                displayAllUsers();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                deleteUser();\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                setVIPStatus();\n                break;\n            case 4:\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 4);\n}\n\nvoid adminManageRentals() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"   MANAJEMEN PENYEWAAN           \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua Penyewaan\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Pengembalian iPhone\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Kembali\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 3);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                displayAllRentals();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                returnIPhone();\n                break;\n            case 3:\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 3);\n}\n\nvoid adminManageReservations() {\n    int pilihan;\n\n    do {\n        clearScreen();\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"   MANAJEMEN RESERVASI           \" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua Reservasi\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Kembali\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n        pilihan = getMenuChoice(1, 2);\n\n        switch (pilihan) {\n            case 1:\n                displayAllReservations();\n                break;\n            case 2:\n                break;\n        }\n    } while (pilihan != 2);\n}\n\nvoid adminViewReports() {\n    clearScreen();\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"         LAPORAN                 \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    generateReport();\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   DAFTAR RESERVASI (Laporan)    \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    displayAllReservations();\n}\n"
            },

              "diff": "Index: /home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/user.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- /home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/user.cpp\n+++ /home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/user.cpp\n@@ -13,17 +13,21 @@\n \n void loadUsers() {\n     ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n     if (!file.is_open()) {\n+        cerr << \"DEBUG: Cannot open data/users.csv\" << endl;\n         return;\n     }\n \n     string line;\n     getline(file, line);\n+    cerr << \"DEBUG: header = \" << line << endl;\n \n     jumlahUser = 0;\n     while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n+        cerr << \"DEBUG: line = \" << line << endl;\n         vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n+        cerr << \"DEBUG: fields.size = \" << fields.size() << endl;\n         if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n \n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n",

              "preview": "void loadUsers() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahUser = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];",

The input to the program is:\n```\n2\\n          <- choice 2\nBudi\\n       <- name\n08123456789\\n <- phone\nbudi\\n       <- username\nbudi123\\n    <- password\n1\\n          <- choice 1\nbudi\\n       <- login username\nbudi123\\n    <- login password\n5\\n          <- customer menu choice 5 (Status Reservasi)\n6\\n          <- customer menu choice 6 (Riwayat)\n7\\n          <- customer menu choice 7 (Logout)\n3\\n          <- main menu choice 3 (Keluar)\n```\n\nLooking at the output:\n- Register works: nama = Budi, phone = 08123456789, username = budi, password = budi123, ID = USR002 ✓\n- Then back to main menu with choices 1-3\n- But it says \"Pilihan tidak valid!\" 5 times for choice 1\n\nWait, I think the issue is that after the registration's `getline(cin, password)`, the remaining input starts with \"1\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n5\\n6\\n7\\n3\\n\". But the main menu's `getMenuChoice` reads \"Pilih: \" then `getline(cin, input)` reads \"1\" - wait, but 1 IS a valid choice between 1-3...\n\nUnless the previous `pressEnter()` call is interfering. Let me check - after registerUser, the code does:\n```cpp\nsaveUsers();\ncout << \"Registrasi berhasil! ID Anda: \" << id << endl;\npressEnter();\n```\n\nAnd `pressEnter()`:\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.ignore();\n    cin.get();\n}\n```\n\nWait! The `pressEnter()` function first does `cin.ignore()` then `cin.get()`. But the issue is that after `registerUser()` calls `getline(cin, password)`, there's nothing left on the line (getline consumes the newline). So when `pressEnter()` is called, `cin.ignore()` will ignore a character from the NEXT input \"1\\nbudi\\n...\", eating the \"1\". Then `cin.get()` will read \"\\n\".\n\nThen when main menu's `getMenuChoice` is called, it reads \"budi\" (the next thing in the buffer) as the menu choice, which is invalid.\n\nThis is a classic problem with `cin.ignore()` and mixed getline/input handling. The fix is to not use `pressEnter()` when running in a pipeline, or to fix `pressEnter()` to not consume actual input.\n\nActually, the issue is `cin.ignore()` in `pressEnter()`. It ignores one character without checking what it is. When there's piped input, it eats the first character of the next menu choice.\n\nThe fix: remove `cin.ignore()` from `pressEnter()`. The `pressEnter` should only wait for a keypress, not ignore anything. When there's piped input, there's no keypress to wait for anyway.\n\nActually, the `pressEnter()` function is for interactive use where the user sees the message and presses Enter. In non-interactive mode with piped input, the `cin.get()` will just read the next character from the pipe (which would be the newline from the last getline or the next input).\n\nLet me fix `pressEnter()` to just do `cin.get()` without `cin.ignore()`. But the problem is that in interactive mode, when the user types something and presses enter, there might be a leftover newline that needs to be consumed.\n\nThe real issue is mixing `getline()` with `cin.get()`. Since all my input uses `getline()`, there should be no leftover newlines. So `pressEnter()` should just be `cin.get()` to wait for Enter.\n\nLet me trace through more carefully:\n\n1. `registerUser()` reads password with `getline(cin, password)` - reads \"budi123\", consumes \"\\n\"\n2. `pressEnter()` is called\n3. `cout << \"Tekan Enter...\"` - prints\n4. `cin.ignore()` - ignores 1 char: '1' (from the pipe: \"1\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n5\\n6\\n7\\n3\\n\")\n5. `cin.get()` - reads 1 char: '\\n' (the newline after \"1\")\n6. Remaining in pipe: \"budi\\nbudi123\\n5\\n6\\n7\\n3\\n\"\n7. Back to showMainMenu() do-while loop\n8. `getMenuChoice(1,3)` → reads \"Pilih: \" → `getline(cin, input)` → reads \"budi\" → not a number → \"Pilihan tidak valid!\"\n9. \"Pilih: \" → `getline(cin, input)` → reads \"budi123\" → not a number → \"Pilihan tidak valid!\"\n10. etc.\n\nThe solution: Remove `cin.ignore()` from pressEnter. Just do `cin.get()`.\n\nWait, but the original purpose of `pressEnter` is:\n- In interactive mode: display message, wait for user to press Enter\n- The user types something (maybe nothing) and presses Enter\n\nIf we just do `cin.get()`, it will read one character. If the user just presses Enter, `cin.get()` reads '\\n'. That's fine.\n\nBut the issue is that between the last `getline` call and `pressEnter`, there might be a leftover newline in the input buffer. Let me check - `getline` reads up to and including the delimiter (newline), and the delimiter is extracted but not stored in the string. So after `getline`, the input buffer is clean.\n\nSo `pressEnter` should just be:\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.get();\n}\n```\n\nBut wait, in piped mode, `cin.get()` would consume the next available character, which might be part of the next input. The function is designed for interactive use where a human will press Enter.\n\nI think the best approach is to make `pressEnter` work differently in interactive vs piped mode, but that's too complex. Instead, I can restructure the program to not call `pressEnter()` after operations that return to a menu.\n\nActually, the simplest fix is: just remove `cin.ignore()` from pressEnter and only keep `cin.get()`. This way, in interactive mode, when the user types their last answer and presses Enter, getline consumes the Enter. Then cin.get() waits for another Enter press. In piped mode, cin.get() reads the next available character.\n\nBut there's still the problem that in piped mode, pressing Enter isn't meaningful. The program will just read whatever comes next.\n\nBetter approach: Make `pressEnter` just `cin.get()` without `cin.ignore()`. In piped mode, it reads the first char of the next line of input.\n\nActually, the simplest robust solution is to just remove all `pressEnter()` calls from functions that are called from menus, and handle \"press enter\" at the menu level only. But that changes the UX.\n\nEven simpler: just remove `cin.ignore()` from pressEnter. The problem was specifically `cin.ignore()` eating a character.\n\nActually wait, looking at my code, all my input uses `getline(cin, ...)`. After getline, there's no leftover newline. So `cin.ignore()` would incorrectly discard the next input character.\n\nLet me just remove `cin.ignore()` from pressEnter:",

Masukkan \" << min << \"-\" << max << endl;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nThis is a while loop. When called the first time, it reads \"2\", choice=2, returns 2.\n\nThen in showMainMenu:\n```cpp\nswitch (pilihan) {\n    case 2:\n        registerUser();\n        break;\n```\n\nregisterUser() is called. The first thing it does:\n```cpp\ncout << \"Nama: \";\ngetline(cin, name);\n```\n\nAt this point, the buffer has \"Budi\\n...\". getline should read \"Budi\".\n\nLet me check if there's something weird with the getline behavior. Actually, wait - the `getMenuChoice` function uses `getline(cin, input)`. If the user typed \"2\", then `getline` reads \"2\". But here's the thing - maybe `xmake run` is adding some output to stderr that's confusing things?\n\nLet me try running the binary directly with more controlled input.\n\nActually, let me try a simpler test - just use echo with proper quoting.\n\nHmm, let me try a different approach - pipe a carefully controlled input:",

The input is \"1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n6\\n3\":\n1. getMenuChoice(1,3) prints \"Pilih: \", getline reads \"1\", choice=1, returns 1\n2. login() is called\n3. login prints \"Masukkan username: \", getline reads \"admin\"\n4. login prints \"Masukkan password: \", getline reads \"admin123\"  \n5. login finds admin, calls showAdminMenu()\n6. showAdminMenu() is inside login(), when it returns, login() returns to showMainMenu()\n7. showMainMenu() continues the do-while loop\n8. clearScreen(), print menu, getMenuChoice(1,3)...\n9. But the remaining buffer is \"6\\n3\"\n10. getline reads \"6\" -> choice=6\n\nBut the output only shows \"Pilih: Terima kasih...\", which means getMenuChoice is called but \"6\" is not in range 1-3, so it should print \"Pilihan tidak valid!\". But it shows \"Terima kasih\" which is from case 3 (keluar) of the switch.\n\nHmm wait, looking at the output: \"Pilih: Terima kasih...\" - there's only ONE \"Pilih:\" shown. That means getMenuChoice returned something that made the switch go to case 3.\n\nActually, the thing is that `login()` calls `showAdminMenu()` which has its own loop. The admin chooses option 6 (Logout), which exits `showAdminMenu()`. Then `login()` returns. Back in `showMainMenu()`, the do-while loop continues with `pilihan` still being 1 (from the first iteration).\n\nWait no - `pilihan` is 1, and the switch case for 1 is `login()`. After `login()` returns, the switch ends. Then the while condition checks `pilihan != 3` - pilihan is still 1, so the loop continues. \n\nNext iteration: clearScreen(), print menu, getMenuChoice(1,3) reads \"6\" from the buffer. But \"6\" is not in range 1-3, so it prints \"Pilihan tidak valid!\" and loops again. \n\nHmm but the output doesn't show \"Pilihan tidak valid!\". Let me look at the output more carefully. The output is only 20 lines (from tail -20). Maybe the invalid messages are further up. Let me get more output.\n\nActually, let me look at the full output. The issue might be that the admin logged in, went to admin menu, chose logout (6), returned to main menu, and then the loop reads \"3\" from buffer for exit. \n\nLet me trace:\n- Input: \"1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n6\\n3\"\n- getMenuChoice reads \"1\" → login()\n  - login reads \"admin\" (username), \"admin123\" (password) → showAdminMenu()\n    - admin menu: clearScreen, print menu\n    - `pilihan = getMenuChoice(1,6)` reads \"6\" → case 6: logout\n    - returns to login() → returns to showMainMenu()\n- showMainMenu: pilihan == 1 still, continues loop\n- clearScreen, print menu\n- `pilihan = getMenuChoice(1,3)` reads \"3\" → case 3: keluar\n- while (3 != 3) → false, exits\n\nThat's it! The program works correctly. \"3\" is read as the choice for the second main menu iteration, which exits the program. The \"Pilih: Terima kasih...\" output is the second getMenuChoice call showing \"Pilih:\" and then the program shows \"Terima kasih...\".\n\nThe program is working correctly now! Let me test it more thoroughly with a different test case. Let me also delete users.csv to reset the data before full testing.\n\nActually, let me just clean up the data files first (remove the test user that was created) and run a comprehensive test.",

        {
          "snapshot": "fa4f5381e4dc7a48f77c9206c1d6c8f513908297",

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "The program is stuck in an infinite loop in `getMenuChoice` because the input buffer is empty and it keeps trying to read. This means `pressEnter()` consumed too much input.\n\nThe issue is clear: `pressEnter()` calls `getline(cin, dummy)` which reads a full line. But in the admin flow, after `displayAllIPhones()` calls `pressEnter()`, the next line in the buffer is \"6\" (for going back to admin menu). `pressEnter()` reads \"6\" and discards it! Then later `getMenuChoice` tries to read the next line which is \"6\" (logout), but \"6\" is not in range 1-3, so it gives an error and loops forever because there's no more input.\n\nThe fundamental problem is: `pressEnter()` shouldn't consume meaningful input.\n\nBetter approach: `pressEnter()` should not consume any input when there's piped input. Instead, it should only wait in interactive mode. But detecting interactive mode is complex.\n\nAnother approach: Remove all `pressEnter()` calls and use a different mechanism. But the user wants \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\"\n\nActually, the cleanest approach for a menu-driven program that works with both interactive and piped input: Don't use `pressEnter()` in functions that are called from menus. Instead, only use it in `showMainMenu`, `showCustomerMenu`, `showAdminMenu` after each action.\n\nWait, that would change the UX. Let me think differently.\n\nThe real issue is that `pressEnter()` is called after operations like `displayAllIPhones()`. In interactive mode, the user reads the output and presses Enter. In piped mode, there's no user to press Enter.\n\nFor piped mode, the program should just not wait. But there's no easy way to detect piped mode in a portable way.\n\nAlternative: Don't call `pressEnter()` at all. Instead, just use `cout << endl` and let the menu re-display. The output stays on screen and the menu is shown again.\n\nActually, the simplest fix: Remove `pressEnter()` from all display functions, and only use it in the main menu loop between iterations. Or better yet, don't use pressEnter at all - let the menu clear screen and redisplay.\n\nHmm, but the users want \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\" after showing data. Without it, the data would scroll away due to clearScreen.\n\nOK, let me take a different approach. Instead of `pressEnter`, let me just not call `clearScreen()` before showing the menu. That way the last output stays visible, and the user sees the menu below it.\n\nActually no. Let me just change `pressEnter()` to only call `cin.get()` and not `getline(cin, dummy)`. The `cin.get()` reads one character. In interactive mode, the user presses Enter (which sends '\\n'), and `cin.get()` reads '\\n'. In piped mode, `cin.get()` reads the next character from the pipe.\n\nBut wait, that was my original approach and it read the first char of the next menu choice!\n\nOK here's the issue: In interactive mode:\n1. User sees output\n2. User presses Enter\n3. Enter sends '\\n' to the buffer\n4. cin.get() reads '\\n'  \n5. Buffer is empty\n6. Next getline in getMenuChoice waits for user input\n\nIn piped mode:\n1. Output is displayed\n2. No user to press Enter\n3. cin.get() reads the next character from the pipe (which is \"1\" or \"6\" etc.)\n4. That character is CONSUMED and lost\n5. Next getline in getMenuChoice reads a partial line\n\nThe problem is fundamental: `pressEnter()` waits for interactive user input. In piped mode, there's no interactive user.\n\nSolutions:\n1. Remove all pressEnter calls - the simplest\n2. Use some kind of delay - unreliable\n3. Only use pressEnter in interactive mode by checking isatty()\n\nLet me go with solution 1 for simplicity: remove pressEnter() from all display/report functions and only use it in the main menu flow.\n\nActually wait, let me think about this more carefully. The `pressEnter` is important for UX in interactive mode. Without it, data flashes by and the user can't read it. \n\nWhat if `pressEnter` checks if stdin is a terminal?\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    #ifdef _WIN32\n    // Windows doesn't have isatty easily\n    #else\n    if (isatty(fileno(stdin))) {\n        cin.get();\n    }\n    #endif\n}\n```\n\nBut this requires `#include <unistd.h>` on Linux. And the pipe EOF case...\n\nActually, in piped mode, the program will get EOF when the pipe closes. So `cin.get()` would return EOF. And `getline` would fail. I could check for this.\n\nLet me take a simpler approach: make `pressEnter` try to read a line, but if cin.eof() or cin.fail(), just continue.\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    string dummy;\n    getline(cin, dummy);\n    if (cin.eof() || cin.fail()) {\n        cin.clear();\n    }\n}\n```\n\nBut this still consumes a full line from the pipe!\n\nOK, the simplest and most robust solution: just don't call pressEnter from functions that are called in a menu chain. Instead, make it optional - only call it from the main menu loop.\n\nBut that changes the code significantly. Let me just make pressEnter a no-op when there's no input available.\n\nActually, the ABSOLUTE simplest fix: Just make `pressEnter` NOT consume any input by using `cin.rdbuf()->in_avail()` to check if there's pending input:\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n}\n```\n\nWait no, that would wait for input (and newline) if there's nothing in the buffer.\n\nOK, let me just try the most aggressive approach: make all the `pressEnter()` calls non-blocking in piped mode by clearing cin state when EOF is encountered.\n\nActually, let me try a much simpler approach: just don't use pressEnter at all. Remove it from all functions. The program will just redisplay the menu immediately after showing data. The data output will still be visible (scrolled up) in the terminal. This is actually how most CLI menus work.\n\nTo compensate, I'll remove the clearScreen() calls from the menu loops, making the output stay visible. Or I'll just clear screen at the very beginning and then let output accumulate.\n\nActually wait, I think the cleanest UX fix that works for both interactive and piped mode is:\n\nIn functions like displayAllIPhones(), instead of calling pressEnter(), just print a message and DON'T wait. The user can see the data, and when they make their next menu choice, the screen clears and the menu appears again.\n\nLet me just remove all pressEnter() calls from all functions. That's the cleanest fix.",

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "There are many pressEnter calls. The cleanest solution is to make `pressEnter()` check if there's input available before trying to read. Or better yet, make it work with both modes.\n\nActually, let me think about this differently. The issue with piped input is that `cin.get()` in pressEnter consumes a character from the pipe. But what if I use `cin.rdbuf()->in_avail()` to check if there's pending input? If there is, it means we're in a pipe and I should NOT wait. If there isn't, it means we're in interactive mode and I should wait.\n\n`cin.rdbuf()->in_avail()` returns the number of characters available in the input buffer. In interactive mode, it's 0 until the user types. In piped mode, it may be > 0.\n\nBut this isn't perfect - in piped mode, the OS might not have buffered all input yet.\n\nThe most robust approach: make pressEnter a no-op. Just remove it from everywhere.\n\nLet me rewrite `pressEnter()` to be a simple no-op, and change all the call sites to just print a newline:",

            "input": {
              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/utils/utils.cpp",
              "oldString": "void pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    string dummy;\n    getline(cin, dummy);\n}",
              "newString": "void pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl;\n    cout << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.get();\n    if (cin.peek() == '\\n') {\n        cin.get();\n    }\n}"
            },

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Wait, `cin.peek()` without checking for EOF could be problematic. And peeking at the input doesn't help because cin.peek() in interactive mode would BLOCK waiting for input.\n\nLet me just use the simplest approach. Since getline() is used everywhere, after the last getline, the input buffer is clean (newline consumed). Then `cin.get()` in pressEnter will wait for the Enter key in interactive mode, but will read the next character from the pipe in piped mode.\n\nThe problem is that in piped mode, this \"next character\" is meaningful data for the menu.\n\nOK I'll try a completely different approach. Let me just get rid of `pressEnter()` entirely and replace it with a simple message print (no input wait).",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779162144696,
            "end": 1779162147590
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e53dfb800161xds2l2ccNzsQ",

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Now pressEnter is a no-op that just prints a newline. This means after displaying data, the program won't wait for user input - it'll just go back to the menu immediately. In interactive mode, the user would see the data flash by and then the menu reappears.\n\nFor a better interactive experience, I should also remove the clearScreen() from the menu loops so data stays visible. But let me just test it first to make sure piped input works.\n\nActually, let me think about this UX issue. Without pressEnter waiting, in interactive mode:\n1. User selects \"Lihat Semua iPhone\"\n2. iPhone list is displayed\n3. Immediately (without waiting), the menu clears and redisplayed\n4. The user can barely see the list\n\nWith pressEnter waiting in interactive mode:\n1. User selects \"Lihat Semua iPhone\"\n2. iPhone list is displayed\n3. \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\"\n4. User reads the list, presses Enter\n5. Menu is shown\n\nThe interactive mode experience is worse without pressEnter. But the piped mode requires no input blocking.\n\nA compromise: make pressEnter use a simple `cin.get()` which will read '\\n' when the user presses Enter in interactive mode. In piped mode, the input is carefully orchestrated so that after each display, there's a '\\n' in the pipe that pressEnter should consume.\n\nActually this is getting too complex. Let me just leave pressEnter as a no-op for now, and focus on making sure the program compiles and is correct. The interactive UX can be improved later.\n\nLet me compile and test.",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779162151155,
            "end": 1779162156885
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e53f8f3001DP85Vy50WuSh0s",
          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",

Logout\" isn't from the main menu (which only has 1-3), it's from the customer menu which has 7 options. So the customer menu IS being shown.\n\nLet me check: The input was \"2\\nBudi\\n08123456789\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n1\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n7\\n3\\n\"\n\nLooking at the output:\n1. Login: username=\"budi\", password=\"budi123\"\n6. Customer menu: Pilih: (reads \"7\") -> Logout\n7. Main menu: Pilih: (reads \"3\") -> Keluar\n\nBut wait - why did all the register prompts show on one line? This happened because clearScreen() outputs 40 newlines and then the prompts follow. With piped input, the newlines from clearScreen() go to stdout but the getline calls read from stdin (the pipe) and don't wait - they read the next available line from the pipe immediately.\n\nSo the behavior is:\n- clearScreen() outputs 40 blank lines\n- \"Nama: \" is printed\n- getline(cin, name) reads \"Budi\" from pipe immediately\n- \"Nomor HP: \" is printed  \n- getline(cin, phone) reads \"08123456789\" from pipe immediately\n- etc.\n\nAll of this happens very fast, so the output interleaves. But the actual data reading is correct!\n\nThen for the login, after \"LOGIN\" header:\n- \"Masukkan username: \" printed\n- getline reads \"budi\"\n- \"Masukkan password: \" printed\n- getline reads \"budi123\"\n- Welcome message\n- showCustomerMenu() is called\n\nThen customer menu:\n- getMenuChoice(1,7): \"Pilih: \" printed, getline reads \"7\"\n- case 7: logout\n- Back to main menu\n- getMenuChoice(1,3): \"Pilih: \" printed, getline reads \"3\"\n- case 3: exit\n\nWait, but the output shows the register form with all prompts on one line, which suggests the program has already read the input and processed it before printing all the prompts. That's not quite right - the output is being buffered, stdout and the program's output are going to the same place (the terminal via xmake run), so the interleaving is just a display issue in piped mode.\n\nActually, the issue is that cout is buffered, and writing to cout's buffer before reading from cin causes the prompts to not flush until the buffer is full. I should add `cout.flush()` or use `endl` (which flushes) after each prompt.\n\nLet me check - I DO use `endl` in `getValidString`, `getValidInt`, `getValidFloat`, and `getMenuChoice`. But in `registerUser`, I use `cout << \"Nama: \";` without endl and without flush. So the prompt might not appear before getline reads.\n\nBut wait, cout and cin are tied by default (`cin.tie(&cout)`), which means reading from cin automatically flushes cout. So the prompt should appear before the read.\n\nLet me not worry about this for now. The output ordering issue is cosmetic and only happens in piped mode. What matters is that the program logic works correctly.\n\nLet me now test the customer rental flow. I need to provide input for:\n1. Login\n2. View iPhones (option 1)\n3. Rent iPhone (option 3)\n4. Check if available\n4. \"Tanggal mulai sewa (YYYY-MM-DD): \" - getline reads date\n5. \"Durasi sewa (hari): \" - getValidInt reads duration\n6. Confirmation: \"Konfirmasi sewa? (y/n): \" - getline reads confirm\n7. process\n8. pressEnter (now a no-op)\n9. Back to customer menu\n\nLet me try this with proper input:\n\"1\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n3\\nIP001\\n2026-05-20\\n3\\ny\\n7\\n3\\n\"\n\nWait, but there's the issue with pressEnter.         {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "The issue is still the `pressEnter()` consumption. After `returnIPhone()` calls `pressEnter()`, it reads and discards \"5\" from the pipe. Then the admin menu loop's `getMenuChoice` tries to read \"6\" but keeps getting invalid choices because the pipeline input has been consumed inconsistently.\n\nThe fundamental issue: with no-op pressEnter, the program doesn't wait for user input, but the test script expects it to consume some input. With the old `getline(cin, dummy)` approach, pressEnter consumes a full line from the pipe.\n\nActually, the issue is simpler than I thought. The admin flow is:\n1. Admin menu: getMenuChoice reads \"3\" -> adminManageRentals()\n2. Rental menu: getMenuChoice reads \"2\" -> returnIPhone()\n3. returnIPhone: reads \"RNT001\", processes return, calls pressEnter()\n4. Back in rental menu: getMenuChoice reads... what's next in the pipe?\n\nAfter reading \"RNT001\", the remaining buffer is \"5\\n6\\n3\\n\".\npressEnter (no-op) doesn't consume anything.\ngetMenuChoice reads \"5\" -> but wait, \"5\" is not in the rental menu options (1-3)!\n\"Pilihan tidak valid!\"\n\nAnd then it loops forever because the remaining \"6\\n3\\n\" are also not valid for options 1-3.\n\nThe issue is that pressEnter is necessary to consume the \"5\" that was meant to be part of the flow. Without pressEnter consuming it, the program reads it as a menu choice.\n\nI need to make pressEnter work properly. Let me think about this again.\n\nThe problem is between interactive and piped mode. In interactive mode, pressEnter should wait for the user. In piped mode, it needs to work with the pipe.\n\nBest approach: make pressEnter do a non-blocking check. If there's input available in the buffer, DON'T wait. If there isn't, DO wait.\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    // Check if stdin has pending data (piped mode)\n    // If not, wait for Enter (interactive mode)\n    cin.peek(); // This might block...\n}\n```\n\nActually, there's a simpler way: check `cin.rdbuf()->in_avail()`. But this isn't reliable for piped input.\n\nAlternative: just let pressEnter ALWAYS read a line (consume one line from the pipe in piped mode), and for interactive mode, the user presses Enter.\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\";\n    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n}\n```\n\nThis will:\n- In interactive mode: wait for user to type something and press Enter, then ignore it\n- In piped mode: ignore one line from the pipe\n\nThis is what the original `getline(cin, dummy)` approach did, but using `cin.ignore` is cleaner.\n\nThe key insight is: in piped mode, the input after each operation should include a blank line (just \"\\n\") that pressEnter consumes. That way pressEnter consumes the blank line and the next menu choice is the next line.\n\nSo for the test:\n\"1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n3\\n2\\nRNT001\\n\\n5\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nWhere \"\\n\" (empty line) is for pressEnter to consume. Let me try this approach.\n\nActually, `cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n')` ignores until it finds a newline. In interactive mode, it waits for the user to type anything (even just Enter). In piped mode, it reads and discards the rest of the current line... wait no, it reads until it finds a newline. If the buffer has \"\\n5\\n...\", it reads \"\\n\" (the delimiter itself, which is also extracted), then stops.\n\nHmm, but in our case, after `getline` reads the rental ID \"RNT001\", the buffer has \"\\n5\\n6\\n3\\n\". `cin.ignore(...)` would read \"\\n\" (the delimiter, which is the first character), and stop. Then the remaining buffer is \"5\\n6\\n3\\n\". Then getMenuChoice reads \"5\", which is invalid.\n\nWait, I need to re-examine. After `getline(cin, rentalID)` reads \"RNT001\", the newline after \"RNT001\" IS consumed by getline. So the buffer starts with \"5\\n6\\n3\\n\" directly. `cin.ignore(...)` would read \"5\\n\" (ignoring until newline), leaving \"6\\n3\\n\". Then getMenuChoice reads \"6\", which is out of range for the rental menu (1-3), giving \"Pilihan tidak valid!\".\n\nThe whole problem is that my test inputs don't have the pressEnter lines built in. I need to add them.\n\nLet me redesign the test input to include blank lines for pressEnter to consume:\n\nFor the flow:\n1. Login as admin  \n2. Choose rental management (3)\n3. Choose return iPhone (2)\n4. Enter rental ID (RNT001)\n5. pressEnter consumes a blank line\n6. Press any key in rental menu to go back (3)\n7. Choose reports (5)\n8. pressEnter in generateReport consumes a blank line\n9. pressEnter in displayAllReservations consumes a blank line\n10. Logout (6)\n11. Exit (3)\n\nInput: \"1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n3\\n2\\nRNT001\\n\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nWhere \"\\n\\n\" after \"RNT001\" is: newline for getline after reading, then another newline for pressEnter.\n\nWait, getline already consumed the newline after \"RNT001\". So the buffer after reading \"RNT001\" is \"\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\" (if we add needed blank lines in the input).\n\nSo the original input should be: \"1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n3\\n2\\nRNT001\\n\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nLet me trace:\n1. Admin menu: getline reads \"3\" -> adminManageRentals\n2. Rental menu: getline reads \"2\" -> returnIPhone\n3. returnIPhone: getline reads \"RNT001\" -> remaining: \"\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n4. pressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> remaining: \"3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n5. Rental menu: getline reads \"3\" -> break (kembali) -> back to admin menu\n6. Admin menu: getline reads \"5\" -> adminViewReports\n7. generateReport: remaining: \"\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n8. generateReport calls pressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> remaining: \"\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n9. adminViewReports calls displayAllReservations\n10. displayAllReservations calls pressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> remaining: \"6\\n3\\n\"\n11. Back in admin menu: getline reads \"6\" -> logout\n12. Main menu: getline reads \"3\" -> exit\n\nThis should work! Let me implement it.\n\nActually wait - after returnIPhone processes the return and displays the message, it calls processReservations which also has its own output. And then pressEnter. So there shouldn't be another pressEnter inside returnIPhone - wait, there IS a pressEnter at the end of returnIPhone.\n\nLet me check returnIPhone:\n```cpp\nvoid returnIPhone() {\n    ...\n    cout << \"iPhone berhasil dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n    processReservations(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n    pressEnter();\n}\n```\n\nAnd processReservations:\n```cpp\nvoid processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n    cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n    ...\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nSo the flow after reading \"RNT001\" in returnIPhone:\n1. `daftarRental[idx].status = \"completed\"`\n2. Update iPhone status to available\n3. saveRentals, saveIPhones\n4. \"iPhone berhasil dikembalikan!\"\n5. processReservations: checks reservations (none in this test)\n6. pressEnter: needs to consume a line from pipe\n\nOK, let me use `cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n')` for pressEnter and add extra newlines in the test input.",
