          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Now let me run a comprehensive end-to-end test:\n\nFlow:\n1. Register customer Budi\n2. Login as Budi\n3. View iPhones (option 1)\n4. Rent iPhone IP001 (option 3) - enter date, duration, confirm\n5. View rental history (option 6)\n6. Logout (option 7)\n7. Login as admin\n8. View rentals (option 3 -> 1)\n9. Return iPhone (option 3 -> 2) - enter RNT001\n10. View reports (option 5)\n11. Logout (option 6)\n12. Exit (option 3)\n\nEach pressEnter needs an extra newline. Let me plan carefully.\n\nInput: \n\"2\\n\"                            <- register\n\"Budi\\n\"                         <- name\n\"08123456789\\n\"                  <- phone\n\"budi\\n\"                         <- username\n\"budi123\\n\"                      <- password\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter\n\"1\\n\"                            <- login\n\"budi\\n\"                         <- username\n\"budi123\\n\"                      <- password\n\"3\\n\"                            <- customer menu: sewa\n\"IP001\\n\"                        <- iPhone ID\n\"2026-05-20\\n\"                   <- date\n\"3\\n\"                            <- duration\n\"y\\n\"                            <- confirm\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in sewaIPhone)\n\"6\\n\"                            <- customer menu: riwayat\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in displayUserRentals)  \n\"7\\n\"                            <- customer menu: logout\n\"1\\n\"                            <- main menu: login\n\"admin\\n\"                        <- admin username\n\"admin123\\n\"                     <- admin password\n\"3\\n\"                            <- admin menu: manajemen penyewaan\n\"1\\n\"                            <- rental menu: lihat semua\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in displayAllRentals)\n\"2\\n\"                            <- rental menu: pengembalian\n\"RNT001\\n\"                       <- rental ID\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in returnIPhone)\n\"3\\n\"                            <- rental menu: kembali\n\"5\\n\"                            <- admin menu: laporan\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in generateReport)\n\"\\n\"                             <- pressEnter (in displayAllReservations)\n\"6\\n\"                            <- admin menu: logout\n\"3\\n\"                            <- main menu: keluar\n\nWait, let me check... In the admin flow, after step \"3\" (manajemen penyewaan), the submenu shows:\n1. Lihat Semua Penyewaan\n2. Pengembalian iPhone\n3. Kembali\n\nThen option 1 displays, pressEnter consumes a line.\nThen option 2 processes return, pressEnter consumes a line.\nThen option 3 goes back to admin menu.\n\nAfter reading \"RNT001\", pressEnter consumes the next line.\n\nLet me trace more carefully:\nAfter reading \"RNT001\\n\" with getline: buffer has \"\\n\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\npressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> buffer: \"\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nWait, that's not right. Let me think about what happens after reading \"RNT001\".\n\ngetline(cin, rentalID) where input is \"RNT001\\n\\n3\\n...\" reads \"RNT001\" and consumes the \"\\n\" after it. Buffer: \"\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\npressEnter: cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n') reads until it finds '\\n'. The first character is '\\n', so it reads '\\n' and stops. Buffer: \"3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nRental menu loop: getline reads \"3\" -> case 3: break. Buffer: \"5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nAdmin menu loop: getline reads \"5\" -> adminViewReports. Buffer: \"\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nadminViewReports calls generateReport():\n  generateReport displays, calls pressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> Buffer: \"\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n  Then adminViewReports calls displayAllReservations():\n    displayAllReservations displays, calls pressEnter: cin.ignore reads \"\\n\" -> Buffer: \"6\\n3\\n\"\n  Back in admin menu: getline reads \"6\" -> logout. Buffer: \"3\\n\"\n  Main menu: getline reads \"3\" -> exit.\n\nThis should work! Let me compute the full input string.\n\nActually, there's one more thing. When `returnIPhone` is called, after the `getline(cin, rentalID)`, the function does the processing, then calls `pressEnter()`. So between the rental ID input and the pressEnter, there's no additional getline for confirmation (unlike in sewaIPhone).\n\nSo the input for the return flow should be:\n\"3\\n2\\nRNT001\\n\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nWhere:\n- 3 = adminManageRentals\n- 2 = returnIPhone\n- RNT001 = rental ID\n- \\n = pressEnter consumes this\n- 3 = kembali\n- 5 = adminViewReports\n- \\n = pressEnter in generateReport\n- \\n = pressEnter in displayAllReservations\n- 6 = logout\n- 3 = exit\n\nLet me build the full test string and run it.\n\nActually wait - I also need to check if there are pressEnter calls in other places in the customer flow.\n\nIn `sewaIPhone()`:\n- Read iPhone ID\n- Read date\n- Read duration (getValidInt)\n- Display confirmation\n- Read confirm\n- Process\n- pressEnter()\n\nSo after \"y\\n\" (confirm), pressEnter needs \"\\n\".\n\nIn `displayUserRentals()`:\n- Display rentals\n- pressEnter()\n\nSo after option \"6\\n\", pressEnter needs \"\\n\".\n\nLet me compile the full test input:\n\nFull input (lines):\n```\n2                               <- register\nBudi                            <- name\n08123456789                     <- phone  \nbudi                            <- username\nbudi123                         <- password\n                                <- pressEnter\n1                               <- login\nbudi                            <- username\nbudi123                         <- password\n3                               <- sewa\nIP001                           <- iPhone ID\n2026-05-20                      <- date\n3                               <- duration\ny                               <- confirm\n                                <- pressEnter (sewaIPhone)\n6                               <- riwayat\n                                <- pressEnter (displayUserRentals)\n7                               <- logout\n1                               <- login\nadmin                           <- username\nadmin123                        <- password\n3                               <- rental management\n1                               <- view all rentals\n                                <- pressEnter (displayAllRentals)\n2                               <- return\nRNT001                          <- rental ID\n                                <- pressEnter (returnIPhone)\n3                               <- back\n5                               <- reports\n                                <- pressEnter (generateReport)\n                                <- pressEnter (displayAllReservations)\n6                               <- logout\n3                               <- exit\n```\n\nSo the input as a single string: \"2\\nBudi\\n08123456789\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n\\n1\\nbudi\\nbudi123\\n3\\nIP001\\n2026-05-20\\n3\\ny\\n\\n6\\n\\n7\\n1\\nadmin\\nadmin123\\n3\\n1\\n\\n2\\nRNT001\\n\\n3\\n5\\n\\n\\n6\\n3\\n\"\n\nLet me count the expected menu choices:\n- 2 (register), then at main menu again: 1 (login) → customer menu\n- 3 (sewa), then back in customer menu: 6 (riwayat), then back: 7 (logout)\n- 1 (login as admin), then admin menu: 3 (rentals)\n- 1 (view all), then back in rental submenu: 2 (return)\n- then 3 (back to admin), then 5 (reports)\n- then 6 (logout), then 3 (exit)\n\nLet me try this.",

sourcecode and configuration.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       doxygen  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mGenerate the doxygen document.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       format   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mFormat the current project.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    l, lua      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRun the lua script.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    m, macro    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRun the given macro.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       pack     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPack binary installation packages.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       plugin   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mManage plugins of xmake.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       project  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mGenerate the project file.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       repo     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mManage package repositories.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       show     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mShow the given project information.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       watch    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mWatch the project directories and run command.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0;1mCommon options:\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -q, --quiet                  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mQuiet operation.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -y, --yes                    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mInput yes by default if need user confirm.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --confirm=CONFIRM        \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mInput the given result if need user confirm.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - yes\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - no\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - def\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -v, --verbose                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint lots of verbose information for users.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --root                   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mAllow to run xmake as root.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -D, --diagnosis              \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint lots of diagnosis information (backtrace, check info ..) only for developers.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mAnd we can append -v to get more whole information.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    e.g. $ xmake -vD\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -h, --help                   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint this help message and exit.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -F FILE, --file=FILE         \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRead a given xmake.lua file.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -P PROJECT, --project=PROJECT\u001b[0m    \u001b[0mChange to the given project directory.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSearch priority:\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    1. The Given Command Argument\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    2. The Envirnoment Variable: XMAKE_PROJECT_DIR\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    3. The Current Directory\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0;1mCommand options (build):\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --version                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint the version number and exit.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -b, --build                  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild target. This is default building mode and optional.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -r, --rebuild                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRebuild the target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -a, --all                    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild all targets.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --shallow                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mOnly re-build the given targets without dependencies.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -g GROUP, --group=GROUP      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild all targets of the given group. It support path pattern matching.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0me.g.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake -g test\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake -g test_*\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake --group=benchmark/*\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --dry-run                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mDry run to build target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -j JOBS, --jobs=JOBS         \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSet the number of parallel compilation jobs.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m (default: \u001b[1m18\u001b[0m)\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --linkjobs=LINKJOBS      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSet the number of parallel link jobs.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -w, --warning                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mEnable the warnings output. (deprecated)\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --linkonly               \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mOnly link targets if object files have been compiled.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --files=FILES            \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild the given source files.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0me.g. \u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    - xmake --files=src/main.c\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    - xmake --files='src/*.c' [target]\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    - xmake --files='src/**.c|excluded_file.c'\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    - xmake --files='src/main.c:src/test.c'\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m          target                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mThe target name. It will build all default targets if this parameter is not specified.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - app\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[1;38;2;255;0;0;1merror: \u001b[0mInvalid option: -c \u001b[0m\n",

╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n  ║ \u001b[1;38;2;255;255;0mA new version of xmake is available!\u001b[0m                                       ║\n  ║                                                                            ║\n  ║ To update to the latest version \u001b[1mv3.0.9\u001b[0m, run \"xmake update\".                ║\n  ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\u001b[0m\n\n\u001b[0m\u001b[1mUsage: $\u001b[0;38;2;0;255;255mxmake [task] [options] [target]\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\n\u001b[0mBuild targets if no given tasks.\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m\u001b[0;1mActions:\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    b, build    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild targets if no given tasks.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    c, clean    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRemove all binary and temporary files.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    f, config   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mConfigure the project.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       create   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mCreate a new project.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    g, global   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mConfigure the global options for xmake.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    i, install  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPackage and install the target binary files.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    p, package  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPackage target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    q, require  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mInstall and update required packages.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    r, run      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRun the project target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       service  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mStart service for remote or distributed compilation and etc.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       test     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRun the project tests.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m    u, uninstall\u001b[0m    \u001b[0mUninstall the project binary files.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       update   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mUpdate and uninstall the xmake packages.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       plugin   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mManage plugins of xmake.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       project  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mGenerate the project file.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       repo     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mManage package repositories.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       show     \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mShow the given project information.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;255;0;255m       watch    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mWatch the project directories and run command.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0;1mCommon options:\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -q, --quiet                  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mQuiet operation.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -y, --yes                    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mInput yes by default if need user confirm.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --confirm=CONFIRM        \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mInput the given result if need user confirm.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - yes\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - no\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m        - def\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -v, --verbose                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint lots of verbose information for users.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --root                   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mAllow to run xmake as root.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -D, --diagnosis              \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint lots of diagnosis information (backtrace, check info ..) only for developers.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mAnd we can append -v to get more whole information.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    e.g. $ xmake -vD\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -h, --help                   \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint this help message and exit.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -F FILE, --file=FILE         \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRead a given xmake.lua file.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -P PROJECT, --project=PROJECT\u001b[0m    \u001b[0mChange to the given project directory.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSearch priority:\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    1. The Current Directory\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0;1mCommand options (build):\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --version                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mPrint the version number and exit.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -b, --build                  \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild target. This is default building mode and optional.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -r, --rebuild                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mRebuild the target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -a, --all                    \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild all targets.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --shallow                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mOnly re-build the given targets without dependencies.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -g GROUP, --group=GROUP      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mBuild all targets of the given group. It support path pattern matching.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0me.g.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake -g test\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake -g test_*\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m                                 \u001b[0m    \u001b[0m    xmake --group=benchmark/*\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --dry-run                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mDry run to build target.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -j JOBS, --jobs=JOBS         \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSet the number of parallel compilation jobs.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m (default: \u001b[1m18\u001b[0m)\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m        --linkjobs=LINKJOBS      \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mSet the number of parallel link jobs.\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[38;2;0;255;0m    -w, --warning                \u001b[0m    \u001b[0mEnable the warnings output.           "callID": "call_00_gLezzITQtxOG1gmgUvNp7481",
          "state": {
            "status": "completed",
            "input": {
              "command": "cat > data/iphones.csv << 'EOF'\nid,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\nIP001,iPhone 15 Pro Max,256GB,250000,available,0\nIP002,iPhone 15 Pro,128GB,200000,available,0\nIP003,iPhone 14 Plus,128GB,175000,available,0\nIP004,iPhone SE 3,64GB,125000,available,0\nEOF\n\ncat > data/users.csv << 'EOF'\nid,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\nADM001,Administrator,08000000000,admin,admin123,admin,false\nEOF\n\n> data/rentals.csv\n> data/reservations.csv\n\n# Re-add headers to rentals and reservations\necho 'rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status' > data/rentals.csv\necho 'reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status' > data/reservations.csv",
              "description": "Reset data to initial state",
              "workdir": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl"

          "time": {
            "start": 1779162342852,
            "end": 1779162342997
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e56e5c40017j3OvyF2fCcoao",
          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",
          "messageID": "msg_e3e56dbb1001mCRzI3uCrRZAuS"
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "## 1. Analisis Modul\n\nModul yang diajarkan (terdapat di folder `modul/`):\n\n| Modul | Materi | Penerapan di Proyek |\n|---|---|---|\n| 1 - Pengenalan C++ | Variabel, tipe data, cout/cin, getline, operator | Seluruh program |\n| 2 - Array & Struct | Array 1D, struct, array of struct, CRUD | `struct iPhone/Customer/Rental/Reservation`, array of struct untuk penyimpanan data |\n| 3 - Prosedur & Fungsi | Function, pass by value, pass by reference, default param | Semua modul dipisah dalam fungsi-fungsi |\n| 4 - Pointer | Address-of (&), dereference (*), pass by reference | `&` pada parameter fungsi untuk array |\n| 5 - Sorting | Bubble Sort, Selection Sort, Merge Sort, Quick Sort | `sortReservationsByPriority()` di reservation.cpp menggunakan Bubble Sort |\n| 6 - Searching | Linear Search, Binary Search, Jump Search | `findUserByUsername()`, `findiPhoneByID()` menggunakan Linear Search |\n| 8 - Error Handling & Library | try/throw/catch, standard library, user-defined library | Include guards di header files, validasi input, user-defined library (.h) |\n\n## 2. Daftar Materi yang Diterapkan\n\n- **Struct** → `iPhone`, `User`, `Rental`, `Reservation`\n- **Array of Struct** → Semua data disimpan dalam array statis\n- **Function** → Setiap fitur adalah fungsi terpisah\n- **Pass by Reference** → Parameter `const string&` untuk efisiensi\n- **Pointer** → Konsep alamat memori (implisit melalui reference)\n- **Sorting (Bubble Sort)** → Prioritas reservasi VIP didahulukan\n- **Searching (Linear Search)** → Pencarian user, iPhone, rental\n- **Error Handling** → Validasi input, penanganan file error\n- **Switch-case** → Navigasi menu\n- **do-while** → Looping menu\n- **CSV File Handling** → load/save data ke file CSV\n- **Header Guards** → `#ifndef/#define/#endif` di semua header\n\n## 3. Desain Sistem\n\n```\nSISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE\n│\n├── MAIN MENU (Role Selection)\n│   ├── Login → Admin Menu / Customer Menu\n│   ├── Register → Customer baru\n│   └── Keluar\n│\n├── CUSTOMER MENU\n│   ├── Lihat iPhone\n│   ├── Cari iPhone\n│   ├── Sewa iPhone\n│   ├── Reservasi iPhone\n│   ├── Status Reservasi\n│   ├── Riwayat Sewa\n│   └── Logout\n│\n└── ADMIN MENU (setelah login)\n    ├── Manajemen iPhone (CRUD)\n    ├── Manajemen User (Lihat/Hapus/Set VIP)\n    ├── Manajemen Penyewaan (Lihat/Kembalikan)\n    ├── Manajemen Reservasi (Lihat)\n    ├── Laporan (Pendapatan, Statistik, Populer)\n    └── Logout\n```\n\n## 4. Struktur Folder\n\n```\nproject/\n├── main.cpp                     # Entry point\n├── xmake.lua                    # Build config\n├── data/                        # CSV data files\n│   ├── users.csv\n│   ├── iphones.csv\n│   ├── rentals.csv\n│   └── reservations.csv\n├── includes/                    # Header files\n│   ├── csv_helper.h\n│   ├── utils.h\n│   ├── validator.h\n│   ├── user.h\n│   ├── iphone.h\n│   ├── rental.h\n│   ├── reservation.h\n│   └── menu.h\n├── modules/                     # Implementation\n│   ├── user.cpp\n│   ├── iphone.cpp\n│   ├── rental.cpp\n│   ├── reservation.cpp\n│   └── menu.cpp\n└── utils/                       # Utilities\n    ├── csv_helper.cpp\n    ├── utils.cpp\n    └── validator.cpp\n```\n\n## 5. xmake.lua\n\n```lua\nset_project(\"Sistem-Penyewaan-iPhone\")\nset_version(\"1.0.0\")\nset_languages(\"c++17\")\n\nif is_mode(\"debug\") then\n    add_defines(\"DEBUG\")\n    set_symbols(\"debug\")\nend\n\ntarget(\"app\")\n    set_kind(\"binary\")\n    add_includedirs(\"includes\")\n    add_files(\"main.cpp\", \"modules/*.cpp\", \"utils/*.cpp\")\n    set_targetdir(\"bin\")\n    set_rundir(\".\")\n```\n\n## 6. Source Code Lengkap\n\nSemua file sudah ditulis. Total **20 file** (1 main, 1 xmake, 4 CSV, 7 header, 7 cpp).\n\n## 7. Cara Kerja CSV\n\n**Format CSV header:**\n- `users.csv`: `id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip`\n- `iphones.csv`: `id,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented`\n- `rentals.csv`: `rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status`\n- `reservations.csv`: `reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status`\n\n**Read:** `loadUsers()` membuka file, `getline()` membaca header (skip), lalu loop `getline()` untuk setiap baris data. `splitCSVRow()` memisahkan kolom dengan koma.\n\n**Write:** `saveUsers()` membuka file, menulis header, lalu loop array struct dan tulis setiap field dipisah koma.\n\n**Relasi:** `user_id` di rentals.csv → `id` di users.csv, `iphone_id` di rentals.csv → `id` di iphones.csv.\n\n**Alasan CSV:** Format teks sederhana, mudah dibaca manusia, mudah diparse tanpa library eksternal, sesuai dengan materi file handling dan struct.\n\n## 8. Cara Compile dan Menjalankan\n\n```bash\nxmake        # Compile\nxmake run    # Jalankan\n```\n\n**Login default admin:** username `admin`, password `admin123`\n\n## 9. Contoh Output Program\n\n```\n=================================\n   SISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE       \n=================================\n1. Login\n2. Register Customer\n3. Keluar\n=================================\nPilih: 1\n\n=================================\n           LOGIN                 \n=================================\nMasukkan username: admin\nMasukkan password: admin123\nSelamat datang, Administrator!\n\n=================================\n         MENU ADMIN              \n=================================\n1. Manajemen iPhone\n2. Manajemen User\n3. Manajemen Penyewaan\n4. Manajemen Reservasi\n5. Laporan\n6. Logout\n=================================\nPilih:\n```\n\n**Fitur utama berfungsi:**\n- ✅ Login/Register dengan role-based access\n- ✅ CRUD iPhone (admin)\n- ✅ Sewa iPhone dengan validasi ketersediaan dan perhitungan biaya\n- ✅ Reservasi dengan prioritas VIP (Bubble Sort)\n- ✅ Pengembalian dengan pengecekan antrean reservasi\n- ✅ Laporan pendapatan, statistik, dan iPhone terpopuler\n- ✅ Semua data tersimpan di file CSV\n- ✅ Validasi input di setiap form\n- ✅ Compile zero warning, no error, no infinite loop",

          "type": "text",
          "text": "## Goal\n- Build complete C++ iPhone rental system with CSV persistence, role-based menus (customer/admin), reservation priority queue, and rental management.\n\n## Constraints & Preferences\n- All data stored as CSV files in `data/`: `users.csv`, `iphones.csv`, `rentals.csv`, `reservations.csv`\n- Single `users.csv` with `id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip` — admin and customers unified\n- Main menu: Login / Register Customer / Keluar; after login role determines menu\n- Customer menu: view iPhones, search, rent, reserve, view own status & history (no global reports)\n- Admin menu via login (admin/admin123): manage iPhones, users, rentals, reservations, reports\n- Login validates against CSV; register checks username uniqueness\n- Customer gets VIP priority in reservation queue; bubble sort on priority\n- `pressEnter()` uses `cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n')` — consumes one line from pipe, waits for Enter in interactive mode\n- Program runs via `xmake` then `xmake run` (set_rundir(\".\") ensures correct CWD)\n- No external frameworks, no GUI, no database — only C++17, struct, array, function, pointers, file I/O, try/catch\n- All prompts use `getline(cin, ...)` to avoid input skips\n\n## Progress\n### Done\n- Analyzed 7 modul PDFs (Pengenalan C++, Array & Struct, Prosedur & Fungsi, Pointer, Sorting, Searching, Error Handling & Library)\n- Created full project structure: `includes/`, `modules/`, `utils/`, `data/`, `xmake.lua`, `main.cpp`\n- Implemented all headers (`csv_helper.h`, `utils.h`, `validator.h`, `user.h`, `iphone.h`, `rental.h`, `reservation.h`, `menu.h`)\n- Implemented all sources (`csv_helper.cpp`, `utils.cpp`, `validator.cpp`, `user.cpp`, `iphone.cpp`, `rental.cpp`, `reservation.cpp`, `menu.cpp`)\n- Implemented `main.cpp` entry point — loads all CSV data, calls `showMainMenu()`\n- Built and linked successfully with xmake (no errors, no warnings)\n- Ran end-to-end test: register → customer login → rent iPhone → view history → admin login → return → reports → logout → exit (all steps confirmed)\n- Data files persist correctly between runs\n\n### In Progress\n- *(none)* — all core features are implemented and tested\n\n### Blocked\n- *(none)*\n\n## Key Decisions\n- Use `struct` (not class) to match module content (Modul 2)\n- Use global arrays of struct with `extern` for shared state (consistent with Modul 2 examples)\n- Use `fstream` + `getline` + `stringstream` for CSV I/O — standard library, taught implicitly in Modul 8\n- Reservation priority: VIP customers sorted ahead of regular customers using bubble sort (Modul 5)\n- `pressEnter()` reads one full line — works in both interactive (waits for Enter) and piped mode (consumes one line)\n- Admin credentials stored in CSV (not hardcoded) to match `users.csv` requirement\n\n## Next Steps\n- *(none)* — project is complete and compilable/runnable per spec\n\n## Critical Context\n- Running `xmake` from project root; binary placed in `bin/`; `set_rundir(\".\")` ensures correct CWD for CSV paths\n- Test pipe input must include an extra blank line after each operation that calls `pressEnter()`\n- CSV format uses header row; `load*()` functions skip header line with `getline` before parse loop\n- ID format: `USRxxx`, `IPxxx`, `RNTxxx`, `RSVxxx` with zero-padded 3-digit numbers\n\n## Relevant Files\n- `xmake.lua`: build config, `set_rundir(\".\")` critical for CSV paths\n- `data/*.csv`: all persistent data in CSV format\n- `includes/*.h`: struct definitions and function declarations for all modules\n- `modules/*.cpp`: business logic for user, iphone, rental, reservation, menu\n- `utils/*.cpp`: CSV parser, input validation, date/format helpers\n- `main.cpp`: entry point, calls all `load*()` functions then `showMainMenu()`",

        {
          "snapshot": "e1430879c41f5af9012b78ce26895bb2233b5169",

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "The user is asking about the difference between reservation (\"reservasi\") and rental (\"sewa\") from the customer's perspective. Let me explain clearly based on the code.\n\n**Sewa (Rental):** Direct rental - customer picks an available iPhone, specifies start date and duration, pays, and the iPhone becomes \"rented\". The rental status is \"active\". This is a confirmed, paid transaction.\n\n**Reservasi (Reservation):** Waiting list/queue - when an iPhone is NOT available (already rented), the customer can make a reservation. This adds them to a queue sorted by priority (VIP first via bubble sort). When the iPhone is returned, the system checks if there's a reservation waiting for it. The reservation status is \"waiting\" by default.\n\nKey differences:\n1. **Sewa** requires the iPhone to be **available** (status \"available\")\n2. **Reservasi** is for when the iPhone is **not available** (rented out)\n3. **Sewa** generates a rental transaction with duration, price, dates\n4. **Reservasi** just creates a queue entry - no payment yet\n5. **Sewa** changes iPhone status from \"available\" → \"rented\"\n6. **Reservasi** doesn't change iPhone status (it's already \"rented\")\n7. **Reservasi** uses Bubble Sort for VIP priority\n8. When admin returns an iPhone (rental → completed), the system calls `processReservations()` to check if anyone is waiting\n\nBut in the current flow, the reservation is a bit detached - `processReservations()` just *displays* the next reservation to the admin; it doesn't automatically convert it to a rental. The customer would have to manually check and rent when the iPhone becomes available.\n\nLet me explain this clearly.",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779162522545,
            "end": 1779162527043
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e59a3b1001SoKuH9tW63qcaM",
          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",
          "messageID": "msg_e3e599b5c001rFfOQom5axtMao"
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "**Sewa (Rental)** — langsung menyewa iPhone yang **sedang tersedia** (`status == \"available\"`). Customer bayar, iPhone langsung dipakai, tercatat di tabel `rentals` dengan status `active`.\n\n**Reservasi (Reservation)** — daftar antrean untuk iPhone yang **sedang tidak tersedia** (`status == \"rented\"`). Tidak bayar, hanya menunggu di antrean. Urutan antrean di-sort Bubble Sort berdasarkan prioritas (VIP didahulukan). Saat admin mengembalikan iPhone, `processReservations()` mengecek antrean dan menampilkan siapa yang dapat giliran — reservasi tidak otomatis menjadi sewa, customer harus menyewa manual setelah iPhone tersedia.\n\nTldr: Sewa = langsung transaksi (beli tiket). Reservasi = daftar tunggu (booking seat) untuk iPhone yang sedang dipakai orang lain.",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779162527048,
            "end": 1779162530234
          },

          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",

              "patch": "Index: README.md\n===================================================================\n--- README.md\t\n+++ README.md\t\n@@ -1,367 +0,0 @@\n-# SISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE\n-### dengan Jadwal dan Prioritas Reservasi\n-\n-Proyek akhir mata kuliah **Algoritma dan Pemrograman Lanjut (APL)**.\n-\n----\n-\n-## 📋 DAFTAR ISI\n-\n-1. [Deskripsi Proyek](#-deskripsi-proyek)\n-2. [Struktur Direktori](#-struktur-direktori)\n-3. [Pemetaan Modul ke Fitur](#-pemetaan-modul-ke-fitur)\n-4. [Fitur & Hak Akses](#-fitur--hak-akses)\n-5. [Cara Compile & Run](#-cara-compile--run)\n-6. [Skenario Test](#-skenario-test)\n-7. [Panduan Git Collaboration](#-panduan-git-collaboration)\n-\n----\n-\n-## 🎯 DESKRIPSI PROYEK\n-\n-Sistem manajemen penyewaan iPhone berbasis **C++ console** dengan:\n-- **CRUD lengkap** untuk Device iPhone, Data Pelanggan, dan Data Reservasi\n-- **Multiuser**: Admin & Customer dengan sistem login\n-- **Prioritas Reservasi**: VIP > Regular > Baru (Queue berbasis prioritas)\n-- **Pencarian efisien**: Binary Search (O(log n)) & Interpolation Search (O(log log n))\n-- **Error Handling**: try-catch-throw dengan exception spesifik\n-- **External Library**: `my_library.h` dengan include guards\n-- **File I/O**: Simpan & load data ke CSV\n-\n----\n-\n-## 📁 STRUKTUR DIREKTORI\n-\n-```\n-proyek-akhir-apl/\n-│\n-├── includes/                  # Header files\n-│   ├── constants.h            # Konstanta, enum, ASSERT/LOG_ERROR macro\n-│   ├── structs.h              # Definisi struct (iPhone, User, Reservasi, Transaksi)\n-│   ├── helpers.h              # Deklarasi fungsi global\n-│   └── my_library.h           # External library (MODUL 8): string, math, search utils\n-│\n-├── modules/                   # Implementasi modul\n-│   ├── core_rental.cpp        # CRUD iPhone + Binary Search (MODUL 6)\n-│   ├── user_manager.cpp       # Login/Register + try-catch (MODUL 8)\n-│   ├── priority.cpp           # Priority Queue + Interpolation Search (MODUL 6)\n-│   ├── transactions.cpp       # Check-in/out + try-catch (MODUL 8)\n-│   └── reports.cpp            # Laporan-laporan admin\n-│\n-├── utils/                     # Utility functions\n-│   ├── validator.cpp          # Validasi tanggal, bentrok jadwal + try-catch + __FILE__\n-│   └── file_io.cpp            # Load/save data ke CSV\n-│\n-├── src/\n-│   └── main.cpp               # Entry point, menu navigasi\n-│\n-├── data/                      # Database CSV (auto-generated)\n-│   ├── iphones.csv\n-│   ├── users.csv\n-│   ├── reservations.csv\n-│   └── transactions.csv\n-│\n-├── modul/                     # Materi modul (PDF)\n-│   ├── MODUL 1 - Pengenalan C++.pdf\n-│   ├── MODUL 6 - Searching.pdf\n-│   └── MODUL 8 - Error Handling & Library.pdf\n-│\n-├── xmake.lua                  # Build config xmake\n-├── Makefile                   # Build config GNU Make / g++\n-└── README.md                  # Dokumentasi ini\n-```\n-\n----\n-\n-## 📌 PEMETAAN MODUL KE FITUR\n-\n-| Modul | Materi | Implementasi | File |\n-|-------|--------|--------------|------|\n-| **1** | Variabel, Tipe Data, I/O | `string`, `int`, `double`, `cin`/`cout` | Semua file |\n-| **2** | Array, Struct, Vector | `struct iPhone/User/Reservasi/Transaksi`, `vector<>` | `includes/structs.h`, semua `.cpp` |\n-| **3** | Fungsi & Prosedur | Semua fungsi dengan parameter & return value | Semua file |\n-| **4** | Pointer | `iPhone* cariiPhone()`, `updateStatusiPhone(iPhone*)` | `core_rental.cpp:29,139` |\n-| **5** | Sorting | `sort()` dari `<algorithm>` untuk antrian & laporan | `priority.cpp:25`, `reports.cpp` |\n-| **6** | **Binary Search** | `cariiPhoneBinary()` — O(log n) untuk ID iPhone | `core_rental.cpp:29-52` |\n-| **6** | **Interpolation Search** | `cariReservasiInterpolation()` — O(log log n) rata-rata | `priority.cpp:52-68` |\n-| **6** | **Kompleksitas Waktu** | Komentar O(log n), O(n) pada setiap algoritma | `core_rental.cpp`, `priority.cpp` |\n-| **8** | **try/catch/throw** | `invalid_argument`, `runtime_error`, `out_of_range` | `user_manager.cpp`, `transactions.cpp`, `validator.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n-| **8** | **Library standar** | `<vector>`, `<algorithm>`, `<cmath>` | Semua file |\n-| **8** | **External Library** | `my_library.h` dengan `#ifndef/#define/#endif` | `includes/my_library.h` |\n-| **8** | **Include Guards** | `#ifndef CONSTANTS_H`, `#ifndef STRUCTS_H`, `#ifndef HELPERS_H` | Semua header |\n-| **8** | **Debugging** | `ASSERT` macro, `LOG_ERROR(__FILE__, __LINE__, __func__)` | `includes/constants.h:25-38`, `validator.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n-| **BONUS** | File CSV | `loadData()` / `simpanData()` via `data/*.csv` | `utils/file_io.cpp` |\n-| **BONUS** | Tampilan Rapi | Tabel, box drawing, navigasi menu | `main.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n-| **BONUS** | Prioritas Queue | VIP > Regular > Baru + FIFO | `priority.cpp` |\n-| **BONUS** | Validasi Bentrok | Binary Search untuk deteksi bentrok jadwal | `validator.cpp:84-120` |\n-\n----\n-\n-## 👥 FITUR & HAK AKSES\n-\n-### Admin\n-| Menu | Deskripsi |\n-|------|-----------|\n-| Manajemen iPhone | CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) iPhone |\n-| Manajemen User | CRUD User, atur role & level |\n-| Kelola Reservasi | Batalkan reservasi customer |\n-| Proses Pengembalian | Check-in iPhone |\n-| Proses Antrian | Jalankan prioritas antrian |\n-| Laporan | 7 jenis laporan (pendapatan, popularitas, okupansi, dll) |\n-\n-### Customer\n-| Menu | Deskripsi |\n-|------|-----------|\n-| Lihat iPhone | Filter berdasarkan status Tersedia |\n-| Cari iPhone | Binary Search (by ID) / Sequential (by Model) |\n-| Buat Reservasi | Pilih iPhone, tentukan tanggal |\n-| Reservasi Aktif | Lihat reservasi & posisi antrian |\n-| Batalkan Reservasi | Hanya milik sendiri |\n-| Check-In | Kembalikan iPhone |\n-| Riwayat Transaksi | Histori peminjaman |\n-| Profil | Lihat data diri |\n-\n----\n-\n-## 🔧 CARA COMPILE & RUN\n-\n-### Opsi 1: GNU Make (Recommended)\n-\n-```bash\n-# Compile\n-make\n-\n-# Compile + Run\n-make run\n-\n-# Debug mode (ASSERT aktif)\n-make debug\n-\n-# Bersihkan binary\n-make clean\n-```\n-\n-### Opsi 2: xmake\n-\n-```bash\n-# Build\n-xmake build\n-\n-# Run\n-xmake run app\n-\n-# Debug\n-xmake build -m debug\n-xmake run app\n-```\n-\n-### Opsi 3: Manual g++\n-\n-```bash\n-g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -Iincludes \\\n-    src/main.cpp \\\n-    modules/core_rental.cpp \\\n-    modules/priority.cpp \\\n-    modules/reports.cpp \\\n-    modules/transactions.cpp \\\n-    modules/user_manager.cpp \\\n-    utils/file_io.cpp \\\n-    utils/validator.cpp \\\n-    -o bin/app\n-\n-./bin/app\n-```\n-\n----\n-\n-## 🧪 SKENARIO TEST\n-\n-### 1. Login Multiuser\n-\n-**Admin:**\n-```\n-Username: admin\n-Password: admin\n--> Masuk ke Menu Admin (7 menu)\n-```\n-\n-**Customer:**\n-```\n-Username: zidan\n-Password: 021\n--> Masuk ke Menu Customer (10 menu)\n-```\n-\n-### 2. Trigger Error Handling\n-\n-| Skenario | Exception | File Terkait |\n-|----------|-----------|-------------|\n-| Login dengan username kosong | `invalid_argument` | `user_manager.cpp:30` |\n-| Input harga iPhone <= 0 | `invalid_argument` | `core_rental.cpp:169` |\n-| Cari iPhone tidak ditemukan | `runtime_error` | `core_rental.cpp:188` |\n-| Tanggal di luar rentang (2023 atau 2031) | `out_of_range` | `validator.cpp:47-50` |\n-| Input pilihan menu bukan angka | Input validation loop | `main.cpp:50-55` |\n-| Reservasi iPhone tidak tersedia | `runtime_error` | `transactions.cpp:71` |\n-\n-### 3. Jalankan Searching\n-\n-**Binary Search (O(log n)):**\n-1. Login sebagai Admin\n-2. Menu Manajemen iPhone -> Cari iPhone (Binary Search by ID)\n-3. Masukkan ID: `IPH003` (atau ID iPhone lainnya)\n-4. Lihat detail iPhone ditemukan\n-\n-**Interpolation Search (O(log log n)):**\n-1. Lakukan beberapa reservasi\n-2. Fungsi `cariReservasiInterpolation()` dipanggil untuk mencari reservasi\n-3. (Terintegrasi di proses antrian)\n-\n-### 4. Prioritas Queue (BONUS)\n-\n-1. Login sebagai Customer (level BARU/REGULAR) buat reservasi\n-2. Login sebagai Customer lain (level VIP) buat reservasi\n-3. Admin jalankan \"Proses Antrian Otomatis\"\n-4. Observasi: reservasi VIP diproses lebih dulu\n-\n-### 5. ASSERT Macro\n-\n-Untuk menguji ASSERT, compile dengan `make debug`:\n-- ASSERT akan aktif dan memvalidasi kondisi kritis (null pointer, index bounds)\n-- Contoh: `ASSERT(ptr != nullptr, \"...\")` di `updateStatusiPhone()`\n-\n----\n-\n-## 🌿 PANDUAN GIT COLLABORATION\n-\n-### Strategi Branching\n-\n-```\n-main        ← branch utama (hanya untuk merge稳定)\n-  ├── dev   ← branch pengembangan\n-  │   ├── feature/login        ← fitur login\n-  │   ├── feature/crud-iphone  ← CRUD iPhone\n-  │   ├── feature/reservasi    ← Reservasi\n-  │   ├── feature/reports      ← Laporan\n-  │   └── feature/searching    ← Searching (Modul 6)\n-```\n-\n-### Setup Awal\n-\n-```bash\n-# 1. Clone repository\n-git clone <url-repo>\n-cd proyek-akhir-apl\n-\n-# 2. Buat branch utama pengembangan\n-git checkout -b dev\n-\n-# 3. Push ke remote\n-git push -u origin dev\n-```\n-\n-### Alur Kerja per Anggota\n-\n-**Anggota A — Fitur Login & User Management:**\n-```bash\n-# Buat branch dari dev\n-git checkout dev\n-git pull origin dev\n-git checkout -b feature/login\n-\n-# Kerjakan fitur...\n-# Setelah selesai:\n-git add .\n-git commit -m \"feat: implementasi login dengan exception handling\"\n-git push -u origin feature/login\n-\n-# Buat Pull Request di GitHub: feature/login -> dev\n-```\n-\n-**Anggota B — CRUD iPhone & Searching:**\n-```bash\n-git checkout dev\n-git pull origin dev\n-git checkout -b feature/crud-iphone\n-\n-# Kerjakan...\n-git add .\n-git commit -m \"feat: CRUD iPhone + Binary Search\"\n-git push -u origin feature/crud-iphone\n-\n-# Buat Pull Request: feature/crud-iphone -> dev\n-```\n-\n-**Anggota C — Reservasi & Prioritas:**\n-```bash\n-git checkout dev\n-git pull origin dev\n-git checkout -b feature/reservasi\n-\n-# Kerjakan...\n-git add .\n-git commit -m \"feat: sistem reservasi dengan prioritas queue\"\n-git push -u origin feature/reservasi\n-\n-# Buat Pull Request: feature/reservasi -> dev\n-```\n-\n-### Pull Request & Code Review\n-\n-1. **Buat PR** di GitHub dari `feature/xxx` ke `dev`\n-2. **Review**: Minimal 1 anggota lain review kode\n-3. **Periksa**: Tidak ada konflik, compile sukses, fitur berfungsi\n-4. **Merge**: Setelah disetujui, merge ke `dev`\n-\n-### Final Merge ke main\n-\n-```bash\n-# Setelah semua fitur selesai di dev:\n-git checkout main\n-git pull origin main\n-git merge dev\n-git push origin main\n-```\n-\n-### Tips Hindari Konflik\n-\n-1. **Pisahkan file kerja**: Setiap anggota kerja di file berbeda\n-   - Anggota A: `modules/user_manager.cpp`\n-   - Anggota B: `modules/core_rental.cpp`\n-   - Anggota C: `modules/priority.cpp`, `modules/transactions.cpp`\n-2. **Selalu pull sebelum push**: `git pull origin dev --rebase`\n-3. **Komunikasi**: Laporkan file yang sedang dikerjakan di grup\n-4. **Commit kecil & sering**: Hindari commit besar yang banyak perubahan\n-\n----\n-\n-## 📚 DEFAULT CREDENTIALS\n-\n-| Username | Password | Role | Level |\n-|----------|----------|------|-------|\n-| admin | admin | Admin | BARU |\n-| zidan | 021 | Customer | VIP |\n-| desti | 001 | Customer | VIP |\n-| ahmad | pass123 | Customer | REGULAR |\n-| siti | siti456 | Customer | VIP |\n-| budi | budi789 | Customer | BARU |\n-\n----\n-\n-## ⚙️ KOMPILASI\n-\n-```\n-   ___         __  __  ___  _  _    ___\n-  / __| ___   |  \\/  ||_ _|| \\| |  / __|\n- | (__ / _ \\  | |\\/| | | | | .` | | (__\n-  \\___|\\___/  |_|  |_||___||_|\\_|  \\___|\n-\n-  g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -Iincludes \\\n-      src/main.cpp modules/*.cpp utils/*.cpp \\\n-      -o bin/app\n-\n-  ./bin/app\n-```\n-\n----\n-\n-*Dibuat untuk memenuhi tugas Proyek Akhir APL — Semester 2*\n",

            "output": "<path>/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/README.md</path>\n<type>file</type>\n<content>\n1: # SISTEM PENYEWAAN IPHONE\n2: ### dengan Jadwal dan Prioritas Reservasi\n3: \n4: Proyek akhir mata kuliah **Algoritma dan Pemrograman Lanjut (APL)**.\n5: \n6: ---\n7: \n8: ## 📋 DAFTAR ISI\n9: \n10: 1. [Deskripsi Proyek](#-deskripsi-proyek)\n11: 2. [Struktur Direktori](#-struktur-direktori)\n12: 3. [Pemetaan Modul ke Fitur](#-pemetaan-modul-ke-fitur)\n13: 4. [Fitur & Hak Akses](#-fitur--hak-akses)\n14: 5. [Cara Compile & Run](#-cara-compile--run)\n15: 6. [Skenario Test](#-skenario-test)\n16: 7. [Panduan Git Collaboration](#-panduan-git-collaboration)\n17: \n18: ---\n19: \n20: ## 🎯 DESKRIPSI PROYEK\n21: \n22: Sistem manajemen penyewaan iPhone berbasis **C++ console** dengan:\n23: - **CRUD lengkap** untuk Device iPhone, Data Pelanggan, dan Data Reservasi\n24: - **Multiuser**: Admin & Customer dengan sistem login\n25: - **Prioritas Reservasi**: VIP > Regular > Baru (Queue berbasis prioritas)\n26: - **Pencarian efisien**: Binary Search (O(log n)) & Interpolation Search (O(log log n))\n27: - **Error Handling**: try-catch-throw dengan exception spesifik\n28: - **External Library**: `my_library.h` dengan include guards\n29: - **File I/O**: Simpan & load data ke CSV\n30: \n31: ---\n32: \n33: ## 📁 STRUKTUR DIREKTORI\n34: \n35: ```\n36: proyek-akhir-apl/\n37: │\n38: ├── includes/                  # Header files\n39: │   ├── constants.h            # Konstanta, enum, ASSERT/LOG_ERROR macro\n40: │   ├── structs.h              # Definisi struct (iPhone, User, Reservasi, Transaksi)\n41: │   ├── helpers.h              # Deklarasi fungsi global\n42: │   └── my_library.h           # External library (MODUL 8): string, math, search utils\n43: │\n44: ├── modules/                   # Implementasi modul\n45: │   ├── core_rental.cpp        # CRUD iPhone + Binary Search (MODUL 6)\n46: │   ├── user_manager.cpp       # Login/Register + try-catch (MODUL 8)\n47: │   ├── priority.cpp           # Priority Queue + Interpolation Search (MODUL 6)\n48: │   ├── transactions.cpp       # Check-in/out + try-catch (MODUL 8)\n49: │   └── reports.cpp            # Laporan-laporan admin\n50: │\n51: ├── utils/                     # Utility functions\n52: │   ├── validator.cpp          # Validasi tanggal, bentrok jadwal + try-catch + __FILE__\n53: │   └── file_io.cpp            # Load/save data ke CSV\n54: │\n55: ├── src/\n56: │   └── main.cpp               # Entry point, menu navigasi\n57: │\n58: ├── data/                      # Database CSV (auto-generated)\n59: │   ├── iphones.csv\n60: │   ├── users.csv\n61: │   ├── reservations.csv\n62: │   └── transactions.csv\n63: │\n64: ├── modul/                     # Materi modul (PDF)\n65: │   ├── MODUL 1 - Pengenalan C++.pdf\n66: │   ├── MODUL 6 - Searching.pdf\n67: │   └── MODUL 8 - Error Handling & Library.pdf\n68: │\n69: ├── xmake.lua                  # Build config xmake\n70: ├── Makefile                   # Build config GNU Make / g++\n71: └── README.md                  # Dokumentasi ini\n72: ```\n73: \n74: ---\n75: \n76: ## 📌 PEMETAAN MODUL KE FITUR\n77: \n78: | Modul | Materi | Implementasi | File |\n79: |-------|--------|--------------|------|\n80: | **1** | Variabel, Tipe Data, I/O | `string`, `int`, `double`, `cin`/`cout` | Semua file |\n81: | **2** | Array, Struct, Vector | `struct iPhone/User/Reservasi/Transaksi`, `vector<>` | `includes/structs.h`, semua `.cpp` |\n82: | **3** | Fungsi & Prosedur | Semua fungsi dengan parameter & return value | Semua file |\n83: | **4** | Pointer | `iPhone* cariiPhone()`, `updateStatusiPhone(iPhone*)` | `core_rental.cpp:29,139` |\n84: | **5** | Sorting | `sort()` dari `<algorithm>` untuk antrian & laporan | `priority.cpp:25`, `reports.cpp` |\n85: | **6** | **Binary Search** | `cariiPhoneBinary()` — O(log n) untuk ID iPhone | `core_rental.cpp:29-52` |\n86: | **6** | **Interpolation Search** | `cariReservasiInterpolation()` — O(log log n) rata-rata | `priority.cpp:52-68` |\n87: | **6** | **Kompleksitas Waktu** | Komentar O(log n), O(n) pada setiap algoritma | `core_rental.cpp`, `priority.cpp` |\n88: | **8** | **try/catch/throw** | `invalid_argument`, `runtime_error`, `out_of_range` | `user_manager.cpp`, `transactions.cpp`, `validator.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n89: | **8** | **Library standar** | `<vector>`, `<algorithm>`, `<cmath>` | Semua file |\n90: | **8** | **External Library** | `my_library.h` dengan `#ifndef/#define/#endif` | `includes/my_library.h` |\n91: | **8** | **Include Guards** | `#ifndef CONSTANTS_H`, `#ifndef STRUCTS_H`, `#ifndef HELPERS_H` | Semua header |\n92: | **8** | **Debugging** | `ASSERT` macro, `LOG_ERROR(__FILE__, __LINE__, __func__)` | `includes/constants.h:25-38`, `validator.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n93: | **BONUS** | File CSV | `loadData()` / `simpanData()` via `data/*.csv` | `utils/file_io.cpp` |\n94: | **BONUS** | Tampilan Rapi | Tabel, box drawing, navigasi menu | `main.cpp`, `core_rental.cpp` |\n95: | **BONUS** | Prioritas Queue | VIP > Regular > Baru + FIFO | `priority.cpp` |\n96: | **BONUS** | Validasi Bentrok | Binary Search untuk deteksi bentrok jadwal | `validator.cpp:84-120` |\n97: \n98: ---\n99: \n100: ## 👥 FITUR & HAK AKSES\n101: \n102: ### Admin\n103: | Menu | Deskripsi |\n104: |------|-----------|\n105: | Manajemen iPhone | CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) iPhone |\n106: | Manajemen User | CRUD User, atur role & level |\n107: | Kelola Reservasi | Batalkan reservasi customer |\n108: | Proses Pengembalian | Check-in iPhone |\n109: | Proses Antrian | Jalankan prioritas antrian |\n110: | Laporan | 7 jenis laporan (pendapatan, popularitas, okupansi, dll) |\n111: \n112: ### Customer\n113: | Menu | Deskripsi |\n114: |------|-----------|\n115: | Lihat iPhone | Filter berdasarkan status Tersedia |\n116: | Cari iPhone | Binary Search (by ID) / Sequential (by Model) |\n117: | Buat Reservasi | Pilih iPhone, tentukan tanggal |\n118: | Reservasi Aktif | Lihat reservasi & posisi antrian |\n119: | Batalkan Reservasi | Hanya milik sendiri |\n120: | Check-In | Kembalikan iPhone |\n121: | Riwayat Transaksi | Histori peminjaman |\n122: | Profil | Lihat data diri |\n123: \n124: ---\n125: \n126: ## 🔧 CARA COMPILE & RUN\n127: \n128: ### Opsi 1: GNU Make (Recommended)\n129: \n130: ```bash\n131: # Compile\n132: make\n133: \n134: # Compile + Run\n135: make run\n136: \n137: # Debug mode (ASSERT aktif)\n138: make debug\n139: \n140: # Bersihkan binary\n141: make clean\n142: ```\n143: \n144: ### Opsi 2: xmake\n145: \n146: ```bash\n147: # Build\n148: xmake build\n149: \n150: # Run\n151: xmake run app\n152: \n153: # Debug\n154: xmake build -m debug\n155: xmake run app\n156: ```\n157: \n158: ### Opsi 3: Manual g++\n159: \n160: ```bash\n161: g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -Iincludes \\\n162:     src/main.cpp \\\n163:     modules/core_rental.cpp \\\n164:     modules/priority.cpp \\\n165:     modules/reports.cpp \\\n166:     modules/transactions.cpp \\\n167:     modules/user_manager.cpp \\\n168:     utils/file_io.cpp \\\n169:     utils/validator.cpp \\\n170:     -o bin/app\n171: \n172: ./bin/app\n173: ```\n174: \n175: ---\n176: \n177: ## 🧪 SKENARIO TEST\n178: \n179: ### 1. Login Multiuser\n180: \n181: **Admin:**\n182: ```\n183: Username: admin\n184: Password: admin\n185: -> Masuk ke Menu Admin (7 menu)\n186: ```\n187: \n188: **Customer:**\n189: ```\n190: Username: zidan\n191: Password: 021\n192: -> Masuk ke Menu Customer (10 menu)\n193: ```\n194: \n195: ### 2. Trigger Error Handling\n196: \n197: | Skenario | Exception | File Terkait |\n198: |----------|-----------|-------------|\n199: | Login dengan username kosong | `invalid_argument` | `user_manager.cpp:30` |\n200: | Input harga iPhone <= 0 | `invalid_argument` | `core_rental.cpp:169` |\n201: | Cari iPhone tidak ditemukan | `runtime_error` | `core_rental.cpp:188` |\n202: | Tanggal di luar rentang (2023 atau 2031) | `out_of_range` | `validator.cpp:47-50` |\n203: | Input pilihan menu bukan angka | Input validation loop | `main.cpp:50-55` |\n204: | Reservasi iPhone tidak tersedia | `runtime_error` | `transactions.cpp:71` |\n205: \n206: ### 3. Jalankan Searching\n207: \n208: **Binary Search (O(log n)):**\n209: 1. Login sebagai Admin\n210: 2. Menu Manajemen iPhone -> Cari iPhone (Binary Search by ID)\n211: 3. Masukkan ID: `IPH003` (atau ID iPhone lainnya)\n212: 4. Lihat detail iPhone ditemukan\n213: \n214: **Interpolation Search (O(log log n)):**\n215: 1. Lakukan beberapa reservasi\n216: 2. Fungsi `cariReservasiInterpolation()` dipanggil untuk mencari reservasi\n217: 3. (Terintegrasi di proses antrian)\n218: \n219: ### 4. Prioritas Queue (BONUS)\n220: \n221: 1. Login sebagai Customer (level BARU/REGULAR) buat reservasi\n222: 2. Login sebagai Customer lain (level VIP) buat reservasi\n223: 3. Admin jalankan \"Proses Antrian Otomatis\"\n224: 4. Observasi: reservasi VIP diproses lebih dulu\n225: \n226: ### 5. ASSERT Macro\n227: \n228: Untuk menguji ASSERT, compile dengan `make debug`:\n229: - ASSERT akan aktif dan memvalidasi kondisi kritis (null pointer, index bounds)\n230: - Contoh: `ASSERT(ptr != nullptr, \"...\")` di `updateStatusiPhone()`\n231: \n232: ---\n233: \n234: ## 🌿 PANDUAN GIT COLLABORATION\n235: \n236: ### Strategi Branching\n237: \n238: ```\n239: main        ← branch utama (hanya untuk merge稳定)\n240:   ├── dev   ← branch pengembangan\n241:   │   ├── feature/login        ← fitur login\n242:   │   ├── feature/crud-iphone  ← CRUD iPhone\n243:   │   ├── feature/reservasi    ← Reservasi\n244:   │   ├── feature/reports      ← Laporan\n245:   │   └── feature/searching    ← Searching (Modul 6)\n246: ```\n247: \n248: ### Setup Awal\n249: \n250: ```bash\n251: # 1. Clone repository\n252: git clone <url-repo>\n253: cd proyek-akhir-apl\n254: \n255: # 2. Buat branch utama pengembangan\n256: git checkout -b dev\n257: \n258: # 3. Push ke remote\n259: git push -u origin dev\n260: ```\n261: \n262: ### Alur Kerja per Anggota\n263: \n264: **Anggota A — Fitur Login & User Management:**\n265: ```bash\n266: # Buat branch dari dev\n267: git checkout dev\n268: git pull origin dev\n269: git checkout -b feature/login\n270: \n271: # Kerjakan fitur...\n272: # Setelah selesai:\n273: git add .\n274: git commit -m \"feat: implementasi login dengan exception handling\"\n275: git push -u origin feature/login\n276: \n277: # Buat Pull Request di GitHub: feature/login -> dev\n278: ```\n279: \n280: **Anggota B — CRUD iPhone & Searching:**\n281: ```bash\n282: git checkout dev\n283: git pull origin dev\n284: git checkout -b feature/crud-iphone\n285: \n286: # Kerjakan...\n287: git add .\n288: git commit -m \"feat: CRUD iPhone + Binary Search\"\n289: git push -u origin feature/crud-iphone\n290: \n291: # Buat Pull Request: feature/crud-iphone -> dev\n292: ```\n293: \n294: **Anggota C — Reservasi & Prioritas:**\n295: ```bash\n296: git checkout dev\n297: git pull origin dev\n298: git checkout -b feature/reservasi\n299: \n300: # Kerjakan...\n301: git add .\n302: git commit -m \"feat: sistem reservasi dengan prioritas queue\"\n303: git push -u origin feature/reservasi\n304: \n305: # Buat Pull Request: feature/reservasi -> dev\n306: ```\n307: \n308: ### Pull Request & Code Review\n309: \n310: 1. **Buat PR** di GitHub dari `feature/xxx` ke `dev`\n311: 2. **Review**: Minimal 1 anggota lain review kode\n312: 3. **Periksa**: Tidak ada konflik, compile sukses, fitur berfungsi\n313: 4. **Merge**: Setelah disetujui, merge ke `dev`\n314: \n315: ### Final Merge ke main\n316: \n317: ```bash\n318: # Setelah semua fitur selesai di dev:\n319: git checkout main\n320: git pull origin main\n321: git merge dev\n322: git push origin main\n323: ```\n324: \n325: ### Tips Hindari Konflik\n326: \n327: 1. **Pisahkan file kerja**: Setiap anggota kerja di file berbeda\n328:    - Anggota A: `modules/user_manager.cpp`\n329:    - Anggota B: `modules/core_rental.cpp`\n330:    - Anggota C: `modules/priority.cpp`, `modules/transactions.cpp`\n331: 2. **Selalu pull sebelum push**: `git pull origin dev --rebase`\n332: 3. **Komunikasi**: Laporkan file yang sedang dikerjakan di grup\n333: 4. **Commit kecil & sering**: Hindari commit besar yang banyak perubahan\n334: \n335: ---\n336: \n337: ## 📚 DEFAULT CREDENTIALS\n338: \n339: | Username | Password | Role | Level |\n340: |----------|----------|------|-------|\n341: | admin | admin | Admin | BARU |\n342: | zidan | 021 | Customer | VIP |\n343: | desti | 001 | Customer | VIP |\n344: | ahmad | pass123 | Customer | REGULAR |\n345: | siti | siti456 | Customer | VIP |\n346: | budi | budi789 | Customer | BARU |\n347: \n348: ---\n349: \n350: ## ⚙️ KOMPILASI\n351: \n352: ```\n353:    ___         __  __  ___  _  _    ___\n354:   / __| ___   |  \\/  ||_ _|| \\| |  / __|\n355:  | (__ / _ \\  | |\\/| | | | | .` | | (__\n356:   \\___|\\___/  |_|  |_||___||_|\\_|  \\___|\n357: \n358:   g++ -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -Iincludes \\\n359:       src/main.cpp modules/*.cpp utils/*.cpp \\\n360:       -o bin/app\n361: \n362:   ./bin/app\n363: ```\n364: \n365: ---\n366: \n367: *Dibuat untuk memenuhi tugas Proyek Akhir APL — Semester 2*\n\n(End of file - total 367 lines)\n</content>",

i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         file << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].status << endl;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n void sortReservationsByPriority() {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n         for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n             int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n             int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n \n             if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n                 Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n                 daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n                 daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n             }\n         }\n     }\n }\n \n int findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         if (daftarReservasi[i].reservationID == id) {\n             return i;\n         }\n     }\n     return -1;\n }\n \n void buatReservasi(const string& userID) {\n     if (jumlahReservasi >= MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n         cout << \"Maaf, antrean reservasi penuh!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n-    displayAllIPhones();\n-\n-    string iphoneID;\n-    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin direservasi: \";\n-    getline(cin, iphoneID);\n-\n-    int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n-    if (idx == -1) {\n-        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n+    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"   PILIH iPhone UNTUK RESERVASI  \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    for (int i = 0; ID Reservasi: \" << resID << endl;\n     cout << \"Prioritas: \" << priority << endl;\n     cout << \"Anda akan mendapat notifikasi ketika iPhone tersedia.\" << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n     cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n \n     bool found = false;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         if (daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID == iphoneID &&\n             daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") {\n             int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n             string userName = userIdx != -1 ? \n User daftarUser[MAX_USERS];\n int jumlahUser = 0;\n \n void loadUsers() {\n     ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n     if (!file.is_open()) {\n         return;\n     }\n \n     string line;\n     getline(file, line);\n \n     jumlahUser = 0;\n     while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n         vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n         if (fields.size() < 7) daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n         jumlahUser++;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n void saveUsers() {\n     ofstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n     if (!file.is_open()) {\n         cout << {\n         file << daftarUser[i].id << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].name << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].phone << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].username << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].password << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].role << \",\"\n              << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"true\" : \"false\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n int -1;\n }\n \n int findUserIndexByID(const string& id) {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].id == id) {\n             return i;\n         }\n     }\n     return -1;\n }\n \n void login() {\n     string username, password;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"           LOGIN                 \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Masukkan username: \";\n     getline(cin, username);\n     cout << \"Masukkan password: \";\n     getline(cin, password);\n \n     int (daftarUser[idx].password != password) {\n         cout << \"Password salah!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Selamat datang, \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"!\" << endl;\n \n     if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n         showAdminMenu();\n     } else {\n         showCustomerMenu(daftarUser[idx].id);\n     }\n }\n \n void registerUser() {\n cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"        REGISTER CUSTOMER        \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n \n     cout << \"Nama: \";\n     getline(cin, name);\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n         getline(cin, phone);\n         if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n         cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Username: \";\n         getline(cin, username);\n         if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n         cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Password: \";\n     getline(cin, password);\n \n     int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n     string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n \n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = \"customer\";\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n     jumlahUser++;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout <<           "type": "text",
          "text": "==================================================\nATURAN INPUT PILIHAN DATA\n==================================================\n\nSaat user memilih data dari daftar (iPhone, user, reservasi, penyewaan, dll),\nJANGAN meminta user mengetik ID manual.\n\nSebagai gantinya:\n- Tampilkan daftar bernomor\n- User memilih menggunakan angka/index list\n\n==================================================\nCONTOH YANG DIINGINKAN\n==================================================\n\nJANGAN seperti ini:\nMasukkan ID iPhone: IP001\n\nTAPI gunakan seperti ini:\n\n=================================\nDAFTAR IPHONE\n=================================\n1. iPhone 13 - 128GB\n2. iPhone 14 Pro - 256GB\n3. iPhone 15 - 512GB\n\nPilih iPhone: 2\n\nLalu program otomatis mengambil:\nIP002\n\n==================================================\nIMPLEMENTASI YANG DIHARAPKAN\n==================================================\n\nGunakan:\n- vector/list/array index\n- mapping index → data object\n- validasi input pilihan\n\nContoh alur:\n- tampilkan seluruh data\n- beri nomor urut\n- user pilih angka\n- program mengambil object berdasarkan index\n\n==================================================\nWAJIB DITERAPKAN PADA\n==================================================\n\n## Penyewaan\n- Pilih iPhone\n- Pilih customer\n\n## Reservasi\n- Pilih iPhone\n\n## Pengembalian\n- Pilih transaksi rental\n\n## Admin\n- Pilih user\n- Pilih iPhone\n- Pilih reservasi\n- Pilih data yang ingin dihapus/edit\n\n==================================================\nVALIDASI INPUT\n==================================================\n\nProgram HARUS:\n- Menolak angka di luar range\n- Menolak input huruf\n- Tidak crash jika list kosong\n- Meminta input ulang jika salah\n\nContoh:\n\nPilihan tidak valid.\nMasukkan angka 1 - 3:\n\n==================================================\nTUJUAN ATURAN INI\n==================================================\n\nTujuan penggunaan nomor list:\n- Lebih user friendly\n- Mengurangi typo ID\n- Lebih cepat digunakan\n- Tampilan lebih profesional\n- Mudah dipahami pengguna awam\n\n==================================================\nKETENTUAN TAMBAHAN\n==================================================\n\nID internal seperti:\n- USR001\n- IP001\n- R001\n\nTetap digunakan DI DALAM SISTEM dan CSV,\ntetapi user normal tidak perlu mengetik ID secara manual.\n\nID hanya:\n- ditampilkan sebagai informasi\nATAU\n- digunakan internal program\n\n==================================================\nKUALITAS UI CONSOLE\n==================================================\n\nTampilan console harus:\n- Rapi\n- Konsisten\n- Ada separator/judul\n- Mudah dibaca\n- Tidak menampilkan data berantakan\n\nGunakan format menu/list yang konsisten di seluruh program. (y/n): \";\n111:     string confirm;\n112:     getline(cin, confirm);\n113:     if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n114:         cout << \"Penyewaan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n115:         pressEnter();\n116:         return;\n117:     }\n118: \n119:     int newID = jumlahRental + 1;\n120:     string rentalID = formatID(\"RNT\", newID);\n121: \n122:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = rentalID;\n123:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = userID;\n124:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n125:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = startDate;\n126:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = duration;\n127:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = totalPrice;\n128:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = \"active\";\n129:     jumlahRental++;\n130: \n131:     daftarIPhone[idx].status = \"rented\";\n132:     daftarIPhone[idx].totalRented++;\n133: \n134:     saveRentals();\n135:     saveIPhones();\n136: \n137:     cout << \"Penyewaan berhasil! i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n51:         file << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << \",\"\n52:              << daftarReservasi[i].userID << \",\"\n53:              << daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n54:              << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << \",\"\n55:              << daftarReservasi[i].priority << \",\"\n56:              << daftarReservasi[i].status << endl;\n57:     }\n58: \n59:     file.close();\n60: }\n61: \n62: void sortReservationsByPriority() {\n63:     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n64:         for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n65:             int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n66:             int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n67: \n68:             if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n69:                 Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n70:                 daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n71:                 daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n72:             }\n73:         }\n74:     }\n75: }\n76: \n77: int findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n78:     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n79:         if (daftarReservasi[i].reservationID == id) {\n80:             return i;\n81:         }\n82:     }\n83:     return -1;\n84: }\n85: \n86: void buatReservasi(const string& userID) {\n87:     if (jumlahReservasi >= MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n88:         cout << \"Maaf, antrean reservasi penuh!\" << endl;\n89:         pressEnter();\n90:         return;\n91:     }\n92: \n93:     displayAllIPhones();\n94: \n95:     string iphoneID;\n96:     cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang ingin direservasi: \";\n97:     getline(cin, iphoneID);\n98: \n99:     int idx = findiPhoneByID(iphoneID);\n100:     if (idx == -1) {\n101:         cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n102:         pressEnter();\n103:         return;\n104:     }\n105: \n106:     int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(userID);\n107:     string priority = \"Regular\";\n108:     if (userIdx != -1 && daftarUser[userIdx].isVIP) {\n109:         priority = \"VIP\";\n110:     }\n111: \n112:     int newID = jumlahReservasi + 1;\n113:     string resID = formatID(\"RSV\", newID);\n114: \n115:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = resID;\n116:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = userID;\n117:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = iphoneID;\n118:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = getCurrentDate();\n119:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = priority;\n120:     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = \"waiting\";\n121:     jumlahReservasi++;\n122: \n123:     sortReservationsByPriority();\n124:     saveReservations();\n125: \n126:     cout << \"Reservasi berhasil! ID Reservasi: \" << resID << endl;\n127:     cout << \"Prioritas: \" << priority << endl;\n128:     cout << \"Anda akan mendapat notifikasi ketika iPhone tersedia.\" << endl;\n129:     pressEnter();\n130: }\n131: \n132: void processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n133:     cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n134: \n135:     bool found = false;\n136:     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n137:         if (daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID == iphoneID &&\n138:             daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") {\n139:             int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n140:             string userName = userIdx != -1 ?               "oldString": "void editIPhone() {\n    string id;\n    cout << \"Masukkan ID iPhone yang akan diedit: \";\n    getline(cin, id);\n\n    int idx = findiPhoneByID(id);\n    if (idx == -1) {\n        cout << \"iPhone tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Edit iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << endl;",
              "newString": "void editIPhone() {\n    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"    PILIH IPHONE YANG DIEDIT     \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - \"\n             << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    int pilihan;\n    string input;\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Pilih iPhone (1-\" << jumlahIPhone << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, input);\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahIPhone) break;\n        cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahIPhone << \"!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int idx = pilihan - 1;\n\n    cout << \"Edit iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << endl;"

(y/n): \";",
              "newString": "void hapusIPhone() {\n    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   PILIH IPHONE YANG DIHAPUS     \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n             << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - \"\n             << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    int pilihan;\n    string input;\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Pilih iPhone (1-\" << jumlahIPhone << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, input);\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahIPhone) break;\n        cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahIPhone << \"!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int idx = pilihan - 1;\n\n    cout << \"Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \"? (y/n): \";"

            "input": {
              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/iphone.cpp",
              "oldString": "void displayAvailableIPhones() {\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"    iPhone TERSEDIA              \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    bool found = false;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n            cout << daftarIPhone[i].id << \" - \"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari\" << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n    }\n}",
              "newString": "void displayAvailableIPhones() {\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"    iPhone TERSEDIA              \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    int count = 0;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n            count++;\n            cout << count << \". \"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n                 << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n                 << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (count == 0) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n    }\n}"
            },
            "output": "Edit applied successfully.",

              "oldString": "void displayAllUsers() {\n    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA USER         \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"ID\\tNama\\t\\tHP\\t\\tRole\\tVIP\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        cout << daftarUser[i].id << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].name << \"\\t\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].phone << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].role << \"\\t\"\n             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"Ya\" : \"Tidak\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}",
              "newString": "void displayAllUsers() {\n    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"       DAFTAR SEMUA USER         \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"No.\\tNama\\t\\tHP\\t\\tRole\\tVIP\" << endl;\n    cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        cout << (i + 1) << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].name << \"\\t\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].phone << \"\\t\"\n             << daftarUser[i].role << \"\\t\"\n             << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"Ya\" : \"Tidak\") << endl;\n    }\n\n    pressEnter();\n}"
