          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "The user wants me to create dummy data so that all menu options have data to display. Let me think about what data is needed:\n\nFor admin to see all features:\n- Multiple iPhones (some rented, some available)\n- Multiple users (customers with different statuses)\n- Some active rentals\n- Some completed rentals\n- Some reservations (VIP and regular)\n- Data for reports\n\nFor customer to see all features:\n- Multiple iPhones to choose from\n- Their rental history\n- Their reservations\n\nLet me create comprehensive dummy data. I need to be careful with the CSV format and ID consistency.\n\nLet me plan the data:\n\n**users.csv** - At least: admin + several customers (some VIP, some regular)\n- ADM001, admin/admin123 (admin)\n- USR002, customer1/pass1 (regular)\n- USR003, customer2/pass2 (VIP)\n- USR004, customer3/pass3 (regular)\n- USR005, customer4/pass4 (VIP)\n\n**iphones.csv** - Several iPhones with mixed statuses\n- IP001, iPhone 16 Pro Max, 512GB, 300000, available\n- IP002, iPhone 16 Pro, 256GB, 275000, rented\n- IP003, iPhone 15 Pro Max, 256GB, 250000, rented\n- IP004, iPhone 15 Pro, 128GB, 200000, available\n- IP005, iPhone 14 Plus, 128GB, 175000, available\n- IP006, iPhone SE 3, 64GB, 125000, rented\n\n**rentals.csv** - Mix of active and completed\n- RNT001, USR002, IP002, 2026-05-15, 3, 825000, active\n- RNT002, USR003, IP003, 2026-05-10, 7, 1750000, active\n- RNT003, USR004, IP006, 2026-05-01, 5, 625000, completed\n\n**reservations.csv** - Mix of VIP and regular\n- RSV001, USR005, IP002, 2026-05-18, VIP, waiting\n- RSV002, USR004, IP003, 2026-05-17, Regular, waiting\n- RSV003, USR002, IP006, 2026-05-16, Regular, waiting\n\nLet me also make sure the `total_rented` field in iphones.csv reflects the actual rental counts. Let me calculate:\n- IP002 (rented) → total_rented = 1\n- IP003 (rented) → total_rented = 1\n- IP006 (completed) → total_rented = 1\n- Others → 0\n\nActually, wait. Let me think about what the program expects. Looking at the load functions:\n\n**users.csv** expects: id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\n**iphones.csv** expects: id,name,storage,rent_price,status,total_rented\n**rentals.csv** expects: rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\n**reservations.csv** expects: reservation_id,user_id,iphone_id,reservation_date,priority,status\n\nThe IDs in the format: ADM001, USR002, IP001, RNT001, RSV001.\n\nWait, there's a potential issue. The `formatID(\"USR\", newID)` function does:\n```cpp\nstringstream ss;\nss << prefix;  // e.g. \"USR\"\nss << setw(3) << setfill('0') << num;  // e.g. \"002\"\nreturn ss.str();  // e.g. \"USR002\"\n```\n\nSo it generates USR001, USR002, etc. But in my dummy data, admin is ADM001 and customers start from USR002 (since admin takes USR001 conceptually). Actually wait - let me check. Looking at the register code:\n\n```cpp\nint newID = jumlahUser + 1;\nstring id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n```\n\nSo the first registered customer gets USR001. But admin has ADM001. So we can have ADM001 for admin and USR001, USR002 for customers. The program doesn't have a problem with that since IDs are unique strings.\n\nActually, looking at the existing data, admin has ADM001 and the first registered customer got USR002. This is because `jumlahUser` is 1 (only admin) when registering, so `newID = 1 + 1 = 2`, giving USR002. When the data is loaded from CSV, jumlahUser = 2 (admin + existing customer), so next register would give USR003.\n\nFor my dummy data, I need to be consistent. Let me just assign sequential customer IDs starting from USR001 (since that's what the formatID function would produce if jumlahUser was 0 + 1 = 1). But looking at the data, admin ADM001 exists, so when the first customer registers, jumlahUser = 1, newID = 2, giving USR002.\n\nSo if I create dummy customer data with USR001, and later someone registers, the program will generate USR003 (since jumlahUser will have grown). That's fine — no ID conflict.\n\nActually, let me check: does the program ever generate ADM format IDs? Looking at the code:\n- registerUser: `formatID(\"USR\", ...)`\n- tambahIPhone: `formatID(\"IP\", ...)`\n- sewaIPhone: `formatID(\"RNT\", ...)`\n- buatReservasi: `formatID(\"RSV\", ...)`\n\nOnly USR, IP, RNT, RSV are auto-generated. ADM001 is created manually in CSV. So my dummy data can use ADM001 for admin and USR001-USR004 for customers.\n\nWait, let me reconsider. If I use USR001 in the CSV but the program's first register uses `newID = jumlahUser + 1 = 5 + 1 = 6`, the next registered customer would get USR006. That works fine.\n\nLet me assign:\n- ADM001 - Administrator (admin)\n- USR001 - Andi Pratama (customer, VIP)\n- USR002 - Siti Rahma (customer, regular)\n- USR003 - Budi Santoso (customer, VIP)\n- USR004 - Dewi Lestari (customer, regular)\n\nFor iPhones:\n- IP001 - iPhone 16 Pro Max, 512GB, 300000, available, 2\n- IP002 - iPhone 16 Pro, 256GB, 275000, rented, 1\n- IP003 - iPhone 15 Pro Max, 256GB, 250000, rented, 3\n- IP004 - iPhone 15 Pro, 128GB, 200000, available, 1\n- IP005 - iPhone 14 Plus, 128GB, 175000, available, 0\n- IP006 - iPhone SE 3, 64GB, 125000, available, 0\n\nFor rentals:\n- RNT001 - USR001 sewa IP002, 2026-05-15, 3 hari, 825000, active\n- RNT002 - USR003 sewa IP003, 2026-05-10, 7 hari, 1750000, active\n- RNT003 - USR002 sewa IP004, 2026-05-01, 5 hari, 1000000, completed\n- RNT004 - USR001 sewa IP001, 2026-04-20, 2 hari, 600000, completed\n- RNT005 - USR003 sewa IP001, 2026-05-05, 4 hari, 1200000, completed\n\nFor reservations:\n- RSV001 - USR001 (VIP) reservasi IP002, 2026-05-18, VIP, waiting\n- RSV002 - USR004 (regular) reservasi IP003, 2026-05-17, Regular, waiting\n- RSV003 - USR002 (regular) reservasi IP002, 2026-05-16, Regular, waiting\n\nThis gives a nice mix:\n- Admin can see: 6 iPhones (3 avail, 2 rented, 1 completed history), 4 customers (2 VIP, 2 regular), 5 rentals (2 active, 3 completed), 3 reservations (1 VIP, 2 regular)\n- Customer can see: available iPhones, history (USR001 has 2 completed + 1 active), reservations (RSV001 for USR001)\n\nLet me write the CSV files now.",

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Let me update the anchored summary with the new information from the conversation. Key changes:\n\n1. Added numbered list selection instead of manual ID typing\n2. Integrated tabulate library for table formatting\n3. Added xmake package dependency for tabulate\n\nLet me update each section accordingly.",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779163881299,
            "end": 1779163882221
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e6e5f53001B8Z4Vvwq2QkeG1",
          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",
          "messageID": "msg_e3e6e4c7c001eM3KjSnNKKGjZv"
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "## Goal\n- Build complete C++ iPhone rental system with CSV persistence, role-based menus (customer/admin), reservation priority queue, numbered-list selection, and tabulate table output.\n\n## Constraints & Preferences\n- All data stored as CSV files in `data/`: `users.csv`, `iphones.csv`, `rentals.csv`, `reservations.csv`\n- Single `users.csv` with `id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip` — admin and customers unified\n- Main menu: Login / Register Customer / Keluar; after login role determines menu\n- Customer menu: view iPhones, search, rent, reserve, view own status & history (no global reports)\n- Admin menu via login (admin/admin123): manage iPhones, users, rentals, reservations, reports\n- Login validates against CSV; register checks username uniqueness\n- Customer gets VIP priority in reservation queue; bubble sort on priority\n- `pressEnter()` uses `cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n')` — consumes one line from pipe, waits for Enter in interactive mode\n- Program runs via `xmake` then `xmake run` (set_rundir(\".\") ensures correct CWD)\n- No external frameworks, no GUI, no database — only C++17, struct, array, function, pointers, file I/O, try/catch\n- All prompts use `getline(cin, ...)` to avoid input skips\n- **User never types IDs manually** — all data selection via numbered list (no. → index → ID → CSV)\n- **All display tables use tabulate library** (`p-ranav/tabulate` v1.5 via xmake package) for professional bordered output\n- Input validation rejects out-of-range numbers and non-numeric input; does not crash on empty lists\n\n## Progress\n### Done\n- Analyzed 7 modul PDFs (Pengenalan C++, Array & Struct, Prosedur & Fungsi, Pointer, Sorting, Searching, Error Handling & Library)\n- Created full project structure: `includes/`, `modules/`, `utils/`, `data/`, `xmake.lua`, `main.cpp`\n- Implemented all headers (`csv_helper.h`, `utils.h`, `validator.h`, `user.h`, `iphone.h`, `rental.h`, `reservation.h`, `menu.h`)\n- Implemented all sources (`csv_helper.cpp`, `utils.cpp`, `validator.cpp`, `user.cpp`, `iphone.cpp`, `rental.cpp`, `reservation.cpp`, `menu.cpp`)\n- Implemented `main.cpp` entry point — loads all CSV data, calls `showMainMenu()`\n- Built and linked successfully with xmake (no errors, no warnings)\n- Ran end-to-end test: register → customer login → rent iPhone → view history → admin login → return → reports → logout → exit (all steps confirmed)\n- Data files persist correctly between runs\n- **Refactored all manual ID inputs to numbered list selection**: `sewaIPhone`, `buatReservasi`, `returnIPhone`, `editIPhone`, `hapusIPhone`, `deleteUser`, `setVIPStatus` — each displays a numbered list, user picks a number, program maps index → real ID internally\n- **Integrated tabulate library via xmake**: added `add_requires(\"tabulate\")` + `add_packages(\"tabulate\")` in `xmake.lua`\n- **Refactored all display functions to use tabulate::Table**: `displayAllIPhones`, `displayAvailableIPhones`, `searchIPhone`, `displayAllUsers`, `displayAllRentals`, `displayUserRentals`, `displayAllReservations`, `displayUserReservations`, `generateReport`\n- Removed stale files: `data/customers.txt`, `data/iphones.txt`, `data/rentals.txt`, `README.md` (described different project), `build/` cache\n- Cleaned `.gitignore` entries\n\n### In Progress\n- *(none)* — all core features are implemented and tested\n\n### Blocked\n- *(none)*\n\n## Key Decisions\n- Use `struct` (not class) to match module content (Modul 2)\n- Use global arrays of struct with `extern` for shared state (consistent with Modul 2 examples)\n- Use `fstream` + `getline` + `stringstream` for CSV I/O — standard library, taught implicitly in Modul 8\n- Reservation priority: VIP customers sorted ahead of regular customers using bubble sort (Modul 5)\n- `pressEnter()` reads one full line — works in both interactive (waits for Enter) and piped mode (consumes one line)\n- Admin credentials stored in CSV (not hardcoded) to match `users.csv` requirement\n- **Numbered selection**: instead of typing ID, program shows `1. iPhone 15 Pro Max ...`, user picks number, maps `selection-1` to array index, extracts real ID from struct — keeps CSV IDs internal only\n- **Tabulate library**: header-only C++17 table library via xmake package for clean bordered tables; auto column widths configurable via `table.column(n).format().width(w)`\n\n## Next Steps\n- *(none)* — project is complete and compilable/runnable per spec\n\n## Critical Context\n- Running `xmake` from project root; binary placed in `bin/`; `set_rundir(\".\")` ensures correct CWD for CSV paths; first run needs `xmake f --yes` to fetch tabulate package\n- Test pipe input must include an extra blank line after each operation that calls `pressEnter()`\n- CSV format uses header row; `load*()` functions skip header line with `getline` before parse loop\n- ID format: `USRxxx`, `IPxxx`, `RNTxxx`, `RSVxxx` with zero-padded 3-digit numbers\n- Tabulate include: `#include <tabulate/table.hpp>` + `using namespace tabulate;` — available after `xmake f` fetches the package\n- All manual ID prompts removed; data selection always via numbered list → index → real ID → CSV save\n\n## Relevant Files\n- `xmake.lua`: build config with `add_requires(\"tabulate\")` and `add_packages(\"tabulate\")`; `set_rundir(\".\")` critical for CSV paths\n- `data/*.csv`: all persistent data in CSV format (unchanged)\n- `includes/*.h`: struct definitions and function declarations for all modules\n- `modules/*.cpp`: business logic with numbered-list selection and tabulate table output\n- `utils/*.cpp`: CSV parser, input validation, date/format helpers\n- `main.cpp`: entry point, calls all `load*()` functions then `showMainMenu()`",

            "end": 1779163897387

          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "There are some problems I need to fix:\n\n1. **iphones.csv line 2**: `IP001,iPhone 16 Pro Max,6,3,rented,3` — The storage and rent_price fields are corrupted. It shows `6` instead of `512GB` and `3` instead of `300000`. Probably the git pull overwrote with bad data.\n\n2. **iphones.csv line 3**: `IP002,iPhone 16 Pro,256GB,275000,rented,1` — This is correct.\n\n3. **iphones.csv line 4**: `IP003,iPhone 15 Pro Max,256GB,250000,available,3` — In my original data IP003 was `rented`. Now it's `available`. Let me check if this is consistent with rentals. RNT002 shows IP003 rental by Budi as `completed` now (instead of `active`). So in this version, the iPhone is available and the rental is completed. That's actually fine for having data to show.\n\n4. **rentals.csv line 3**: `RNT002,USR003,IP003,2026-05-10,7,1750000,completed` — Was `active` before, now `completed`. I need to clean that up.\n\nBut wait - the git status shows no uncommitted changes. That means the remote branch had these exact files. The dummy data I created earlier wasn't committed, so it was overwritten by the pull. Let me re-check:\n\nActually no - the `git status --short` showed clean and `git diff HEAD --name-only` showed nothing. That means all these files are exactly what's in the HEAD commit. vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n         if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n \n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n         daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n         jumlahUser++;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n void saveUsers() {\n     ofstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n     if (!file.is_open()) {\n         cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file users.csv!\" << endl;\n         return;\n     }\n \n     file << \"id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\" << endl;\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         file << daftarUser[i].id << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].name << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].phone << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].username << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].password << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].role << \",\"\n              << (daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"true\" : \"false\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n int findUserByUsername(const string& username) {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].username == username) {\n             return i;\n         }\n     }\n     return -1;\n }\n \n int findUserIndexByID(const string& id) {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].id == id) {\n             return i;\n         }\n     }\n     return -1;\n }\n \n void login() {\n     string username, password;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"           LOGIN                 \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Masukkan username: \";\n     getline(cin, username);\n     cout << \"Masukkan password: \";\n     getline(cin, password);\n \n     int idx = findUserByUsername(username);\n     if (idx == -1) {\n         cout << \"Username tidak ditemukan!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     if (daftarUser[idx].password != password) {\n         cout << \"Password salah!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Selamat datang, \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"!\" << endl;\n \n     if (daftarUser[idx].role == \"admin\") {\n         showAdminMenu();\n     } else {\n         showCustomerMenu(daftarUser[idx].id);\n     }\n }\n \n void registerUser() {\n     if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n         cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     string name, phone, username, password;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"        REGISTER CUSTOMER \";\n         getline(cin, username);\n         if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n         cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Password: \";\n     getline(cin, password);\n \n     int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n     string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n \n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = \"customer\";\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n     jumlahUser++;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"Registrasi berhasil! ID Anda: \" << id << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n+void tambahUser() {\n+    if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n+        cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    string name, phone, username, password, role;\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"        TAMBAH USER              \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+\n+    cout << \"Nama: \";\n+    getline(cin, name);\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n+        getline(cin, phone);\n+        if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n+        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Username: \";\n+        getline(cin, username);\n+        if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n+        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Password: \";\n+    getline(cin, password);\n+\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Role (admin/customer): \";\n+        getline(cin, role);\n+        if (role == \"admin\" || role == \"customer\") break;\n+        cout << \"Role harus 'admin' atau 'customer'!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n+    string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n+\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = role;\n+    daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n+    jumlahUser++;\n+\n+    saveUsers();\n+    cout << \"User berhasil ditambahkan! ID: \" << id << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n+void editUser() {\n+    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n+        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n+        pressEnter();\n+        return;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    cout << \"      PILIH USER (EDIT)          \" << endl;\n+    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n+    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[i].name\n+             << \" (\" << daftarUser[i].role << \")\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    int pilihan;\n+    string input;\n+    while (true) {\n+        cout << \"Pilih user (1-\" << jumlahUser << \"): \";\n+        getline(cin, input);\n+        stringstream ss(input);\n+        if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahUser) break;\n+        cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahUser << \"!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    int idx = pilihan - 1;\n+    string temp;\n+\n+    cout << daftarUser[idx].username = temp;\n+            break;\n+        }\n+        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n+    }\n+\n+    cout << \"Password (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n+ {\n     if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"Nama\", \"No. HP\", \"Role\", \"VIP\"});\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         table.add_row({\n             intToString(i + 1),\n             daftarUser[i].name,\n pressEnter();\n }\n \n void deleteUser() {\n     int customerIdx[MAX_USERS];\n     int count = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].role == \"customer\") {\n             customerIdx[count] = i;\n             count++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada customer yang terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH CUSTOMER YANG DIHAPUS   \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" <<        << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \" (VIP)\" : \"\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih customer (1-\" << count << \"): \";\n \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = customerIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     cout << \"Hapus customer \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"? (y/n): \";\n     string confirm;\n     getline(cin, confirm);\n     if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n         cout << \"Penghapusan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     for (int i = idx; i < jumlahUser - 1; i++) {\n         daftarUser[i] = daftarUser[i + 1];\n     }\n     jumlahUser--;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"User berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void setVIPStatus() {\n     int customerIdx[MAX_USERS];\n     int count = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].role == \"customer\") {\n             customerIdx[count] = i;\n             count++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada customer yang terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH CUSTOMER (ATUR VIP)     \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n         int idx = customerIdx[i];\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n              << \" - \" << daftarUser[idx].phone\n              << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \" (VIP)\" : \" (Reguler)\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih customer (1-\" << count << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= count) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << count << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = customerIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     daftarUser[idx].isVIP = !daftarUser[idx].isVIP;\n     saveUsers();\n \n     cout << \"Status VIP user \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n          << \" sekarang: \" << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \"VIP\" : \"Reguler\") << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n",

          "text": "Now I have a full picture. The admin user management menu already has:\n1. Lihat Semua User (displayAllUsers)\n2. Hapus User (deleteUser)\n3. Atur Status VIP (setVIPStatus)\n4. We need to add:\n1. **Tambah User** - admin can create a new user (similar to registerUser but from admin menu + admin can create with any role)\n2. **Edit User** - admin can edit existing user details\n\nLet me add these two functions + update the menu.\n\nActually, looking at the current menu, it already has Lihat, Hapus, and Set VIP (which is \"Update\" for VIP status). But it doesn't have \"Tambah\" (Create) or full \"Edit\" (name, phone, username, password).\n\nLet me add:\n1. `tambahUser()` - admin adds a new user (like register but from admin menu)\n2. `editUser()` - admin edits user details\n\nAnd update `adminManageUsers()` menu to include these options.\n\nLet me implement this:\n\n### 1. `tambahUser()` in user.cpp\n- Admin enters name, phone, username, password, role (admin/customer)\n- Validate phone, check username uniqueness\n- Generate new ID\n- Save\n\n### 2. `editUser()` in user.cpp\n- Show numbered list of all users\n- Admin picks user\n- Show current values, ask for new values (enter to keep)\n- Update and save\n\n### 3. Update menu in menu.cpp\n- Add \"Tambah User\" (1) and \"Edit User\" (2), renumber existing options\n- 1. Tambah User\n- 2. Lihat Semua User\n- 3. Edit User\n- 4. Hapus User\n- 5. Atur Status VIP\n- 6. Kembali\n\n### 4. Update user.h declarations\n\nLet me also check if there's an `editUser` declaration already or any other function I might miss.\n\nActually, wait - I need to be careful with the `pressEnter()` function. Looking at line 16 of utils.cpp:\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\" << endl;\n    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n}\n```\n\nThis does `cin.ignore` which skips one line. In interactive mode, the user types Enter after seeing the prompt, and `cin.ignore` consumes that Enter. But `getline(cin, ...)` leaves no trailing newline, so `pressEnter` would wait for input... actually no, `getline` extracts the newline. So when `pressEnter` is called, `cin.ignore` would wait for the user to press Enter.\n\nBut wait, this is the same function that was used for pipe mode. In pipe mode, `cin.ignore` skips one line from the pipe. This is why in our test we need an extra blank line.\n\nOK, let me focus on the code. Let me implement the changes.\n\nFor `editUser`, I want admin to be able to edit:\n- name\n- phone  \n- username\n- password\n- role (maybe, but let's keep it simple - name, phone, username, password)\n\nFor the menu renumbering, I need to update the menu options and the `getMenuChoice` range.\n\nLet me implement:\n\n1. In `user.cpp`:\n```cpp\nvoid tambahUser() {\n    if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n        cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string name, phone, username, password, role;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"        TAMBAH USER              \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    cout << \"Nama: \";\n    getline(cin, name);\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n        getline(cin, phone);\n        if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Username: \";\n        getline(cin, username);\n        if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Password: \";\n    getline(cin, password);\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Role (admin/customer): \";\n        getline(cin, role);\n        if (role == \"admin\" || role == \"customer\") break;\n        cout << \"Role harus 'admin' atau 'customer'!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n    string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = role;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n    jumlahUser++;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"User berhasil ditambahkan! ID: \" << id << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n```\n\nWait, but if admin adds an admin user with ID format \"USR\", that would be weird. Let me check the existing formatID for admin: ADM001 is hardcoded. For new users, `formatID(\"USR\", newID)` is used regardless of role. That's fine - admin can tell by role column.\n\nActually, looking at the formatID function:\n```cpp\nstring formatID(const string& prefix, int num) {\n    stringstream ss;\n    ss << prefix;\n    ss << setw(3) << setfill('0') << num;\n    return ss.str();\n}\n```\n\nIt always uses \"USR\" prefix. So all registered users (including admin if created through this) would get USR prefix. That's OK since there's no prefix-based logic, only `role` field determines access. ADM001 is just a special manually-created ID for the initial admin.\n\nFor editUser, I need to handle the \"empty to keep\" pattern:\n\n```cpp\nvoid editUser() {\n    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"      PILIH USER (EDIT)          \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[i].name\n             << \" (\" << daftarUser[i].role << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int pilihan;\n    string input;\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Pilih user (1-\" << jumlahUser << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, input);\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahUser) break;\n        cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahUser << \"!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int idx = pilihan - 1;\n    string temp;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   EDIT USER (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \")\" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Kosongkan jika tidak ingin diubah.\" << endl;\n\n    cout << \"Nama (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"): \";\n    getline(cin, temp);\n    if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].name = temp;\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"No. HP (\" << daftarUser[idx].phone << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, temp);\n        if (temp.empty()) break;\n        if (isValidPhoneNumber(temp)) {\n            daftarUser[idx].phone = temp;\n            break;\n        }\n        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Username (\" << daftarUser[idx].username << \"): \";\n    getline(cin, temp);\n    if (!temp.empty()) {\n        if (findUserByUsername(temp) == -1 || temp == daftarUser[idx].username) {\n            daftarUser[idx].username = temp;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Username sudah digunakan, tetap menggunakan username lama.\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Password: \";\n    getline(cin, temp);\n    if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].password = temp;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"User berhasil diedit!\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n```\n\nLet me also think about the menu changes:\n\nCurrent:\n```\n1. Lihat Semua User\n2. Hapus User\n3. Atur Status VIP\n4. Kembali\n```\n\nNew:\n```\n1. Tambah User\n2. Lihat Semua User\n3. Edit User\n4. Hapus User\n5. Atur Status VIP\n6.               "oldString": "void displayAllUsers() {",
              "newString": "void tambahUser() {\n    if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n        cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string name, phone, username, password, role;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"        TAMBAH USER              \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n\n    cout << \"Nama: \";\n    getline(cin, name);\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n        getline(cin, phone);\n        if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Username: \";\n        getline(cin, username);\n        if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Password: \";\n    getline(cin, password);\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Role (admin/customer): \";\n        getline(cin, role);\n        if (role == \"admin\" || role == \"customer\") break;\n        cout << \"Role harus 'admin' atau 'customer'!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n    string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = role;\n    daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n    jumlahUser++;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"User berhasil ditambahkan! ID: \" << id << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid editUser() {\n    if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"      PILIH USER (EDIT)          \" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n        cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[i].name\n             << \" (\" << daftarUser[i].role << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int pilihan;\n    string input;\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Pilih user (1-\" << jumlahUser << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, input);\n        stringstream ss(input);\n        if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahUser) break;\n        cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahUser << \"!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    int idx = pilihan - 1;\n    string temp;\n\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   EDIT USER (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \")\" << endl;\n    cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Kosongkan jika tidak ingin diubah.\" << endl;\n\n    cout << \"Nama (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"): \";\n    getline(cin, temp);\n    if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].name = temp;\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"No. HP (\" << daftarUser[idx].phone << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, temp);\n        if (temp.empty()) break;\n        if (isValidPhoneNumber(temp)) {\n            daftarUser[idx].phone = temp;\n            break;\n        }\n        cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    while (true) {\n        cout << \"Username (\" << daftarUser[idx].username << \"): \";\n        getline(cin, temp);\n        if (temp.empty()) break;\n        if (findUserByUsername(temp) == -1 || temp == daftarUser[idx].username) {\n            daftarUser[idx].username = temp;\n            break;\n        }\n        cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n    }\n\n    cout << \"Password (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n    getline(cin, temp);\n    if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].password = temp;\n\n    saveUsers();\n    cout << \"User berhasil diedit!\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAllUsers() {"
            },

              "oldString": "        cout << \"1. Lihat Semua User\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Hapus User\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Atur Status VIP\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4.           "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Wait, I need to think about whether the `pressEnter` issue in pipe mode could affect interactive mode. Let me re-read the `pressEnter` function:\n\n```cpp\nvoid pressEnter() {\n    cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\" << endl;\n    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n}\n```\n\nIn interactive mode:\n- After `cout << \"Tekan Enter...\"`, user presses Enter\n- `cin.ignore` discards all remaining input until newline\n- In practice, the user types Enter, and cin.ignore consumes that Enter (the newline character)\n\nBut wait - the `getline(cin, ...)` calls that come before `pressEnter` consume the newline at the end of the input. So when `pressEnter` is called, the input buffer may be empty. Then `cin.ignore` waits for a newline to appear, which happens when the user presses Enter.\n\nActually, there's a subtlety. When the user types \"customer\" + Enter for the role input:\n1. `getline(cin, role)` reads \"customer\" and discards the trailing `\\n`\n2. Now `pressEnter` is called, which does `cin.ignore` - but there's nothing in the buffer, so it blocks waiting for input\n3. The user presses Enter, and `cin.ignore` discards that newline\n\nThis should work fine in interactive mode. Let me verify by checking if the code actually compiles and works.\n\nActually, wait. Let me re-examine. The sequence after `pressEnter()` in `tambahUser()`:\n```cpp\nsaveUsers();\ncout << \"User berhasil ditambahkan! ID: \" << id << endl;\npressEnter();\n```\n\nAfter `getline(cin, role)` reads the role, the buffer is empty (the newline was extracted by getline). Then `pressEnter` does cin.ignore, which blocks until the user types something + Enter. But with `numeric_limits<streamsize>::max()` delimiter, it reads up to the newline. Since the user just presses Enter, cin reads `\\n` and ignores it.\n\nThis is the same pattern used everywhere in the program. It worked before, so it should work now.\n\nLet me verify the current state is correct and all tests pass, then update the todos.",

          "type": "text",
          "text": "Sekarang menu Manajemen User di admin sudah **CRUD lengkap**:\n\n| Menu | Fungsi |\n|------|--------|\n| 1. Tambah User | `tambahUser()` - bisa create admin atau customer |\n| 2. Lihat Semua User | `displayAllUsers()` - tabel tabulate |\n| 3. Edit User | `editUser()` - edit nama/HP/username/password, kosongkan jika tidak diubah |\n| 4. Hapus User | `deleteUser()` - pilih dari daftar |\n| 5. Atur Status VIP | `setVIPStatus()` - toggle VIP |\n| 6. Kembali | - |\n\nJalankan `xmake run`, login `admin`/`admin123`, pilih menu 2 (Manajemen User).",

Gunakan YYYY-MM-DD\" << endl;\n111:     }\n112: \n113:     int duration = getValidInt(\"Durasi sewa (hari): \");\n114:     if (duration < 1) {\n115:         cout << \"Durasi minimal 1 hari!\" << endl;\n116:         pressEnter();\n117:         return;\n118:     }\n119: \n120:     float totalPrice = daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice * duration;\n121: \n122:     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n123:     cout << \"RINCIAN SEWA:\" << endl;\n124:     cout << \"iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" (\" << daftarIPhone[idx].storage << \")\" << endl;\n125:     cout << \"Durasi: \" << duration << \" hari\" << endl;\n126:     cout << \"Harga/hari: Rp\" << floatToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice) << endl;\n127:     cout << \"Total: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPrice) << endl;\n128:     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n129:     cout << \"Konfirmasi sewa? (y/n): \";\n130:     string confirm;\n131:     getline(cin, confirm);\n132:     if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n133:         cout << \"Penyewaan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n134:         pressEnter();\n135:         return;\n136:     }\n137: \n138:     int newID = jumlahRental + 1;\n139:     string rentalID = formatID(\"RNT\", newID);\n140: \n141:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = rentalID;\n142:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = userID;\n143:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = daftarIPhone[idx].id;\n144:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = startDate;\n145:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = duration;\n146:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = totalPrice;\n147:     daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = \"active\";\n148:     jumlahRental++;\n149: \n150:     daftarIPhone[idx].status = \"rented\";\n151:     daftarIPhone[idx].totalRented++;\n152: \n153:     saveRentals();\n154:     saveIPhones();\n155: \n156:     cout << \"Penyewaan berhasil! i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n66:         for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n67:             int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n68:             int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n69: \n70:             if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n71:                 Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n72:                 daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n73:                 daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n74:             }\n75:         }\n76:     }\n77: }\n78: \n79: int findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n80:     for (int i = 0; \"Harga/Hari\", \"Status\"});\n \n     int count = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n         string lowerName = \"\";\n         string lowerKeyword = \"\";\n         for (char c : daftarIPhone[i].name) lowerName += tolower(c);\n         for (char c : keyword) lowerKeyword += tolower(c);\n \n         if (lowerName.find(lowerKeyword) != string::npos) {\n             count++;\n intToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice),\n                 daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\"\n             });\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang cocok dengan \\\"\" << keyword << \"\\\"\" << endl;\n     } else {\n         table.column(0).format().width(5);\n         table.column(1).format().width(20);\n         table.column(2).format().width(10);\n         table.column(3).format().width(14);\n         table.column(4).format().width(10);\n \n         cout << table << endl;\n     }\n \n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void displayAvailableIPhones() {\n     int count = 0;\n     int availIdx[MAX_IPHONES];\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n         if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n             availIdx[count] = i;\n             count++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n         return;\n     }\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"Nama iPhone\", \"Storage\", \"Harga/Hari\"});\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n         int idx = availIdx[i];\n         table.add_row({\n             intToString(i + 1),\n             daftarIPhone[idx].name,\n             daftarIPhone[idx].storage,\n             \"Rp\" + intToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice)\n         });\n     }\n \n \n void saveRentals() {\n     ofstream file(\"data/rentals.csv\");\n     if (!file.is_open()) {\n         cout << \"Error: Tidak bisa membuka file rentals.csv!\" << endl;\n         return;\n     }\n \n     file << \"rental_id,user_id,iphone_id,start_date,duration,total_price,status\" << endl;\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n         file << daftarRental[i].rentalID << \",\"\n              << daftarRental[i].userID << \",\"\n              << daftarRental[i].iphoneID << \",\"\n              << daftarRental[i].startDate << \",\"\n              << intToString(daftarRental[i].duration) << \",\"\n              << floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice) << \",\"\n              << daftarRental[i].status << endl;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n void sewaIPhone(const string& userID) {\n     int availIdx[MAX_IPHONES];\n     int availCount = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n         if (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\") {\n             availIdx[availCount] = i;\n             availCount++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (availCount == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone yang tersedia saat ini.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"    PILIH iPhone TERSEDIA        \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < availCount; i++) {\n         int idx = availIdx[i];\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" (\"\n              << daftarIPhone[idx].storage << \") - Rp\"\n              << floatToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice) << \"/hari\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih iPhone (1-\" << availCount << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= availCount) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << availCount << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = availIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     string startDate;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Tanggal mulai sewa (YYYY-MM-DD): \";\n         getline(cin, startDate);\n         if (isValidDate(startDate)) break;\n         cout << \"Format tanggal salah! Gunakan YYYY-MM-DD\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int duration = getValidInt(\"Durasi sewa (hari): \");\n     if (duration < 1) {\n         cout << \"Durasi minimal 1 hari!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     float totalPrice = daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice * duration;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"RINCIAN SEWA:\" << endl;\n     cout << \"iPhone: \" << daftarIPhone[idx].name << \" (\" << daftarIPhone[idx].storage << \")\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Durasi: \" << duration << \" hari\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Harga/hari: Rp\" << floatToString(daftarIPhone[idx].rentPrice) << endl;\n     cout << \"Total: Rp\" << floatToString(totalPrice) << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Konfirmasi sewa? (y/n): \";\n     string confirm;\n     getline(cin, confirm);\n     if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n         cout << \"Penyewaan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     int newID = jumlahRental + 1;\n     string rentalID = formatID(\"RNT\", newID);\n \n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].rentalID = rentalID;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].userID = userID;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].iphoneID = daftarIPhone[idx].id;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].startDate = startDate;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].duration = duration;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].totalPrice = totalPrice;\n     daftarRental[jumlahRental].status = \"active\";\n     jumlahRental++;\n \n     daftarIPhone[idx].status = \"rented\";\n     daftarIPhone[idx].totalRented++;\n \n     saveRentals();\n     saveIPhones();\n \n     cout << \"Penyewaan berhasil! ID Rental: \" << rentalID << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void returnIPhone() {\n     int activeIdx[MAX_RENTALS];\n     int activeCount = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n         if (daftarRental[i].status == \"active\") {\n             activeIdx[activeCount] = i;\n             activeCount++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (activeCount == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada penyewaan aktif saat ini.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH PENYEWAAN AKTIF         \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < activeCount; i++) {\n         int idx = activeIdx[i];\n         int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n         string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : daftarRental[idx].iphoneID;\n         int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarRental[idx].userID);\n         string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : daftarRental[idx].userID;\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << phoneName << \" - \" << userName\n              << \" - \" << daftarRental[idx].startDate\n              << \" (\" << daftarRental[idx].duration << \" hari)\"\n              << \" - Rp\" << floatToString(daftarRental[idx].totalPrice) << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih penyewaan (1-\" << activeCount << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= activeCount) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << activeCount << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = activeIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     daftarRental[idx].status = \"completed\";\n \n     int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n     if (phoneIdx != -1) {\n         daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].status = \"available\";\n     }\n \n     saveRentals();\n     saveIPhones();\n \n     cout << \"iPhone berhasil dikembalikan!\" << endl;\n \n     processReservations(daftarRental[idx].iphoneID);\n \n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void displayAllRentals() {\n     if (jumlahRental == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada transaksi penyewaan.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"User\", \"iPhone\", \"Tgl Mulai\", \"Durasi\", \"Total\", \"Status\"});\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n         int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[i].iphoneID);\n         string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : daftarRental[i].iphoneID;\n         int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarRental[i].userID);\n         string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : daftarRental[i].userID;\n         table.add_row({\n             intToString(i + 1),\n             userName,\n             phoneName,\n             daftarRental[i].startDate,\n             intToString(daftarRental[i].duration) + \" hari\",\n             \"Rp\" + floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice),\n             daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\"\n         });\n     }\n \n     table.column(0).format().width(5);\n     table.column(1).format().width(16);\n     table.column(2).format().width(20);\n     table.column(3).format().width(12);\n     table.column(4).format().width(8);\n     table.column(5).format().width(14);\n     table.column(6).format().width(8);\n \n     cout << table << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void displayUserRentals(const string& userID) {\n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"iPhone\", \"Tgl Mulai\", \"Durasi\", \"Total\", \"Status\"});\n \n     int num = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n         if (daftarRental[i].userID == userID) {\n             num++;\n             int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarRental[i].iphoneID);\n             string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n \n             table.add_row({\n                 intToString(num),\n                 phoneName,\n                 daftarRental[i].startDate,\n                 intToString(daftarRental[i].duration) + \" hari\",\n                 \"Rp\" + floatToString(daftarRental[i].totalPrice),\n                 daftarRental[i].status == \"active\" ? \"Aktif\" : \"Selesai\"\n             });\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (num == 0) {\n         cout << \"Anda belum memiliki riwayat penyewaan.\" << endl;\n     } else {\n         table.column(0).format().width(5);\n         table.column(1).format().width(20);\n         table.column(2).format().width(12);\n         table.column(3).format().width(8);\n         table.column(4).format().width(14);\n         table.column(5).format().width(8);\n \n         cout << table << endl;\n     }\n \n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void generateReport() {\n     float totalPendapatan = 0;\n     int totalAktif = 0;\n     int totalSelesai = 0;\n     int maxRented = -1;\n-    int maxRentedIdx = -1;\n+    iPhone* maxPtr = nullptr;\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n         if (daftarRental[i].status == \"completed\") {\n             totalPendapatan += daftarRental[i].totalPrice;\n             totalSelesai++;\n         } else {\n             totalAktif++;\n         }\n     }\n \n-    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n-        if (daftarIPhone[i].totalRented > maxRented) {\n-            maxRented = daftarIPhone[i].totalRented;\n-            maxRentedIdx = i;\n+    for (iPhone* ptr = daftarIPhone; ptr < daftarIPhone + jumlahIPhone; ptr++) {\n+        if (ptr->totalRented > maxRented) {\n+            maxRented = ptr->totalRented;\n+            maxPtr = ptr;\n         }\n     }\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"Metrik\", \"Nilai\"});\n \n     table.add_row({\"Total Pendapatan\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(totalPendapatan)});\n     table.add_row({\"Total Transaksi\", intToString(jumlahRental)});\n     table.add_row({\"  - Aktif\", intToString(totalAktif)});\n     table.add_row({\"  - Selesai\", intToString(totalSelesai)});\n     table.add_row({\"Total iPhone\", intToString(jumlahIPhone)});\n \n     float rataRata = jumlahRental > 0 ? totalPendapatan / jumlahRental : 0;\n     table.add_row({\"Rata-rata/Transaksi\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(rataRata)});\n \n-    if (maxRentedIdx != -1 && maxRented > 0) {\n-        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", daftarIPhone[maxRentedIdx].name + \" (\" + intToString(maxRented) + \"x)\"});\n+    if (maxPtr != nullptr && maxRented > 0) {\n+        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", maxPtr->name + \" (\" + intToString(maxRented) + \"x)\"});\n     } else {\n         table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", \"Belum ada data\"});\n     }\n \n     table.column(0).format().width(24);\n     table.column(1).format().width(26);\n \n     cout << table << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n",

              "deletions": 30,
              "status": "modified"

daftarReservasi[i].priority << \",\"\n              << daftarReservasi[i].status << endl;\n     }\n \n     file.close();\n }\n \n void sortReservationsByPriority() {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi - 1; i++) {\n         for (int j = 0; j < jumlahReservasi - i - 1; j++) {\n             int priorityA = (daftarReservasi[j].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n             int priorityB = (daftarReservasi[j + 1].priority == \"VIP\") ? 1 : 0;\n \n             if (priorityA < priorityB) {\n                 Reservation temp = daftarReservasi[j];\n                 daftarReservasi[j] = daftarReservasi[j + 1];\n                 daftarReservasi[j + 1] = temp;\n             }\n         }\n     }\n }\n \n int findReservasiByID(const string& id) {\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         if (daftarReservasi[i].reservationID == id) {\n             return i;\n         }\n     }\n     return -1;\n }\n \n void buatReservasi(const string& userID) {\n     if (jumlahReservasi >= MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n         cout << \"Maaf, antrean reservasi penuh!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH iPhone UNTUK RESERVASI  \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarIPhone[i].name << \" (\"\n              << daftarIPhone[i].storage << \") - Rp\"\n              << floatToString(daftarIPhone[i].rentPrice) << \"/hari - \"\n              << (daftarIPhone[i].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih iPhone (1-\" << jumlahIPhone << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahIPhone) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahIPhone << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = pilihan - 1;\n \n     int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(userID);\n     string priority = \"Regular\";\n     if (userIdx != -1 && daftarUser[userIdx].isVIP) {\n         priority = \"VIP\";\n     }\n \n     int newID = jumlahReservasi + 1;\n     string resID = formatID(\"RSV\", newID);\n \n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = resID;\n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = userID;\n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = daftarIPhone[idx].id;\n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = getCurrentDate();\n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = priority;\n     daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = \"waiting\";\n     jumlahReservasi++;\n \n     sortReservationsByPriority();\n     saveReservations();\n \n     cout << \"Reservasi berhasil! ID Reservasi: \" << resID << endl;\n     cout << \"Prioritas: \" << priority << endl;\n     cout << \"Anda akan mendapat notifikasi ketika iPhone tersedia.\" << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void processReservations(const string& iphoneID) {\n     cout << \"Memeriksa antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini...\" << endl;\n \n     bool found = false;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         if (daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID == iphoneID &&\n             daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") {\n             int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n             string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n \n             cout << \"Reservasi ditemukan:\" << endl;\n             cout << \"ID: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationID << endl;\n             cout << \"User: \" << userName << endl;\n             cout << \"Prioritas: \" << daftarReservasi[i].priority << endl;\n             cout << \"Tanggal: \" << daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate << endl;\n             found = true;\n             break;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (!found) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada antrean reservasi untuk iPhone ini.\" << endl;\n     }\n }\n \n void displayAllReservations() {\n     if (jumlahReservasi == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada reservasi.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     sortReservationsByPriority();\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"User\", \"iPhone\", \"Tgl Reservasi\", \"Prioritas\", \"Status\"});\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n         string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n         int userIdx = findUserIndexByID(daftarReservasi[i].userID);\n         string userName = userIdx != -1 ? daftarUser[userIdx].name : daftarReservasi[i].userID;\n         string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n \n         table.add_row({\n             intToString(i + 1),\n             userName,\n             phoneName,\n             daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate,\n             daftarReservasi[i].priority,\n             statusText\n         });\n     }\n \n     table.column(0).format().width(5);\n     table.column(1).format().width(16);\n     table.column(2).format().width(20);\n     table.column(3).format().width(14);\n     table.column(4).format().width(10);\n     table.column(5).format().width(10);\n \n     cout << table << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void displayUserReservations(const string& userID) {\n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"iPhone\", \"Tgl Reservasi\", \"Prioritas\", \"Status\"});\n \n     int num = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahReservasi; i++) {\n         if (daftarReservasi[i].userID == userID) {\n             num++;\n             int phoneIdx = findiPhoneByID(daftarReservasi[i].iphoneID);\n             string phoneName = phoneIdx != -1 ? daftarIPhone[phoneIdx].name : \"Unknown\";\n             string statusText = (daftarReservasi[i].status == \"waiting\") ? \"Menunggu\" : \"Diproses\";\n \n             table.add_row({\n                 intToString(num),\n                 phoneName,\n                 daftarReservasi[i].reservationDate,\n                 daftarReservasi[i].priority,\n                 statusText\n             });\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (num == 0) {\n         cout << \"Anda belum memiliki reservasi.\" << endl;\n     } else {\n         table.column(0).format().width(5);\n         table.column(1).format().width(20);\n         table.column(2).format().width(14);\n         table.column(3).format().width(10);\n         table.column(4).format().width(10);\n \n         cout << table << endl;\n     }\n \n     pressEnter();\n }\n",

file << \"id,name,phone,username,password,role,is_vip\" << endl;\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         file << daftarUser[i].id << \",\"\n              << daftarUser[i].name << getline(cin, password);\n \n     int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n     string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n \n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = \"customer\";\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n     jumlahUser++;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"Registrasi berhasil! ID Anda: \" << id << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void tambahUser() {\n     if (jumlahUser >= MAX_USERS) {\n         cout << \"Maaf, kapasitas user penuh!\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     string name, phone, username, password, role;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"        TAMBAH USER              \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n \n     cout << \"Nama: \";\n     getline(cin, name);\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Nomor HP: \";\n         getline(cin, phone);\n         if (isValidPhoneNumber(phone)) break;\n         cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Username: \";\n         getline(cin, username);\n         if (findUserByUsername(username) == -1) break;\n         cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Password: \";\n     getline(cin, password);\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Role (admin/customer): \";\n         getline(cin, role);\n         if (role == \"admin\" || role == \"customer\") break;\n         cout << \"Role harus 'admin' atau 'customer'!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int newID = jumlahUser + 1;\n     string id = formatID(\"USR\", newID);\n \n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = id;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = name;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = phone;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = username;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = password;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = role;\n     daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = false;\n     jumlahUser++;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"User berhasil ditambahkan! ID: \" << id << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void editUser() {\n     if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"      PILIH USER (EDIT)          \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[i].name\n              << \" (\" << daftarUser[i].role << \")\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih user (1-\" << jumlahUser << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= jumlahUser) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << jumlahUser << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = pilihan - 1;\n     string temp;\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   EDIT USER (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \")\" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"Kosongkan jika tidak ingin diubah.\" << endl;\n \n     cout << \"Nama (\" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"): \";\n     getline(cin, temp);\n     if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].name = temp;\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"No. HP (\" << daftarUser[idx].phone << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, temp);\n         if (temp.empty()) break;\n         if (isValidPhoneNumber(temp)) {\n             daftarUser[idx].phone = temp;\n             break;\n         }\n         cout << \"Nomor HP harus 10-14 digit angka!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Username (\" << daftarUser[idx].username << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, temp);\n         if (temp.empty()) break;\n         if (findUserByUsername(temp) == -1 || temp == daftarUser[idx].username) {\n             daftarUser[idx].username = temp;\n             break;\n         }\n         cout << \"Username sudah digunakan!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"Password (kosongkan jika tidak diubah): \";\n     getline(cin, temp);\n     if (!temp.empty()) daftarUser[idx].password = temp;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"User berhasil diedit!\" << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n+void sortUsersByName() {\n+    for (int i = 1; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n+        User key = daftarUser[i];\n+        int j = i - 1;\n+        while (j >= 0 && daftarUser[j].name > key.name) {\n+            daftarUser[j + 1] = daftarUser[j];\n+            j--;\n+        }\n+        daftarUser[j + 1] = key;\n+    }\n+    cout << \"User berhasil diurutkan berdasarkan nama (Insertion Sort).\" << endl;\n+    pressEnter();\n+}\n+\n void displayAllUsers() {\n     if (jumlahUser == 0) {\n         cout << \"Belum ada user terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     Table table;\n     table.add_row({\"No\", \"Nama\", \"No. HP\", \"Role\", \"VIP\"});\n \n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         table.add_row({\n             intToString(i + 1),\n             daftarUser[i].name,\n             daftarUser[i].phone,\n             daftarUser[i].role,\n             daftarUser[i].isVIP ? \"Ya\" : \"Tidak\"\n         });\n     }\n \n     table.column(0).format().width(5);\n     table.column(1).format().width(20);\n     table.column(2).format().width(15);\n     table.column(3).format().width(10);\n     table.column(4).format().width(5);\n \n     cout << table << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void deleteUser() {\n     int customerIdx[MAX_USERS];\n     int count = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].role == \"customer\") {\n             customerIdx[count] = i;\n             count++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada customer yang terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH CUSTOMER YANG DIHAPUS   \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n         int idx = customerIdx[i];\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n              << \" - \" << daftarUser[idx].phone\n              << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \" (VIP)\" : \"\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih customer (1-\" << count << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= count) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << count << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = customerIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     cout << \"Hapus customer \" << daftarUser[idx].name << \"? (y/n): \";\n     string confirm;\n     getline(cin, confirm);\n     if (confirm != \"y\" && confirm != \"Y\") {\n         cout << \"Penghapusan dibatalkan.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     for (int i = idx; i < jumlahUser - 1; i++) {\n         daftarUser[i] = daftarUser[i + 1];\n     }\n     jumlahUser--;\n \n     saveUsers();\n     cout << \"User berhasil dihapus!\" << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n \n void setVIPStatus() {\n     int customerIdx[MAX_USERS];\n     int count = 0;\n     for (int i = 0; i < jumlahUser; i++) {\n         if (daftarUser[i].role == \"customer\") {\n             customerIdx[count] = i;\n             count++;\n         }\n     }\n \n     if (count == 0) {\n         cout << \"Tidak ada customer yang terdaftar.\" << endl;\n         pressEnter();\n         return;\n     }\n \n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     cout << \"   PILIH CUSTOMER (ATUR VIP)     \" << endl;\n     cout << \"=================================\" << endl;\n     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n         int idx = customerIdx[i];\n         cout << (i + 1) << \". \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n              << \" - \" << daftarUser[idx].phone\n              << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \" (VIP)\" : \" (Reguler)\") << endl;\n     }\n \n     int pilihan;\n     string input;\n     while (true) {\n         cout << \"Pilih customer (1-\" << count << \"): \";\n         getline(cin, input);\n         stringstream ss(input);\n         if (ss >> pilihan && ss.eof() && pilihan >= 1 && pilihan <= count) break;\n         cout << \"Masukkan angka 1 - \" << count << \"!\" << endl;\n     }\n \n     int idx = customerIdx[pilihan - 1];\n \n     daftarUser[idx].isVIP = !daftarUser[idx].isVIP;\n     saveUsers();\n \n     cout << \"Status VIP user \" << daftarUser[idx].name\n          << \" sekarang: \" << (daftarUser[idx].isVIP ? \"VIP\" : \"Reguler\") << endl;\n     pressEnter();\n }\n",

              "patch": "Index: utils/utils.cpp\n===================================================================\n--- utils/utils.cpp\t\n+++ utils/utils.cpp\t\n@@ -1,60 +1,66 @@\n #include \"utils.h\"\n #include <iostream>\n #include <sstream>\n #include <iomanip>\n #include <limits>\n using namespace std;\n \n void clearScreen() {\n     for (int i = 0; i < 40; i++) {\n         cout << endl;\n     }\n }\n \n void pressEnter() {\n     cout << endl << \"Tekan Enter untuk melanjutkan...\" << endl;\n     cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n }\n \n string getCurrentDate() {\n     time_t t = time(nullptr);\n     struct tm* now = localtime(&t);\n     stringstream ss;\n     ss << (now->tm_year + 1900) << \"-\"\n        << setw(2) << setfill('0') << (now->tm_mon + 1) << \"-\"\n        << setw(2) << setfill('0') << now->tm_mday;\n     return ss.str();\n }\n \n int stringToInt(const string& str) {\n-    stringstream ss(str);\n-    int val = 0;\n-    ss >> val;\n-    return val;\n+    try {\n+        return stoi(str);\n+    } catch (const invalid_argument&) {\n+        return 0;\n+    } catch (const out_of_range&) {\n+        return 0;\n+    }\n }\n \n float stringToFloat(const string& str) {\n-    stringstream ss(str);\n-    float val = 0;\n-    ss >> val;\n-    return val;\n+    try {\n+        return stof(str);\n+    } catch (const invalid_argument&) {\n+        return 0.0f;\n+    } catch (const out_of_range&) {\n+        return 0.0f;\n+    }\n }\n \n string intToString(int val) {\n     stringstream ss;\n     ss << val;\n     return ss.str();\n }\n \n string floatToString(float val) {\n     stringstream ss;\n     ss << fixed << setprecision(0) << val;\n     return ss.str();\n }\n \n string formatID(const string& prefix, int num) {\n     stringstream ss;\n     ss << prefix;\n     ss << setw(3) << setfill('0') << num;\n     return ss.str();\n }\n",

              "oldString": "void loadUsers() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahUser = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n        jumlahUser++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}",
              "newString": "void loadUsers() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n        file.exceptions(ifstream::failbit | ifstream::badbit);\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n            vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n            if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n            jumlahUser++;\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error loading users: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n    }\n}"
            },

        {
          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Wait, I have a logical issue. If I set `file.exceptions(ifstream::failbit | ifstream::badbit)`, then `if (!file.is_open())` check will never be reached because if the file fails to open, the failbit will be set and an exception thrown before reaching the is_open check.\n\nActually, `ifstream` constructor with a filename only sets failbit if the file cannot be opened. The `file.exceptions(...)` call will cause it to throw immediately when the file fails. So the `if (!file.is_open())` check is actually unreachable after enabling exceptions. Let me restructure:\n\nI should either:\n1. Not use `file.exceptions()` and instead manually throw on failure\n2. Or reorder: first check is_open, then set exceptions\n\nLet me use approach 2:",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779164500109,
            "end": 1779164502574
          },
          "id": "prt_e3e77d08d001Iwwk74pLAvfhNP",
          "sessionID": "ses_1c1b8411dffeJv8630xUXIx8IR",
          "messageID": "msg_e3e77c690001TMs5qP3hno3JBx"
        },
        {
          "type": "tool",
          "tool": "edit",
          "callID": "call_00_GS9laRtC4KWndZQdHvFZ4839",
          "state": {
            "status": "completed",
            "input": {
              "filePath": "/home/zak/Work/kuliah/semester2/praktikum/apl/projek-akhir/proyek-akhir-apl/modules/user.cpp",
              "oldString": "void loadUsers() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n        file.exceptions(ifstream::failbit | ifstream::badbit);\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n            vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n            if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n            jumlahUser++;\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error loading users: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n    }\n}",
              "newString": "void loadUsers() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n        file.exceptions(ifstream::failbit | ifstream::badbit);\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n            vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n            if (fields.size() < 7) continue;\n\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].id = fields[0];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].name = fields[1];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].phone = fields[2];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].username = fields[3];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].password = fields[4];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].role = fields[5];\n            daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n            jumlahUser++;\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error loading users: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n    }\n}"
            },
            "output": "Edit applied successfully.",
            "metadata": {

              "newString": "    cout << \"iPhone berhasil diurutkan berdasarkan nama (Selection Sort).\" << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid binarySearchIPhone() {\n    if (jumlahIPhone == 0) {\n        cout << \"Belum ada iPhone terdaftar.\" << endl;\n        pressEnter();\n        return;\n    }\n\n    sortIPhonesByName();\n\n    cout << \"Masukkan nama iPhone yang dicari (tepat): \";\n    string target;\n    getline(cin, target);\n\n    int left = 0, right = jumlahIPhone - 1;\n    int foundIdx = -1;\n\n    while (left <= right) {\n        int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;\n        if (daftarIPhone[mid].name == target) {\n            foundIdx = mid;\n            break;\n        }\n        if (daftarIPhone[mid].name < target) {\n            left = mid + 1;\n        } else {\n            right = mid - 1;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (foundIdx == -1) {\n        cout << \"Tidak ada iPhone dengan nama \\\"\" << target << \"\\\"\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        Table table;\n        table.add_row({\"No\", \"Nama iPhone\", \"Storage\", \"Harga/Hari\", \"Status\"});\n        table.add_row({\n            \"1\",\n            daftarIPhone[foundIdx].name,\n            daftarIPhone[foundIdx].storage,\n            \"Rp\" + intToString(daftarIPhone[foundIdx].rentPrice),\n            daftarIPhone[foundIdx].status == \"available\" ? \"Tersedia\" : \"Disewa\"\n        });\n        table.column(0).format().width(5);\n        table.column(1).format().width(20);\n        table.column(2).format().width(10);\n        table.column(3).format().width(14);\n        table.column(4).format().width(10);\n        cout << table << endl;\n    }\n    pressEnter();\n}\n\nvoid displayAllIPhones() {",
