              "newString": "void generateReport() {\n    float totalPendapatan = 0;\n    int totalAktif = 0;\n    int totalSelesai = 0;\n    int maxRented = -1;\n    iPhone* maxPtr = nullptr;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        if (daftarRental[i].status == \"completed\") {\n            totalPendapatan += daftarRental[i].totalPrice;\n            totalSelesai++;\n        } else {\n            totalAktif++;\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (iPhone* ptr = daftarIPhone; ptr < daftarIPhone + jumlahIPhone; ptr++) {\n        if (ptr->totalRented > maxRented) {\n            maxRented = ptr->totalRented;\n            maxPtr = ptr;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Table table;\n    table.add_row({\"Metrik\", \"Nilai\"});\n\n    table.add_row({\"Total Pendapatan\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(totalPendapatan)});\n    table.add_row({\"Total Transaksi\", intToString(jumlahRental)});\n    table.add_row({\"  - Aktif\", intToString(totalAktif)});\n    table.add_row({\"  - Selesai\", intToString(totalSelesai)});\n    table.add_row({\"Total iPhone\", intToString(jumlahIPhone)});\n\n    float rataRata = jumlahRental > 0 ? totalPendapatan / jumlahRental : 0;\n    table.add_row({\"Rata-rata/Transaksi\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(rataRata)});\n\n    if (maxPtr != nullptr && maxRented > 0) {\n        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", maxPtr->name + \" (\" + intToString(maxRented) + \"x)\"});\n    } else {\n        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", \"Belum ada data\"});\n    }\n\n    table.column(0).format().width(24);\n    table.column(1).format().width(26);\n\n    cout << table << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}",
              "oldString": "void generateReport() {\n    float totalPendapatan = 0;\n    int totalAktif = 0;\n    int totalSelesai = 0;\n    int maxRented = -1;\n    int maxRentedIdx = -1;\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahRental; i++) {\n        if (daftarRental[i].status == \"completed\") {\n            totalPendapatan += daftarRental[i].totalPrice;\n            totalSelesai++;\n        } else {\n            totalAktif++;\n        }\n    }\n\n    for (int i = 0; i < jumlahIPhone; i++) {\n        if (daftarIPhone[i].totalRented > maxRented) {\n            maxRented = daftarIPhone[i].totalRented;\n            maxRentedIdx = i;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Table table;\n    table.add_row({\"Metrik\", \"Nilai\"});\n\n    table.add_row({\"Total Pendapatan\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(totalPendapatan)});\n    table.add_row({\"Total Transaksi\", intToString(jumlahRental)});\n    table.add_row({\"  - Aktif\", intToString(totalAktif)});\n    table.add_row({\"  - Selesai\", intToString(totalSelesai)});\n    table.add_row({\"Total iPhone\", intToString(jumlahIPhone)});\n\n    float rataRata = jumlahRental > 0 ? totalPendapatan / jumlahRental : 0;\n    table.add_row({\"Rata-rata/Transaksi\", \"Rp\" + floatToString(rataRata)});\n\n    if (maxRentedIdx != -1 && maxRented > 0) {\n        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", daftarIPhone[maxRentedIdx].name + \" (\" + intToString(maxRented) + \"x)\"});\n    } else {\n        table.add_row({\"iPhone Terpopuler\", \"Belum ada data\"});\n    }\n\n    table.column(0).format().width(24);\n    table.column(1).format().width(26);\n\n    cout << table << endl;\n    pressEnter();\n}"

          "type": "reasoning",
          "text": "Wait, but `badbit` alone might not be thrown often for file I/O. Let me think about this differently. The purpose of try/catch in file I/O is to catch REAL errors (disk failure, etc.), not the normal EOF behavior. Using only `badbit` is actually correct because badbit indicates a non-recoverable error.\n\nBut actually, to demonstrate try/catch more effectively, let me keep failbit too but handle it differently. The issue is that `getline` sets failbit on EOF (end of file), which is a normal condition, not an error. \n\nA better approach: Don't use `file.exceptions()` at all. Instead, manually check for errors and throw where appropriate. Let me restructure:\n\n```cpp\nvoid loadUsers() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahUser < MAX_USERS) {\n            // ... parse ...\n        }\n\n        if (file.bad()) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"I/O error saat membaca users.csv\");\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahUser = 0;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nThis way, we demonstrate try/catch without breaking normal EOF behavior. The `bad()` check catches actual I/O corruption. But `bad()` is rarely set for normal file operations.\n\nHmm, maybe I should approach this differently. Let me use try/catch around the string-to-number conversions in the load functions, since those are the operations that could actually fail if CSV data is corrupted:\n\n```cpp\nwhile (getline(file, line)) {\n    try {\n        // parse and convert\n        daftarUser[jumlahUser].isVIP = parseBoolean(fields[6]);\n    } catch (...) {\n        continue; // skip corrupted row\n    }\n}\n```\n\nActually, I already have try/catch in stringToInt and stringToFloat now (with stoi/stof). The load function calls `stringToInt` for numeric fields. But the individual field assignments don't throw on their own.\n\nWait, let me reconsider. The user asked to use try/catch. The simplest and most meaningful place is:\n1. In stringToInt/stringToFloat (done)\n2. In load functions - wrap the entire load in try/catch to catch unexpected errors\n3. But skip file.exceptions() to avoid the EOF issue\n\nLet me just keep it simple: wrap the load functions in try/catch EXCEPT without file.exceptions. The try/catch will catch any unexpected exceptions from string operations or vector operations:\n\n```cpp\nvoid loadUsers() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/users.csv\");\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n        // ... no file.exceptions ...\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nThis demonstrates try/catch even though the code won't normally throw.               "oldString": "void loadIPhones() {\n    ifstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n    if (!file.is_open()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line);\n\n    jumlahIPhone = 0;\n    while (getline(file, line) && jumlahIPhone < MAX_IPHONES) {\n        vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n        if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = fields[0];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = fields[1];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = fields[2];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = stringToFloat(fields[3]);\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = fields[4];\n        daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = stringToInt(fields[5]);\n        jumlahIPhone++;\n    }\n\n    file.close();\n}",
              "newString": "void loadIPhones() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/iphones.csv\");\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahIPhone = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahIPhone < MAX_IPHONES) {\n            vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n            if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].id = fields[0];\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].name = fields[1];\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].storage = fields[2];\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].rentPrice = stringToFloat(fields[3]);\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].status = fields[4];\n            daftarIPhone[jumlahIPhone].totalRented = stringToInt(fields[5]);\n            jumlahIPhone++;\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error loading iPhones: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahIPhone = 0;\n    }\n}"
            },

              "newString": "void loadReservations() {\n    try {\n        ifstream file(\"data/reservations.csv\");\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        string line;\n        getline(file, line);\n\n        jumlahReservasi = 0;\n        while (getline(file, line) && jumlahReservasi < MAX_RESERVATIONS) {\n            vector<string> fields = splitCSVRow(line);\n            if (fields.size() < 6) continue;\n\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationID = fields[0];\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].userID = fields[1];\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].iphoneID = fields[2];\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].reservationDate = fields[3];\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].priority = fields[4];\n            daftarReservasi[jumlahReservasi].status = fields[5];\n            jumlahReservasi++;\n        }\n\n        file.close();\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Error loading reservations: \" << e.what() << endl;\n        jumlahReservasi = 0;\n    }\n}",

        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "Semua modul sudah diterapkan. Rangkuman perubahan:\n\n### Modul 4 — Pointer (sebelumnya kurang)\n- `generateReport()` di `rental.cpp:312-317` — sekarang pakai `iPhone* ptr` untuk traverse array (`ptr++`, `ptr->totalRented`, `ptr->name`, `maxPtr != nullptr`)\n\n### Modul 5 — Sorting (sekarang 3 metode)\n| Algoritma | Lokasi |\n|-----------|--------|\n| **Bubble sort** (prioritas reservasi) | `reservation.cpp:64-77` |\n| **Selection sort** (iPhone by name) | `iphone.cpp:205-220` — menu admin 1→6 |\n| **Insertion sort** (user by name) | `user.cpp:196-210` — menu admin 2→3 |\n\n### Modul 6 — Searching (sekarang 2 metode)\n| Algoritma | Lokasi |\n|-----------|--------|\n| **Linear search** (by ID, username) | `user.cpp:65-81`, `iphone.cpp:62-69`, `reservation.cpp:79-86` |\n| **Substring search** (case-insensitive) | `iphone.cpp:255-295` (`searchIPhone()`) |\n| **Binary search** (sorted by name, exact) | `iphone.cpp:224-270` (`binarySearchIPhone()`) — menu admin 1→7 |\n\n### Modul 7 — Error Handling\n- `stringToInt()`/`stringToFloat()` di `utils.cpp` — `stoi`/`stof` dengan `try/catch` untuk `invalid_argument` & `out_of_range`\n- Semua `load*()` — `loadUsers`, `loadIPhones`, `loadRentals`, `loadReservations` dibungkus `try/catch`",
          "time": {
            "start": 1779164777963,
            "end": 1779164782009
          },
